## Table Definitions:
CREATE SEQUENCE DOC_VIEW_HISTORY_SEQ; CREATE TABLE DOC_VIEW_HISTORY (PKID NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, CONTENT_ID NUMBER, CONTENT_TYPE VARCHAR2(200), ACCESS_TIME TIMESTAMP); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER DOC_VIEW_HISTORY_BI BEFORE INSERT ON DOC_VIEW_HISTORY FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.PKID IS NULL THEN SELECT DOC_VIEW_HISTORY_SEQ.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.PKID FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_dvh_content_type ON DOC_VIEW_HISTORY(CONTENT_TYPE);
CREATE INDEX idx_dvh_content_id ON DOC_VIEW_HISTORY(CONTENT_ID);
CREATE INDEX idx_dvh_access_time ON DOC_VIEW_HISTORY(ACCESS_TIME);
CREATE SEQUENCE ARCHIVE_FILE_SEQ; CREATE TABLE ARCHIVE_FILE (REF_ID NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, ARCHIVE_ID NUMBER); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER ARCHIVE_FILE_BI BEFORE INSERT ON ARCHIVE_FILE FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.REF_ID IS NULL THEN SELECT ARCHIVE_FILE_SEQ.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.REF_ID FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_af_archive_id ON ARCHIVE_FILE(ARCHIVE_ID);
CREATE SEQUENCE ARCHIVE_FILE_INFO_SEQ; CREATE TABLE ARCHIVE_FILE_INFO (PKID NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, FILE_TITLE VARCHAR2(200), FILE_CODE VARCHAR2(100), CATEGORY_ID NUMBER, IS_DELETED VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT '0'); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER ARCHIVE_FILE_INFO_BI BEFORE INSERT ON ARCHIVE_FILE_INFO FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.PKID IS NULL THEN SELECT ARCHIVE_FILE_INFO_SEQ.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.PKID FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_afi_category_id ON ARCHIVE_FILE_INFO(CATEGORY_ID);
CREATE INDEX idx_afi_is_deleted ON ARCHIVE_FILE_INFO(IS_DELETED);
CREATE SEQUENCE ARCHIVE_CATEGORY_INFO_SEQ; CREATE TABLE ARCHIVE_CATEGORY_INFO (PKID NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, TYPE_ID NUMBER); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER ARCHIVE_CATEGORY_INFO_BI BEFORE INSERT ON ARCHIVE_CATEGORY_INFO FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.PKID IS NULL THEN SELECT ARCHIVE_CATEGORY_INFO_SEQ.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.PKID FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_aci_type_id ON ARCHIVE_CATEGORY_INFO(TYPE_ID);

You are a database expert in SQL performance optimization.

## Table Definitions:
CREATE SEQUENCE DOC_VIEW_HISTORY_SEQ; CREATE TABLE DOC_VIEW_HISTORY (PKID NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, CONTENT_ID NUMBER, CONTENT_TYPE VARCHAR2(200), ACCESS_TIME TIMESTAMP); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER DOC_VIEW_HISTORY_BI BEFORE INSERT ON DOC_VIEW_HISTORY FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.PKID IS NULL THEN SELECT DOC_VIEW_HISTORY_SEQ.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.PKID FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_dvh_content_type ON DOC_VIEW_HISTORY(CONTENT_TYPE);
CREATE INDEX idx_dvh_content_id ON DOC_VIEW_HISTORY(CONTENT_ID);
CREATE INDEX idx_dvh_access_time ON DOC_VIEW_HISTORY(ACCESS_TIME);
CREATE SEQUENCE ARCHIVE_FILE_SEQ; CREATE TABLE ARCHIVE_FILE (REF_ID NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, ARCHIVE_ID NUMBER); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER ARCHIVE_FILE_BI BEFORE INSERT ON ARCHIVE_FILE FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.REF_ID IS NULL THEN SELECT ARCHIVE_FILE_SEQ.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.REF_ID FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_af_archive_id ON ARCHIVE_FILE(ARCHIVE_ID);
CREATE SEQUENCE ARCHIVE_FILE_INFO_SEQ; CREATE TABLE ARCHIVE_FILE_INFO (PKID NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, FILE_TITLE VARCHAR2(200), FILE_CODE VARCHAR2(100), CATEGORY_ID NUMBER, IS_DELETED VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT '0'); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER ARCHIVE_FILE_INFO_BI BEFORE INSERT ON ARCHIVE_FILE_INFO FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.PKID IS NULL THEN SELECT ARCHIVE_FILE_INFO_SEQ.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.PKID FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_afi_category_id ON ARCHIVE_FILE_INFO(CATEGORY_ID);
CREATE INDEX idx_afi_is_deleted ON ARCHIVE_FILE_INFO(IS_DELETED);
CREATE SEQUENCE ARCHIVE_CATEGORY_INFO_SEQ; CREATE TABLE ARCHIVE_CATEGORY_INFO (PKID NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, TYPE_ID NUMBER); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER ARCHIVE_CATEGORY_INFO_BI BEFORE INSERT ON ARCHIVE_CATEGORY_INFO FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.PKID IS NULL THEN SELECT ARCHIVE_CATEGORY_INFO_SEQ.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.PKID FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_aci_type_id ON ARCHIVE_CATEGORY_INFO(TYPE_ID);

## Original SQL:
SELECT
  afi.pkid,
  afi.FILE_TITLE,
  afi.FILE_CODE fdNo,
  w.sumNumber countNumber
FROM
  (
  SELECT
    max(CONTENT_ID) CONTENT_ID,
    sum(countNumber) sumNumber ,
    max(ARCHIVE_ID) ARCHIVE_ID
  FROM
    (
    SELECT
      CONTENT_ID,
      count(1) countNumber
    FROM
      DOC_VIEW_HISTORY
    WHERE
      CONTENT_TYPE = 'org.demo.repository.model.RecordEntry'
      AND CONTENT_ID IS NOT NULL
      AND ACCESS_TIME >= to_date('2025-12-12', 'yyyy-mm-dd')
      AND ACCESS_TIME <= to_date('2025-12-31', 'yyyy-mm-dd')
    GROUP BY
      CONTENT_ID ) t
  LEFT JOIN ARCHIVE_FILE af ON
    af.REF_ID = t.CONTENT_ID
  GROUP BY
    ARCHIVE_ID
  ORDER BY
    sumNumber DESC ) w
LEFT JOIN ARCHIVE_FILE_INFO afi ON
  afi.PKID = w.ARCHIVE_ID
LEFT JOIN ARCHIVE_CATEGORY_INFO aci ON
  aci.PKID = afi.CATEGORY_ID
WHERE
  afi.IS_DELETED = '0'
  AND aci.TYPE_ID IN(10, 15, 20)
  AND rownum <= 10

model_answers.model_answer: SELECT afi.pkid, afi.FILE_TITLE, afi.FILE_CODE fdNo, w.sumNumber countNumber FROM ( SELECT max(CONTENT_ID) CONTENT_ID, sum(countNumber) sumNumber, af.ARCHIVE_ID ARCHIVE_ID FROM ( SELECT CONTENT_ID, count(1) countNumber FROM DOC_VIEW_HISTORY WHERE CONTENT_TYPE = 'org.demo.repository.model.RecordEntry' AND CONTENT_ID IS NOT NULL AND ACCESS_TIME >= to_date('2025-12-12', 'yyyy-mm-dd') AND ACCESS_TIME <= to_date('2025-12-31', 'yyyy-mm-dd') GROUP BY CONTENT_ID ) t JOIN ARCHIVE_FILE af ON af.REF_ID = t.CONTENT_ID GROUP BY af.ARCHIVE_ID ) w JOIN ARCHIVE_FILE_INFO afi ON afi.PKID = w.ARCHIVE_ID AND afi.IS_DELETED = '0' JOIN ARCHIVE_CATEGORY_INFO aci ON aci.PKID = afi.CATEGORY_ID AND aci.TYPE_ID IN (10, 15, 20) ORDER BY w.sumNumber DESC FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

CREATE INDEX idx_mrtrecordinfo_indate ON mrtrecordinfo(IN_DATE);

## Original SQL:
SELECT
  A.ID AS id,
  A.PRAMARYID AS primaryId,
  A.OPERCODE AS operCode,
  A.OPERNAME AS operName,
  A.OPERDEPT AS operDept,
  A.OPERDATE AS operDate,
  A.MARK AS mark,
  C.BACKREASON AS mark1,
  A.MARK2 AS mark2,
  A.MARK3 AS mark3,
  A.MARK4 AS mark4,
  A.OPERTYPE AS operType,
  A.NEXTOPERTYPE AS nextOperType,
  A.PREOPERTYPE AS preOperType,
  A.VALID AS valid,
  A.CONFIRMUSER AS confirmUser,
  A.CONFIRMDEPT AS confirmDept,
  A.VERSIONNUMBER AS versionNumber,
  B.IN_TIMES AS inTimes,
  B.NAME AS patient,
  B.IN_DATE AS inDate,
  B.OUT_DATE AS outDate,
  B.OUT_DEPT AS outDept,
  B.RECORD_STATE AS recordState
FROM
  mrtopration A
LEFT JOIN mrtrecordinfo B ON
  A.ID = B.ID
LEFT JOIN mrtrecordregresses C ON
  B.ID = C.RECODE_NO
  AND A.OPERDATE = C.OPER_DATE
  AND A.OPERCODE = C.OPERID
WHERE
  A.ID IN (
  SELECT
    bid
  FROM
    (
    SELECT
      B.ID AS bid,
      B.IN_DATE AS inDate,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      ORDER BY B.IN_DATE DESC) AS rn
    FROM
      mrtopration A
    LEFT JOIN mrtrecordinfo B ON
      A.ID = B.ID
    WHERE
      B.ID LIKE '%' || 'ABC' || '%'
    GROUP BY
      B.ID,
      B.IN_DATE)
  WHERE
    rn BETWEEN 0 + 0 AND 10 + 0)
ORDER BY
  A.OPERDATE DESC

model_answers.model_answer: SELECT A.ID AS id, A.PRAMARYID AS primaryId, A.OPERCODE AS operCode, A.OPERNAME AS operName, A.OPERDEPT AS operDept, A.OPERDATE AS operDate, A.MARK AS mark, C.BACKREASON AS mark1, A.MARK2 AS mark2, A.MARK3 AS mark3, A.MARK4 AS mark4, A.OPERTYPE AS operType, A.NEXTOPERTYPE AS nextOperType, A.PREOPERTYPE AS preOperType, A.VALID AS valid, A.CONFIRMUSER AS confirmUser, A.CONFIRMDEPT AS confirmDept, A.VERSIONNUMBER AS versionNumber, B.IN_TIMES AS inTimes, B.NAME AS patient, B.IN_DATE AS inDate, B.OUT_DATE AS outDate, B.OUT_DEPT AS outDept, B.RECORD_STATE AS recordState FROM mrtopration A LEFT JOIN mrtrecordinfo B ON A.ID = B.ID LEFT JOIN mrtrecordregresses C ON B.ID = C.RECODE_NO AND A.OPERDATE = C.OPER_DATE AND A.OPERCODE = C.OPERID WHERE A.ID IN (SELECT bid FROM (SELECT B.ID AS bid, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY B.IN_DATE DESC) AS rn FROM mrtrecordinfo B WHERE B.ID LIKE '%ABC%') WHERE rn BETWEEN 1 AND 10) ORDER BY A.OPERDATE DESC

{"case_id": "24", "db_type": "oracle", "description": "дёҖз§Қз»Ҹе…ёзҡ„UNION ALLж¶ҲйҷӨдјҳеҢ–жҠҖжңҜгҖӮеҪ“UNION ALLзҡ„еӨҡдёӘеҲҶж”ҜжҹҘиҜўзӣёеҗҢзҡ„иЎЁпјҢдё”д»…еңЁSELECTеҲ—иЎЁзҡ„и®Ўз®—йҖ»иҫ‘жҲ–WHEREжқЎд»¶зҡ„еёёйҮҸеҖјдёҠжңүе·®ејӮж—¶пјҢеҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮCASEиЎЁиҫҫејҸе°ҶдёҚеҗҢзҡ„и®Ўз®—йҖ»иҫ‘з»ҹдёҖеҲ°дёҖдёӘSELECTиҜӯеҸҘдёӯгҖӮж”№еҶҷзҡ„ж ёеҝғжҳҜе°Ҷ'metric_name IN (йӣҶеҗҲ1) иҝ”еӣһround(VALUE,2)'е’Ң'metric_name IN (йӣҶеҗҲ2) иҝ”еӣһround(VALUE*10,2)'дёӨдёӘеҲҶж”ҜпјҢеҗҲе№¶дёә'metric_name IN (йӣҶеҗҲ1+йӣҶеҗҲ2) иҝ”еӣһCASE WHEN...END'гҖӮиҝҷж ·WHEREжқЎд»¶д»ҺдёӨж¬ЎеҲҶеҲ«иҝҮж»ӨеҸҳдёәдёҖж¬ЎиҝҮж»ӨжӣҙеӨ§зҡ„йӣҶеҗҲпјҢSELECTеҲ—иЎЁдҪҝз”ЁCASEж №жҚ®metric_nameеҠЁжҖҒйҖүжӢ©и®Ўз®—ж–№ејҸгҖӮиҝҷз§Қж”№еҶҷеңЁдҝқиҜҒйҖ»иҫ‘зӯүд»·зҡ„еүҚжҸҗдёӢпјҢжҳҫи‘—еҮҸе°‘дәҶI/Oж“ҚдҪңгҖӮ", "create_table_statements": ["CREATE SEQUENCE gv_session_seq; CREATE TABLE gv$session (session_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, inst_id NUMBER NOT NULL, TYPE VARCHAR2(20) NOT NULL, status VARCHAR2(20)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER gv_session_bi BEFORE INSERT ON gv$session FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.session_id IS NULL THEN SELECT gv_session_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.session_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_gv_session_inst_id ON gv$session(inst_id);", "CREATE INDEX idx_gv_session_type_status ON gv$session(TYPE, status);", "CREATE SEQUENCE gv_sysmetric_seq; CREATE TABLE gv$sysmetric (metric_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, inst_id NUMBER NOT NULL, end_time TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, metric_name VARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL, VALUE NUMBER(20,2), intsize_csec NUMBER); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER gv_sysmetric_bi BEFORE INSERT ON gv$sysmetric FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.metric_id IS NULL THEN SELECT gv_sysmetric_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.metric_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_gv_sysmetric_inst_id ON gv$sysmetric(inst_id);", "CREATE INDEX idx_gv_sysmetric_intsize ON gv$sysmetric(intsize_csec);", "CREATE INDEX idx_gv_sysmetric_metric_name ON gv$sysmetric(metric_name);"], "sql": "SELECT
  c.inst_id,
  m.end_time AS checktime,
  c.conn,
  c.activeconn,
  m.sqlthroughput,
  m.sqlavgtime,
  m.user_commits,
  m.user_rollbacks,
  m.user_commits + m.user_rollbacks AS transactioncount,
  m.transactionavgtime
FROM
  (
  WITH
   t1 AS (
  SELECT
  inst_id,
  COUNT(*) conn
  FROM
  gv$session
  WHERE
  TYPE = 'USER'
  GROUP BY
  inst_id
   ),
   t2 AS (
  SELECT
  inst_id,
  COUNT(*) activeconn
  FROM
  gv$session
  WHERE
  TYPE = 'USER'
  AND status = 'ACTIVE'
  GROUP BY
  inst_id
   )
  SELECT
   t1.inst_id,
   t1.conn,
   t2.activeconn
  FROM
   t1,
   t2
  WHERE
   t1.inst_id = t2.inst_id
  ) c,
  (
  SELECT
   *
  FROM
   (
  SELECT
  inst_id,
  end_time,
  metric_name,
  round(VALUE, 2) VALUE
  FROM
  gv$sysmetric
  WHERE
  round(intsize_csec / 100, 0) = 60
  AND metric_name IN (
   'Executions Per Sec',
   'User Commits Per Sec',
   'User Rollbacks Per Sec'
  )
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
  inst_id,
  end_time,
  metric_name,
  round(VALUE * 10, 2) VALUE
  FROM
  gv$sysmetric
  WHERE
  round(intsize_csec / 100, 0) = 60
  AND metric_name IN (
   'SQL Service Response Time',
   'Response Time Per Txn'
  )
   ) PIVOT (
  AVG(VALUE) FOR metric_name IN (
  'Executions Per Sec' sqlthroughput,
  'SQL Service Response Time' sqlavgtime,
  'User Commits Per Sec' user_commits,
  'User Rollbacks Per Sec' user_rollbacks,
  'Response Time Per Txn' transactionavgtime
  )
   )
  ) m
WHERE
  c.inst_id = m.inst_id
ORDER BY
  inst_id", "explain": "ID	PLAN_STEP	COST	CARDINALITY	BYTES	CPU_COST	IO_COST

case_datas.mode_question:
You are a database expert in SQL performance optimization.
Given the table definitions, explain output and the original SQL, apply appropriate optimizations.
Output only the optimized SQL as a single-line statement with no markdown or extra text.

## Table Definitions:
CREATE SEQUENCE gv_session_seq; CREATE TABLE gv$session (session_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, inst_id NUMBER NOT NULL, TYPE VARCHAR2(20) NOT NULL, status VARCHAR2(20)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER gv_session_bi BEFORE INSERT ON gv$session FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.session_id IS NULL THEN SELECT gv_session_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.session_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_gv_session_inst_id ON gv$session(inst_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_gv_session_type_status ON gv$session(TYPE, status);
CREATE SEQUENCE gv_sysmetric_seq; CREATE TABLE gv$sysmetric (metric_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, inst_id NUMBER NOT NULL, end_time TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, metric_name VARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL, VALUE NUMBER(20,2), intsize_csec NUMBER); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER gv_sysmetric_bi BEFORE INSERT ON gv$sysmetric FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.metric_id IS NULL THEN SELECT gv_sysmetric_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.metric_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_gv_sysmetric_inst_id ON gv$sysmetric(inst_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_gv_sysmetric_intsize ON gv$sysmetric(intsize_csec);
CREATE INDEX idx_gv_sysmetric_metric_name ON gv$sysmetric(metric_name);
В·В·

## Original SQL:
SELECT
  c.inst_id,
  m.end_time AS checktime,
  c.conn,
  c.activeconn,
  m.sqlthroughput,
  m.sqlavgtime,
  m.user_commits,
  m.user_rollbacks,
  m.user_commits + m.user_rollbacks AS transactioncount,
  m.transactionavgtime
FROM
  (
  WITH
   t1 AS (
  SELECT
  inst_id,
  COUNT(*) conn
  FROM
  gv$session
  WHERE
  TYPE = 'USER'
  GROUP BY
  inst_id
   ),
   t2 AS (
  SELECT
  inst_id,
  COUNT(*) activeconn
  FROM
  gv$session
  WHERE
  TYPE = 'USER'
  AND status = 'ACTIVE'
  GROUP BY
  inst_id
   )
  SELECT
   t1.inst_id,
   t1.conn,
   t2.activeconn
  FROM
   t1,
   t2
  WHERE
   t1.inst_id = t2.inst_id
  ) c,
  (
  SELECT
   *
  FROM
   (
  SELECT
  inst_id,
  end_time,
  metric_name,
  round(VALUE, 2) VALUE
  FROM
  gv$sysmetric
  WHERE
  round(intsize_csec / 100, 0) = 60
  AND metric_name IN (
   'Executions Per Sec',
   'User Commits Per Sec',
   'User Rollbacks Per Sec'
  )
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
  inst_id,
  end_time,
  metric_name,
  round(VALUE * 10, 2) VALUE
  FROM
  gv$sysmetric
  WHERE
  round(intsize_csec / 100, 0) = 60
  AND metric_name IN (
   'SQL Service Response Time',
   'Response Time Per Txn'
  )
   ) PIVOT (
  AVG(VALUE) FOR metric_name IN (
  'Executions Per Sec' sqlthroughput,
  'SQL Service Response Time' sqlavgtime,
  'User Commits Per Sec' user_commits,
  'User Rollbacks Per Sec' user_rollbacks,
  'Response Time Per Txn' transactionavgtime
  )
   )
  ) m
WHERE
  c.inst_id = m.inst_id
ORDER BY
  inst_id

model_answers.model_answer: SELECT c.inst_id, m.end_time AS checktime, c.conn, c.activeconn, m.sqlthroughput, m.sqlavgtime, m.user_commits, m.user_rollbacks, m.user_commits + m.user_rollbacks AS transactioncount, m.transactionavgtime FROM ( SELECT inst_id, COUNT(*) conn, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 END) activeconn FROM gv$session WHERE TYPE = 'USER' GROUP BY inst_id ) c, ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT inst_id, end_time, metric_name, CASE WHEN metric_name IN ('SQL Service Response Time', 'Response Time Per Txn') THEN round(VALUE * 10, 2) ELSE round(VALUE, 2) END VALUE FROM gv$sysmetric WHERE intsize_csec BETWEEN 5950 AND 6049 AND metric_name IN ('Executions Per Sec', 'User Commits Per Sec', 'User Rollbacks Per Sec', 'SQL Service Response Time', 'Response Time Per Txn') ) PIVOT ( AVG(VALUE) FOR metric_name IN ('Executions Per Sec' sqlthroughput, 'SQL Service Response Time' sqlavgtime, 'User Commits Per Sec' user_commits, 'User Rollbacks Per Sec' user_rollbacks, 'Response Time Per Txn' transactionavgtime) ) ) m WHERE c.inst_id = m.inst_id ORDER BY c.inst_id

WITH acctg AS (SELECT A.tenant_id, A.gl_account_id, B.acctg_period, sum(A.base_posted_dr) AS base_posted_dr1, sum(A.base_posted_cr) AS base_posted_cr1 FROM acctg_trans_detail A LEFT JOIN acctg_trans B ON A.master_voucher_id = B.id AND B.tenant_id = 1065587309019136 AND (B.bo_name IS NULL OR B.bo_name != 'DraftAcctgTrans') WHERE A.tenant_id = 1065587309019136 AND (A.voucher_status_enum IS NULL OR A.voucher_status_enum != 'CANCELLED') GROUP BY A.tenant_id, A.gl_account_id, B.acctg_period) SELECT acctg.tenant_id, acctg.gl_account_id, ac.code, acctg.acctg_period, A.base_posted_dr, A.base_posted_cr, acctg.base_posted_dr1, acctg.base_posted_cr1 FROM acctg LEFT JOIN gl_account_balance A ON A.gl_account_id = acctg.gl_account_id AND A.acctg_period = acctg.acctg_period AND A.tenant_id = 1065587309019136 LEFT JOIN gl_account ac ON ac.id = acctg.gl_account_id AND ac.tenant_id = 1065587309019136 WHERE acctg.base_posted_dr1 != ifnull(A.base_posted_dr, 0) OR acctg.base_posted_cr1 != ifnull(A.base_posted_cr, 0) UNION SELECT A.tenant_id, A.gl_account_id, ac.code, A.acctg_period, A.base_posted_dr, A.base_posted_cr, acctg.base_posted_dr1, acctg.base_posted_cr1 FROM gl_account_balance A LEFT JOIN acctg ON acctg.gl_account_id = A.gl_account_id AND acctg.acctg_period = A.acctg_period AND acctg.tenant_id = A.tenant_id LEFT JOIN gl_account ac ON ac.id = A.gl_account_id AND ac.tenant_id = 1065587309019136 WHERE A.tenant_id = 1065587309019136 AND A.acctg_period NOT LIKE '%00' AND (A.base_posted_dr != ifnull(acctg.base_posted_dr1, 0) OR A.base_posted_cr != ifnull(acctg.base_posted_cr1, 0)) LIMIT 50001;

	'иҝһз»ӯеңЁеҪ“еүҚеҚ•дҪҚеҸӮдҝқ5е№ҙд»ҘдёҠ',
	c.aac147,
	'жҳҜ',
	'иҝһз»ӯеңЁеҪ“еүҚеҚ•дҪҚеҸӮдҝқ5е№ҙд»ҘдёҠ'
from
	dwd_csi_ac02 a,
	(
	select
		(fun_addmonth(to_char(current_timestamp, 'yyyymm')::varchar,-61)|| '31')::numeric aac030,
		 fun_addmonth(to_char(current_timestamp, 'yyyymm')::varchar,-61)::numeric aae041,
		to_char(current_timestamp, 'yyyymm')::numeric aae042) b,
	dwd_hrss_ac99 c
where a.aac001::varchar = c.aac001::varchar
	and a.aae140 = '110'
	and a.aac008 = '1'
	and a.aac031 = '1'
	and a.aac030 <= b.aac030
	and a.aae041 <= b.aae041
	and coalesce(a.aae042, 999912) >= b.aae042
	and c.aac147 is not null limit 1

## Original SQL:
select
	'lxzdqdwjf5nys',
	'иҝһз»ӯеңЁеҪ“еүҚеҚ•дҪҚеҸӮдҝқ5е№ҙд»ҘдёҠ',
	c.aac147,
	'жҳҜ',
	'иҝһз»ӯеңЁеҪ“еүҚеҚ•дҪҚеҸӮдҝқ5е№ҙд»ҘдёҠ'
from
	dwd_csi_ac02 a,
	(
	select
		(fun_addmonth(to_char(current_timestamp, 'yyyymm')::varchar,-61)|| '31')::numeric aac030,
		 fun_addmonth(to_char(current_timestamp, 'yyyymm')::varchar,-61)::numeric aae041,
		to_char(current_timestamp, 'yyyymm')::numeric aae042) b,
	dwd_hrss_ac99 c
where a.aac001::varchar = c.aac001::varchar
	and a.aae140 = '110'
	and a.aac008 = '1'
	and a.aac031 = '1'
	and a.aac030 <= b.aac030
	and a.aae041 <= b.aae041
	and coalesce(a.aae042, 999912) >= b.aae042
	and c.aac147 is not null limit 1

{"case_id": "28", "db_type": "oracle", "description": "дё»иҰҒдёӨж–№йқўдјҳеҢ–пјҡ1) ж¶ҲйҷӨдәҶеӯҗжҹҘиҜўдёӯи®Ўз®—дҪҶд»ҺжңӘдҪҝз”Ёзҡ„first_tran_dateеӯ—ж®өпјҢеҮҸе°‘дәҶдёҖж¬Ўmin()иҒҡеҗҲж“ҚдҪңпјӣ2) е°Ҷonhold_accountsиҝҷдёӘеҶ…иҒ”и§Ҷеӣҫеұ•ејҖпјҢзӣҙжҺҘеңЁдё»жҹҘиҜўдёӯJOIN audit_headerе’Ңaudit_detailиЎЁпјҢе№¶е°ҶиҝҮж»ӨжқЎд»¶з§»еҲ°WHEREеӯҗеҸҘдёӯгҖӮ", "create_table_statements": ["CREATE SEQUENCE accounts_seq; CREATE TABLE accounts (acc_account_no VARCHAR2(50), acc_subacc_no VARCHAR2(50), acc_incep_date DATE NOT NULL, acc_act_code VARCHAR2(20), acc_gact_type VARCHAR2(10), PRIMARY KEY (acc_account_no, acc_subacc_no)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER accounts_bi BEFORE INSERT ON accounts FOR EACH ROW BEGIN NULL; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_accounts_act_code ON accounts(acc_act_code);", "CREATE INDEX idx_accounts_gact_type ON accounts(acc_gact_type);", "CREATE INDEX idx_accounts_incep_date ON accounts(acc_incep_date);", "CREATE SEQUENCE account_headers_seq; CREATE TABLE account_headers (acch_account_no VARCHAR2(50) PRIMARY KEY, acch_title VARCHAR2(200), acch_brn_code VARCHAR2(20)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER account_headers_bi BEFORE INSERT ON account_headers FOR EACH ROW BEGIN NULL; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_acch_account_no ON account_headers(acch_account_no);", "CREATE SEQUENCE account_types_seq; CREATE TABLE account_types (act_code VARCHAR2(20) PRIMARY KEY, act_long_name VARCHAR2(100)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER account_types_bi BEFORE INSERT ON account_types FOR EACH ROW BEGIN NULL; END;", "CREATE SEQUENCE transactions_seq; CREATE TABLE transactions (tran_seqno NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, tran_account_no VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, tran_subacc_no VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, tran_date DATE NOT NULL, tran_amount_cr NUMBER(18,2), tran_trans_code VARCHAR2(20), tran_pay_method VARCHAR2(10), tran_create_by VARCHAR2(50)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER transactions_bi BEFORE INSERT ON transactions FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.tran_seqno IS NULL THEN SELECT transactions_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.tran_seqno FROM DUAL; END IF; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_trans_account_subacc ON transactions(tran_account_no, tran_subacc_no);", "CREATE INDEX idx_trans_date ON transactions(tran_date);", "CREATE INDEX idx_trans_trans_code ON transactions(tran_trans_code);", "CREATE INDEX idx_trans_pay_method ON transactions(tran_pay_method);", "CREATE SEQUENCE audit_header_seq; CREATE TABLE audit_header (audh_seqno NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, audh_key1 VARCHAR2(50), audh_key2 VARCHAR2(50), audh_date DATE, audh_table_prefix VARCHAR2(20), audh_change_type VARCHAR2(10)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER audit_header_bi BEFORE INSERT ON audit_header FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.audh_seqno IS NULL THEN SELECT audit_header_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.audh_seqno FROM DUAL; END IF; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_audh_keys ON audit_header(audh_key1, audh_key2);", "CREATE INDEX idx_audh_table_prefix ON audit_header(audh_table_prefix);", "CREATE INDEX idx_audh_change_type ON audit_header(audh_change_type);", "CREATE SEQUENCE audit_detail_seq; CREATE TABLE audit_detail (audd_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, audd_audh_seqno NUMBER NOT NULL, audd_col_sufix VARCHAR2(50), audd_old_value VARCHAR2(200), audd_new_value VARCHAR2(200)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER audit_detail_bi BEFORE INSERT ON audit_detail FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.audd_id IS NULL THEN SELECT audit_detail_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.audd_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_audd_audh_seqno ON audit_detail(audd_audh_seqno);", "CREATE INDEX idx_audd_col_sufix ON audit_detail(audd_col_sufix);", "CREATE SEQUENCE account_links_seq; CREATE TABLE ACCOUNT_LINKS (accl_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, accl_account_no VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, accl_subacc_no VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, accl_holder_pos NUMBER, accl_cust_seqno NUMBER); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER account_links_bi BEFORE INSERT ON ACCOUNT_LINKS FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.accl_id IS NULL THEN SELECT account_links_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.accl_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_accl_account_subacc ON ACCOUNT_LINKS(accl_account_no, accl_subacc_no);", "CREATE INDEX idx_accl_holder_pos ON ACCOUNT_LINKS(accl_holder_pos);", "CREATE SEQUENCE account_holding_tax_seq; CREATE TABLE SUMMIT.ACCOUNT_HOLDING_TAX (acctax_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, ACCTAX_ACCOUNT_NO VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, ACCTAX_SUBACC_NO VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, ACCTAX_CUST_SEQNO NUMBER, ACCTAX_EFF_DATE_FROM DATE); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER account_holding_tax_bi BEFORE INSERT ON SUMMIT.ACCOUNT_HOLDING_TAX FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.acctax_id IS NULL THEN SELECT account_holding_tax_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.acctax_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_acctax_composite ON SUMMIT.ACCOUNT_HOLDING_TAX(ACCTAX_ACCOUNT_NO, ACCTAX_SUBACC_NO, ACCTAX_CUST_SEQNO);"], "sql": "SELECT DISTINCT acc_account_no, 
  acc_subacc_no, 
  acch_title,
  to_char(acc_incep_date,'DD/MM/YYYY') acc_incep_date,
  htax.ACCTAX_EFF_DATE_FROM,
  to_char(onhold_accounts.audh_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') approved_date,
  act_long_name, 
  tran_amount_cr,
  tran_create_by,
  CASE WHEN (trunc(acc_incep_date) - trunc(onhold_accounts.audh_date)) < 0 THEN 0 ELSE
   (trunc(acc_incep_date) - trunc(onhold_accounts.audh_date)) END time_on_approved,
  acch_brn_code
  FROM
  (
   (
  SELECT accounts.acc_account_no,
   acch_title, 
   accounts.acc_subacc_no,
   acc_incep_date,
   act_long_name,
   tran_amount_cr,
   transactions.tran_create_by,
   first_tran_date,
   acch_brn_code
  FROM accounts 
  JOIN account_headers ON account_headers.acch_account_no = accounts.acc_account_no
  JOIN account_types ON acc_act_code = act_code
  JOIN 
   (
  SELECT tran_account_no, tran_subacc_no, min(tran_seqno) first_tran_seq, min(tran_date) first_tran_date
  FROM transactions
  WHERE tran_amount_cr IS NOT NULL
  AND tran_trans_code IN ('RIC','RSAV')
  AND tran_date BETWEEN IN_FUND_FROM_DATE AND IN_FUND_TO_DATE
  AND tran_pay_method not in ('C','CQ')   --Exclude cash and cheque receipts as those accounts will already have the passbook.
  GROUP BY tran_account_no, tran_subacc_no
   ) first_trans
   ON tran_account_no = acc_account_no AND tran_subacc_no = acc_subacc_no
  JOIN transactions ON tran_seqno = first_trans.first_tran_seq
  WHERE acc_gact_type IN ('S', 'IC') 
   AND acc_incep_date BETWEEN IN_INCEP_FROM_DATE and IN_INCEP_TO_DATE
   ) opened_accounts
   JOIN
   (
  SELECT audh_key1, audh_key2, audh_date, audd_old_value, audd_new_value
  FROM audit_header
  JOIN audit_detail
   ON audh_seqno = audd_audh_seqno
  WHERE audh_table_prefix = 'ACC'
   AND audd_col_sufix = 'PROCESS_STATUS'
   AND audh_change_type  = 'I'
   AND audd_old_value IS NULL 
   AND audd_new_value = 1
   ) onhold_accounts
  ON opened_accounts.acc_account_no = onhold_accounts.audh_key1
   AND opened_accounts.acc_subacc_no = onhold_accounts.audh_key2
   JOIN ACCOUNT_LINKS al ON al.accl_account_no = opened_accounts.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO and al.accl_subacc_no = opened_accounts.ACC_SUBACC_NO and al.accl_holder_pos = 1
   JOIN SUMMIT.ACCOUNT_HOLDING_TAX htax 
  ON htax.ACCTAX_ACCOUNT_NO = al.ACCL_ACCOUNT_NO
   AND htax.ACCTAX_SUBACC_NO = al.ACCL_SUBACC_NO
   AND htax.ACCTAX_CUST_SEQNO = al.ACCL_CUST_SEQNO
  )", "explain": "ID	PLAN_STEP	COST	CARDINALITY	BYTES	CPU_COST	IO_COST

case_datas.mode_question:
You are a database expert in SQL performance optimization.
Given the table definitions, explain output and the original SQL, apply appropriate optimizations.
Output only the optimized SQL as a single-line statement with no markdown or extra text.

## Table Definitions:
CREATE SEQUENCE accounts_seq; CREATE TABLE accounts (acc_account_no VARCHAR2(50), acc_subacc_no VARCHAR2(50), acc_incep_date DATE NOT NULL, acc_act_code VARCHAR2(20), acc_gact_type VARCHAR2(10), PRIMARY KEY (acc_account_no, acc_subacc_no)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER accounts_bi BEFORE INSERT ON accounts FOR EACH ROW BEGIN NULL; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_accounts_act_code ON accounts(acc_act_code);
CREATE INDEX idx_accounts_gact_type ON accounts(acc_gact_type);
CREATE INDEX idx_accounts_incep_date ON accounts(acc_incep_date);
CREATE SEQUENCE account_headers_seq; CREATE TABLE account_headers (acch_account_no VARCHAR2(50) PRIMARY KEY, acch_title VARCHAR2(200), acch_brn_code VARCHAR2(20)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER account_headers_bi BEFORE INSERT ON account_headers FOR EACH ROW BEGIN NULL; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_acch_account_no ON account_headers(acch_account_no);
CREATE SEQUENCE account_types_seq; CREATE TABLE account_types (act_code VARCHAR2(20) PRIMARY KEY, act_long_name VARCHAR2(100)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER account_types_bi BEFORE INSERT ON account_types FOR EACH ROW BEGIN NULL; END;
CREATE SEQUENCE transactions_seq; CREATE TABLE transactions (tran_seqno NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, tran_account_no VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, tran_subacc_no VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, tran_date DATE NOT NULL, tran_amount_cr NUMBER(18,2), tran_trans_code VARCHAR2(20), tran_pay_method VARCHAR2(10), tran_create_by VARCHAR2(50)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER transactions_bi BEFORE INSERT ON transactions FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.tran_seqno IS NULL THEN SELECT transactions_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.tran_seqno FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_trans_account_subacc ON transactions(tran_account_no, tran_subacc_no);
CREATE INDEX idx_trans_date ON transactions(tran_date);
CREATE INDEX idx_trans_trans_code ON transactions(tran_trans_code);
CREATE INDEX idx_trans_pay_method ON transactions(tran_pay_method);
CREATE SEQUENCE audit_header_seq; CREATE TABLE audit_header (audh_seqno NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, audh_key1 VARCHAR2(50), audh_key2 VARCHAR2(50), audh_date DATE, audh_table_prefix VARCHAR2(20), audh_change_type VARCHAR2(10)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER audit_header_bi BEFORE INSERT ON audit_header FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.audh_seqno IS NULL THEN SELECT audit_header_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.audh_seqno FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_audh_keys ON audit_header(audh_key1, audh_key2);
CREATE INDEX idx_audh_table_prefix ON audit_header(audh_table_prefix);
CREATE INDEX idx_audh_change_type ON audit_header(audh_change_type);
CREATE SEQUENCE audit_detail_seq; CREATE TABLE audit_detail (audd_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, audd_audh_seqno NUMBER NOT NULL, audd_col_sufix VARCHAR2(50), audd_old_value VARCHAR2(200), audd_new_value VARCHAR2(200)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER audit_detail_bi BEFORE INSERT ON audit_detail FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.audd_id IS NULL THEN SELECT audit_detail_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.audd_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_audd_audh_seqno ON audit_detail(audd_audh_seqno);
CREATE INDEX idx_audd_col_sufix ON audit_detail(audd_col_sufix);
CREATE SEQUENCE account_links_seq; CREATE TABLE ACCOUNT_LINKS (accl_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, accl_account_no VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, accl_subacc_no VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, accl_holder_pos NUMBER, accl_cust_seqno NUMBER); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER account_links_bi BEFORE INSERT ON ACCOUNT_LINKS FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.accl_id IS NULL THEN SELECT account_links_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.accl_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_accl_account_subacc ON ACCOUNT_LINKS(accl_account_no, accl_subacc_no);
CREATE INDEX idx_accl_holder_pos ON ACCOUNT_LINKS(accl_holder_pos);
CREATE SEQUENCE account_holding_tax_seq; CREATE TABLE SUMMIT.ACCOUNT_HOLDING_TAX (acctax_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, ACCTAX_ACCOUNT_NO VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, ACCTAX_SUBACC_NO VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, ACCTAX_CUST_SEQNO NUMBER, ACCTAX_EFF_DATE_FROM DATE); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER account_holding_tax_bi BEFORE INSERT ON SUMMIT.ACCOUNT_HOLDING_TAX FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.acctax_id IS NULL THEN SELECT account_holding_tax_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.acctax_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_acctax_composite ON SUMMIT.ACCOUNT_HOLDING_TAX(ACCTAX_ACCOUNT_NO, ACCTAX_SUBACC_NO, ACCTAX_CUST_SEQNO);
В·В·

## Original SQL:
SELECT DISTINCT acc_account_no, 
  acc_subacc_no, 
  acch_title,
  to_char(acc_incep_date,'DD/MM/YYYY') acc_incep_date,
  htax.ACCTAX_EFF_DATE_FROM,
  to_char(onhold_accounts.audh_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') approved_date,
  act_long_name, 
  tran_amount_cr,
  tran_create_by,
  CASE WHEN (trunc(acc_incep_date) - trunc(onhold_accounts.audh_date)) < 0 THEN 0 ELSE
   (trunc(acc_incep_date) - trunc(onhold_accounts.audh_date)) END time_on_approved,
  acch_brn_code
  FROM
  (
   (
  SELECT accounts.acc_account_no,
   acch_title, 
   accounts.acc_subacc_no,
   acc_incep_date,
   act_long_name,
   tran_amount_cr,
   transactions.tran_create_by,
   first_tran_date,
   acch_brn_code
  FROM accounts 
  JOIN account_headers ON account_headers.acch_account_no = accounts.acc_account_no
  JOIN account_types ON acc_act_code = act_code
  JOIN 
   (
  SELECT tran_account_no, tran_subacc_no, min(tran_seqno) first_tran_seq, min(tran_date) first_tran_date
  FROM transactions
  WHERE tran_amount_cr IS NOT NULL
  AND tran_trans_code IN ('RIC','RSAV')
  AND tran_date BETWEEN IN_FUND_FROM_DATE AND IN_FUND_TO_DATE
  AND tran_pay_method not in ('C','CQ')   --Exclude cash and cheque receipts as those accounts will already have the passbook.
  GROUP BY tran_account_no, tran_subacc_no
   ) first_trans
   ON tran_account_no = acc_account_no AND tran_subacc_no = acc_subacc_no
  JOIN transactions ON tran_seqno = first_trans.first_tran_seq
  WHERE acc_gact_type IN ('S', 'IC') 
   AND acc_incep_date BETWEEN IN_INCEP_FROM_DATE and IN_INCEP_TO_DATE
   ) opened_accounts
   JOIN
   (
  SELECT audh_key1, audh_key2, audh_date, audd_old_value, audd_new_value
  FROM audit_header
  JOIN audit_detail
   ON audh_seqno = audd_audh_seqno
  WHERE audh_table_prefix = 'ACC'
   AND audd_col_sufix = 'PROCESS_STATUS'
   AND audh_change_type  = 'I'
   AND audd_old_value IS NULL 
   AND audd_new_value = 1
   ) onhold_accounts
  ON opened_accounts.acc_account_no = onhold_accounts.audh_key1
   AND opened_accounts.acc_subacc_no = onhold_accounts.audh_key2
   JOIN ACCOUNT_LINKS al ON al.accl_account_no = opened_accounts.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO and al.accl_subacc_no = opened_accounts.ACC_SUBACC_NO and al.accl_holder_pos = 1
   JOIN SUMMIT.ACCOUNT_HOLDING_TAX htax 
  ON htax.ACCTAX_ACCOUNT_NO = al.ACCL_ACCOUNT_NO
   AND htax.ACCTAX_SUBACC_NO = al.ACCL_SUBACC_NO
   AND htax.ACCTAX_CUST_SEQNO = al.ACCL_CUST_SEQNO
  )

case_datas.mode_question:
You are a database expert in SQL performance optimization.
Given the table definitions, explain output and the original SQL, apply appropriate optimizations.
Output only the optimized SQL as a single-line statement with no markdown or extra text.

## Table Definitions:
CREATE SEQUENCE accounts_seq; CREATE TABLE accounts (acc_account_no VARCHAR2(50), acc_subacc_no VARCHAR2(50), acc_incep_date DATE NOT NULL, acc_act_code VARCHAR2(20), acc_gact_type VARCHAR2(10), PRIMARY KEY (acc_account_no, acc_subacc_no)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER accounts_bi BEFORE INSERT ON accounts FOR EACH ROW BEGIN NULL; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_accounts_act_code ON accounts(acc_act_code);
CREATE INDEX idx_accounts_gact_type ON accounts(acc_gact_type);
CREATE INDEX idx_accounts_incep_date ON accounts(acc_incep_date);
CREATE SEQUENCE account_headers_seq; CREATE TABLE account_headers (acch_account_no VARCHAR2(50) PRIMARY KEY, acch_title VARCHAR2(200), acch_brn_code VARCHAR2(20)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER account_headers_bi BEFORE INSERT ON account_headers FOR EACH ROW BEGIN NULL; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_acch_account_no ON account_headers(acch_account_no);
CREATE SEQUENCE account_types_seq; CREATE TABLE account_types (act_code VARCHAR2(20) PRIMARY KEY, act_long_name VARCHAR2(100)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER account_types_bi BEFORE INSERT ON account_types FOR EACH ROW BEGIN NULL; END;
CREATE SEQUENCE transactions_seq; CREATE TABLE transactions (tran_seqno NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, tran_account_no VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, tran_subacc_no VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, tran_date DATE NOT NULL, tran_amount_cr NUMBER(18,2), tran_trans_code VARCHAR2(20), tran_pay_method VARCHAR2(10), tran_create_by VARCHAR2(50)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER transactions_bi BEFORE INSERT ON transactions FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.tran_seqno IS NULL THEN SELECT transactions_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.tran_seqno FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_trans_account_subacc ON transactions(tran_account_no, tran_subacc_no);
CREATE INDEX idx_trans_date ON transactions(tran_date);
CREATE INDEX idx_trans_trans_code ON transactions(tran_trans_code);
CREATE INDEX idx_trans_pay_method ON transactions(tran_pay_method);
CREATE SEQUENCE audit_header_seq; CREATE TABLE audit_header (audh_seqno NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, audh_key1 VARCHAR2(50), audh_key2 VARCHAR2(50), audh_date DATE, audh_table_prefix VARCHAR2(20), audh_change_type VARCHAR2(10)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER audit_header_bi BEFORE INSERT ON audit_header FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.audh_seqno IS NULL THEN SELECT audit_header_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.audh_seqno FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_audh_keys ON audit_header(audh_key1, audh_key2);
CREATE INDEX idx_audh_table_prefix ON audit_header(audh_table_prefix);
CREATE INDEX idx_audh_change_type ON audit_header(audh_change_type);

## Original SQL:
SELECT DISTINCT acc_account_no, 
  acc_subacc_no, 
  acch_title,
  to_char(acc_incep_date,'DD/MM/YYYY') acc_incep_date,
  htax.ACCTAX_EFF_DATE_FROM,
  to_char(onhold_accounts.audh_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') approved_date,
  act_long_name, 
  tran_amount_cr,
  tran_create_by,
  CASE WHEN (trunc(acc_incep_date) - trunc(onhold_accounts.audh_date)) < 0 THEN 0 ELSE
   (trunc(acc_incep_date) - trunc(onhold_accounts.audh_date)) END time_on_approved,
  acch_brn_code
  FROM
  (
   (
  SELECT accounts.acc_account_no,
   acch_title, 
   accounts.acc_subacc_no,
   acc_incep_date,
   act_long_name,
   tran_amount_cr,
   transactions.tran_create_by,
   first_tran_date,
   acch_brn_code
  FROM accounts 
  JOIN account_headers ON account_headers.acch_account_no = accounts.acc_account_no
  JOIN account_types ON acc_act_code = act_code
  JOIN 
   (
  SELECT tran_account_no, tran_subacc_no, min(tran_seqno) first_tran_seq, min(tran_date) first_tran_date
  FROM transactions
  WHERE tran_amount_cr IS NOT NULL
  AND tran_trans_code IN ('RIC','RSAV')
  AND tran_date BETWEEN IN_FUND_FROM_DATE AND IN_FUND_TO_DATE
  AND tran_pay_method not in ('C','CQ')   --Exclude cash and cheque receipts as those accounts will already have the passbook.
  GROUP BY tran_account_no, tran_subacc_no
   ) first_trans
   ON tran_account_no = acc_account_no AND tran_subacc_no = acc_subacc_no
  JOIN transactions ON tran_seqno = first_trans.first_tran_seq
  WHERE acc_gact_type IN ('S', 'IC') 
   AND acc_incep_date BETWEEN IN_INCEP_FROM_DATE and IN_INCEP_TO_DATE
   ) opened_accounts
   JOIN
   (
  SELECT audh_key1, audh_key2, audh_date, audd_old_value, audd_new_value
  FROM audit_header
  JOIN audit_detail
   ON audh_seqno = audd_audh_seqno
  WHERE audh_table_prefix = 'ACC'
   AND audd_col_sufix = 'PROCESS_STATUS'
   AND audh_change_type  = 'I'
   AND audd_old_value IS NULL 
   AND audd_new_value = 1
   ) onhold_accounts
  ON opened_accounts.acc_account_no = onhold_accounts.audh_key1
   AND opened_accounts.acc_subacc_no = onhold_accounts.audh_key2
   JOIN ACCOUNT_LINKS al ON al.accl_account_no = opened_accounts.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO and al.accl_subacc_no = opened_accounts.ACC_SUBACC_NO and al.accl_holder_pos = 1
   JOIN SUMMIT.ACCOUNT_HOLDING_TAX htax 
  ON htax.ACCTAX_ACCOUNT_NO = al.ACCL_ACCOUNT_NO
   AND htax.ACCTAX_SUBACC_NO = al.ACCL_SUBACC_NO
   AND htax.ACCTAX_CUST_SEQNO = al.ACCL_CUST_SEQNO
  )

trunc(onhold_accounts.audh_date)) < 0 THEN 0 ELSE (trunc(acc_incep_date) - trunc(onhold_accounts.audh_date)) END time_on_approved, acch_brn_code FROM ( ( SELECT accounts.acc_account_no, acch_title, accounts.acc_subacc_no, acc_incep_date, act_long_name, tran_amount_cr, transactions.tran_create_by, first_tran_date, acch_brn_code FROM accounts JOIN account_headers ON account_headers.acch_account_no = accounts.acc_account_no JOIN account_types ON acc_act_code = act_code JOIN ( SELECT tran_account_no, tran_subacc_no, min(tran_seqno) first_tran_seq, min(tran_date) first_tran_date FROM transactions WHERE tran_amount_cr IS NOT NULL AND tran_trans_code IN ('RIC','RSAV') AND tran_date BETWEEN IN_FUND_FROM_DATE AND IN_FUND_TO_DATE AND tran_pay_method not in ('C','CQ') GROUP BY tran_account_no, tran_subacc_no ) first_trans ON tran_account_no = acc_account_no AND tran_subacc_no = acc_subacc_no JOIN transactions ON tran_seqno = first_trans.first_tran_seq WHERE acc_gact_type IN ('S', 'IC') AND acc_incep_date BETWEEN IN_INCEP_FROM_DATE and IN_INCEP_TO_DATE ) opened_accounts JOIN ( SELECT audh_key1, audh_key2, audh_date FROM audit_header JOIN audit_detail ON audh_seqno = audd_audh_seqno WHERE audh_table_prefix = 'ACC' AND audd_col_sufix = 'PROCESS_STATUS' AND audh_change_type = 'I' AND audd_old_value IS NULL AND audd_new_value = 1 ) onhold_accounts ON opened_accounts.acc_account_no = onhold_accounts.audh_key1 AND opened_accounts.acc_subacc_no = onhold_accounts.audh_key2 JOIN ACCOUNT_LINKS al ON al.accl_account_no = opened_accounts.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO and al.accl_subacc_no = opened_accounts.ACC_SUBACC_NO and al.accl_holder_pos = 1 JOIN SUMMIT.ACCOUNT_HOLDING_TAX htax ON htax.ACCTAX_ACCOUNT_NO = al.ACCL_ACCOUNT_NO AND htax.ACCTAX_SUBACC_NO = al.ACCL_SUBACC_NO AND htax.ACCTAX_CUST_SEQNO = al.ACCL_CUST_SEQNO )

case_datas.mode_question:
You are a database expert in SQL performance optimization.
Given the table definitions, explain output and the original SQL, apply appropriate optimizations.
Output only the optimized SQL as a single-line statement with no markdown or extra text.

## Table Definitions:
CREATE SEQUENCE accounts_seq; CREATE TABLE accounts (acc_account_no VARCHAR2(50), acc_subacc_no VARCHAR2(50), acc_incep_date DATE NOT NULL, acc_act_code VARCHAR2(20), acc_gact_type VARCHAR2(10), PRIMARY KEY (acc_account_no, acc_subacc_no)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER accounts_bi BEFORE INSERT ON accounts FOR EACH ROW BEGIN NULL; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_accounts_act_code ON accounts(acc_act_code);
CREATE INDEX idx_accounts_gact_type ON accounts(acc_gact_type);
CREATE INDEX idx_accounts_incep_date ON accounts(acc_incep_date);
CREATE SEQUENCE account_headers_seq; CREATE TABLE account_headers (acch_account_no VARCHAR2(50) PRIMARY KEY, acch_title VARCHAR2(200), acch_brn_code VARCHAR2(20)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER account_headers_bi BEFORE INSERT ON account_headers FOR EACH ROW BEGIN NULL; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_acch_account_no ON account_headers(acch_account_no);
CREATE SEQUENCE account_types_seq; CREATE TABLE account_types (act_code VARCHAR2(20) PRIMARY KEY, act_long_name VARCHAR2(100)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER account_types_bi BEFORE INSERT ON account_types FOR EACH ROW BEGIN NULL; END;
CREATE SEQUENCE transactions_seq; CREATE TABLE transactions (tran_seqno NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, tran_account_no VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, tran_subacc_no VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, tran_date DATE NOT NULL, tran_amount_cr NUMBER(18,2), tran_trans_code VARCHAR2(20), tran_pay_method VARCHAR2(10), tran_create_by VARCHAR2(50)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER transactions_bi BEFORE INSERT ON transactions FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.tran_seqno IS NULL THEN SELECT transactions_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.tran_seqno FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_trans_account_subacc ON transactions(tran_account_no, tran_subacc_no);
CREATE INDEX idx_trans_date ON transactions(tran_date);
CREATE INDEX idx_trans_trans_code ON transactions(tran_trans_code);
CREATE INDEX idx_trans_pay_method ON transactions(tran_pay_method);
CREATE SEQUENCE audit_header_seq; CREATE TABLE audit_header (audh_seqno NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, audh_key1 VARCHAR2(50), audh_key2 VARCHAR2(50), audh_date DATE, audh_table_prefix VARCHAR2(20), audh_change_type VARCHAR2(10)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER audit_header_bi BEFORE INSERT ON audit_header FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.audh_seqno IS NULL THEN SELECT audit_header_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.audh_seqno FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_audh_keys ON audit_header(audh_key1, audh_key2);
CREATE INDEX idx_audh_table_prefix ON audit_header(audh_table_prefix);
CREATE INDEX idx_audh_change_type ON audit_header(audh_change_type);
CREATE SEQUENCE audit_detail_seq; CREATE TABLE audit_detail (audd_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, audd_audh_seqno NUMBER NOT NULL, audd_col_sufix VARCHAR2(50), audd_old_value VARCHAR2(200), audd_new_value VARCHAR2(200)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER audit_detail_bi BEFORE INSERT ON audit_detail FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.audd_id IS NULL THEN SELECT audit_detail_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.audd_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_audd_audh_seqno ON audit_detail(audd_audh_seqno);
CREATE INDEX idx_audd_col_sufix ON audit_detail(audd_col_sufix);
CREATE SEQUENCE account_links_seq; CREATE TABLE ACCOUNT_LINKS (accl_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, accl_account_no VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, accl_subacc_no VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, accl_holder_pos NUMBER, accl_cust_seqno NUMBER); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER account_links_bi BEFORE INSERT ON ACCOUNT_LINKS FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.accl_id IS NULL THEN SELECT account_links_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.accl_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_accl_account_subacc ON ACCOUNT_LINKS(accl_account_no, accl_subacc_no);
CREATE INDEX idx_accl_holder_pos ON ACCOUNT_LINKS(accl_holder_pos);
CREATE SEQUENCE account_holding_tax_seq; CREATE TABLE SUMMIT.ACCOUNT_HOLDING_TAX (acctax_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, ACCTAX_ACCOUNT_NO VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, ACCTAX_SUBACC_NO VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, ACCTAX_CUST_SEQNO NUMBER, ACCTAX_EFF_DATE_FROM DATE); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER account_holding_tax_bi BEFORE INSERT ON SUMMIT.ACCOUNT_HOLDING_TAX FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.acctax_id IS NULL THEN SELECT account_holding_tax_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.acctax_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_acctax_composite ON SUMMIT.ACCOUNT_HOLDING_TAX(ACCTAX_ACCOUNT_NO, ACCTAX_SUBACC_NO, ACCTAX_CUST_SEQNO);

## Original SQL:
SELECT DISTINCT acc_account_no, 
  acc_subacc_no, 
  acch_title,
  to_char(acc_incep_date,'DD/MM/YYYY') acc_incep_date,
  htax.ACCTAX_EFF_DATE_FROM,
  to_char(onhold_accounts.audh_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') approved_date,
  act_long_name, 
  tran_amount_cr,
  tran_create_by,
  CASE WHEN (trunc(acc_incep_date) - trunc(onhold_accounts.audh_date)) < 0 THEN 0 ELSE
   (trunc(acc_incep_date) - trunc(onhold_accounts.audh_date)) END time_on_approved,
  acch_brn_code
  FROM
  (
   (
  SELECT accounts.acc_account_no,
   acch_title, 
   accounts.acc_subacc_no,
   acc_incep_date,
   act_long_name,
   tran_amount_cr,
   transactions.tran_create_by,
   first_tran_date,
   acch_brn_code
  FROM accounts 
  JOIN account_headers ON account_headers.acch_account_no = accounts.acc_account_no
  JOIN account_types ON acc_act_code = act_code
  JOIN 
   (
  SELECT tran_account_no, tran_subacc_no, min(tran_seqno) first_tran_seq, min(tran_date) first_tran_date
  FROM transactions
  WHERE tran_amount_cr IS NOT NULL
  AND tran_trans_code IN ('RIC','RSAV')
  AND tran_date BETWEEN IN_FUND_FROM_DATE AND IN_FUND_TO_DATE
  AND tran_pay_method not in ('C','CQ')   --Exclude cash and cheque receipts as those accounts will already have the passbook.
  GROUP BY tran_account_no, tran_subacc_no
   ) first_trans
   ON tran_account_no = acc_account_no AND tran_subacc_no = acc_subacc_no
  JOIN transactions ON tran_seqno = first_trans.first_tran_seq
  WHERE acc_gact_type IN ('S', 'IC') 
   AND acc_incep_date BETWEEN IN_INCEP_FROM_DATE and IN_INCEP_TO_DATE
   ) opened_accounts
   JOIN
   (
  SELECT audh_key1, audh_key2, audh_date, audd_old_value, audd_new_value
  FROM audit_header
  JOIN audit_detail
   ON audh_seqno = audd_audh_seqno
  WHERE audh_table_prefix = 'ACC'
   AND audd_col_sufix = 'PROCESS_STATUS'
   AND audh_change_type  = 'I'
   AND audd_old_value IS NULL 
   AND audd_new_value = 1
   ) onhold_accounts
  ON opened_accounts.acc_account_no = onhold_accounts.audh_key1
   AND opened_accounts.acc_subacc_no = onhold_accounts.audh_key2
   JOIN ACCOUNT_LINKS al ON al.accl_account_no = opened_accounts.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO and al.accl_subacc_no = opened_accounts.ACC_SUBACC_NO and al.accl_holder_pos = 1
   JOIN SUMMIT.ACCOUNT_HOLDING_TAX htax 
  ON htax.ACCTAX_ACCOUNT_NO = al.ACCL_ACCOUNT_NO
   AND htax.ACCTAX_SUBACC_NO = al.ACCL_SUBACC_NO
   AND htax.ACCTAX_CUST_SEQNO = al.ACCL_CUST_SEQNO
  )

## Optimized SQL:

model_answers.model_answer: SELECT DISTINCT acc_account_no, acc_subacc_no, acch_title, to_char(acc_incep_date,'DD/MM/YYYY') acc_incep_date, htax.ACCTAX_EFF_DATE_FROM, to_char(onhold_accounts.audh_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') approved_date, act_long_name, tran_amount_cr, tran_create_by, CASE WHEN (trunc(acc_incep_date) - trunc(onhold_accounts.audh_date)) < 0 THEN 0 ELSE (trunc(acc_incep_date) - trunc(onhold_accounts.audh_date)) END time_on_approved, acch_brn_code FROM ( ( SELECT accounts.acc_account_no, acch_title, accounts.acc_subacc_no, acc_incep_date, act_long_name, tran_amount_cr, transactions.tran_create_by, first_tran_date, acch_brn_code FROM accounts JOIN account_headers ON account_headers.acch_account_no = accounts.acc_account_no JOIN account_types ON acc_act_code = act_code JOIN ( SELECT tran_account_no, tran_subacc_no, min(tran_seqno) first_tran_seq, min(tran_date) first_tran_date FROM transactions WHERE tran_amount_cr IS NOT NULL AND tran_trans_code IN ('RIC','RSAV') AND tran_date BETWEEN IN_FUND_FROM_DATE AND IN_FUND_TO_DATE AND tran_pay_method not in ('C','CQ') GROUP BY tran_account_no, tran_subacc_no ) first_trans ON tran_account_no = acc_account_no AND tran_subacc_no = acc_subacc_no JOIN transactions ON tran_seqno = first_trans.first_tran_seq WHERE acc_gact_type IN ('S', 'IC') AND acc_incep_date BETWEEN IN_INCEP_FROM_DATE and IN_INCEP_TO_DATE ) opened_accounts JOIN ( SELECT audh_key1, audh_key2, audh_date FROM audit_header JOIN audit_detail ON audh_seqno = audd_audh_seqno WHERE audh_table_prefix = 'ACC' AND audd_col_sufix = 'PROCESS_STATUS' AND audh_change_type = 'I' AND audd_old_value IS NULL AND audd_new_value = 1 ) onhold_accounts ON opened_accounts.acc_account_no = onhold_accounts.audh_key1 AND opened_accounts.acc_subacc_no = onhold_accounts.audh_key2 JOIN ACCOUNT_LINKS al ON al.accl_account_no = opened_accounts.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO and al.accl_subacc_no = opened_accounts.ACC_SUBACC_NO and al.accl_holder_pos = 1 JOIN SUMMIT.ACCOUNT_HOLDING_TAX htax ON htax.ACCTAX_ACCOUNT_NO = al.ACCL_ACCOUNT_NO AND htax.ACCTAX_SUBACC_NO = al.ACCL_SUBACC_NO AND htax.ACCTAX_CUST_SEQNO = al.ACCL_CUST_SEQNO )

{"case_id": "29", "db_type": "oracle", "description": "йҖҡиҝҮдёүдёӘж–№еҗ‘дјҳеҢ–пјҡ1пјүи°“иҜҚдјҳеҢ–пјҡе°ҶSUBSTRеҮҪж•°ж”№дёәLIKEи°“иҜҚд»Ҙдҫҝзҙўеј•жү«жҸҸпјӣе°ҶHAVING COUNT(DECODE())ж”№дёәз®ҖеҚ•зҡ„WHEREиҝҮж»Өпјӣ2пјүжҠ•еҪұиЈҒеүӘпјҡеҜ№дәҺCOUNT(*)жҹҘиҜўпјҢе°ҶSELECTжүҖжңүеҲ—ж”№дёәSELECT 1пјҢеҮҸе°‘ж•°жҚ®дј иҫ“пјӣ3пјүж•°жҚ®йў„иҝҮж»ӨпјҡеңЁиҝһжҺҘеүҚйҖҡиҝҮеҶ…иҒ”и§ҶеӣҫиҝҮж»Өж•°жҚ®гҖӮ", "create_table_statements": ["CREATE SEQUENCE jobinfo_his_seq; CREATE TABLE jobinfo_his (id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, jobid VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, tellercode VARCHAR2(50), jobname VARCHAR2(100), jobstatus VARCHAR2(10), jobstartpersname VARCHAR2(100), jobpriorpersname VARCHAR2(100), jobtype VARCHAR2(50), createtime DATE NOT NULL, tranname VARCHAR2(100), issucc VARCHAR2(1), tranprop VARCHAR2(100), trandata VARCHAR2(4000), jbjg VARCHAR2(100), jbgy VARCHAR2(100), ldlcid VARCHAR2(50)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER jobinfo_his_bi BEFORE INSERT ON jobinfo_his FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.id IS NULL THEN SELECT jobinfo_his_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_jobinfo_his_jobid ON jobinfo_his(jobid);", "CREATE INDEX idx_jobinfo_his_status ON jobinfo_his(jobstatus);", "CREATE INDEX idx_jobinfo_his_createtime ON jobinfo_his(createtime);", "CREATE INDEX idx_jobinfo_his_composite ON jobinfo_his(jobid, jobstatus, createtime);", "CREATE SEQUENCE businodeinst_seq; CREATE TABLE businodeinst (id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, nodeinstid VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, flowinstid VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER businodeinst_bi BEFORE INSERT ON businodeinst FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.id IS NULL THEN SELECT businodeinst_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_businodeinst_nodeinstid ON businodeinst(nodeinstid);", "CREATE INDEX idx_businodeinst_flowinstid ON businodeinst(flowinstid);", "CREATE SEQUENCE busiflowinst_seq; CREATE TABLE busiflowinst (id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, flowinstid VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, status VARCHAR2(10)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER busiflowinst_bi BEFORE INSERT ON busiflowinst FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.id IS NULL THEN SELECT busiflowinst_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_busiflowinst_flowinstid ON busiflowinst(flowinstid);", "CREATE INDEX idx_busiflowinst_composite ON busiflowinst(flowinstid, status);"], "sql": "select
  count(*)
from
  (
  select
   tt.jobid,
   tt.tellercode,
   tt.jobname,
   tt.jobstatus,
   tt.jobstartpersname,
   tt.jobpriorpersname,
   tt.jobtype,
   tt.createtime,
   tt.tranname,
   tt.issucc,
   tt.tranprop,
   tt.trandata,
   tt.jbjg,
   tt.jbgy,
   tt.ldlcid
  from
   (
  select
  t3.jobid,
  t3.tellercode,
  t3.jobname,
  t3.jobstatus,
  t3.jobstartpersname,
  t3.jobpriorpersname,
  t3.jobtype,
  t3.createtime,
  t3.tranname,
  t3.issucc,
  t3.tranprop,
  t3.trandata,
  t3.jbjg,
  t3.jbgy,
  t3.ldlcid,
  row_number() over (
   partition by
  t3.jobid
   order by
  t3.createtime desc
  ) as rn
  from
  jobinfo_his t3
  where
  exists (
   select
  t2.jobid
   from
  jobinfo_his t2
   where
  t2.jobid = t3.jobid
  and exists (
  select
   t1.jobid
  from
   jobinfo_his t1
  where
   t1.jobid = t2.jobid
   and t1.jobstatus = 'O'
   and substr(jobid, 0, 1) = 'A'
  )
   group by
  t2.jobid
   having
  count(decode(t2.jobstatus, 'N', 1, null)) = 0
  )
   ) tt
  where
   tt.rn = 1
  union all
  select
   t.jobid,
   t.tellercode,
   t.jobname,
   t.jobstatus,
   t.jobstartpersname,
   t.jobpriorpersname,
   t.jobtype,
   t.createtime,
   t.tranname,
   t.issucc,
   t.tranprop,
   t.trandata,
   t.jbjg,
   t.jbgy,
   t.ldlcid
  from
   jobinfo_his t,
   businodeinst t1,
   busiflowinst t2
  where
   t.jobid = t1.nodeinstid
   and t1.flowinstid = t2.flowinstid
   and t2.status = '1'
   and t.jobstatus = 'O'
  )", "explain": "ID	PLAN_STEP	COST	CARDINALITY	BYTES	CPU_COST	IO_COST

## Table Definitions:
CREATE SEQUENCE jobinfo_his_seq; CREATE TABLE jobinfo_his (id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, jobid VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, tellercode VARCHAR2(50), jobname VARCHAR2(100), jobstatus VARCHAR2(10), jobstartpersname VARCHAR2(100), jobpriorpersname VARCHAR2(100), jobtype VARCHAR2(50), createtime DATE NOT NULL, tranname VARCHAR2(100), issucc VARCHAR2(1), tranprop VARCHAR2(100), trandata VARCHAR2(4000), jbjg VARCHAR2(100), jbgy VARCHAR2(100), ldlcid VARCHAR2(50)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER jobinfo_his_bi BEFORE INSERT ON jobinfo_his FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.id IS NULL THEN SELECT jobinfo_his_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_jobinfo_his_jobid ON jobinfo_his(jobid);
CREATE INDEX idx_jobinfo_his_status ON jobinfo_his(jobstatus);
CREATE INDEX idx_jobinfo_his_createtime ON jobinfo_his(createtime);
CREATE INDEX idx_jobinfo_his_composite ON jobinfo_his(jobid, jobstatus, createtime);
CREATE SEQUENCE businodeinst_seq; CREATE TABLE businodeinst (id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, nodeinstid VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, flowinstid VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER businodeinst_bi BEFORE INSERT ON businodeinst FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.id IS NULL THEN SELECT businodeinst_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_businodeinst_nodeinstid ON businodeinst(nodeinstid);
CREATE INDEX idx_businodeinst_flowinstid ON businodeinst(flowinstid);
CREATE SEQUENCE busiflowinst_seq; CREATE TABLE busiflowinst (id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, flowinstid VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, status VARCHAR2(10)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER busiflowinst_bi BEFORE INSERT ON busiflowinst FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.id IS NULL THEN SELECT busiflowinst_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_busiflowinst_flowinstid ON busiflowinst(flowinstid);
CREATE INDEX idx_busiflowinst_composite ON busiflowinst(flowinstid, status);

## Original SQL:
select
  count(*)
from
  (
  select
   tt.jobid,
   tt.tellercode,
   tt.jobname,
   tt.jobstatus,
   tt.jobstartpersname,
   tt.jobpriorpersname,
   tt.jobtype,
   tt.createtime,
   tt.tranname,
   tt.issucc,
   tt.tranprop,
   tt.trandata,
   tt.jbjg,
   tt.jbgy,
   tt.ldlcid
  from
   (
  select
  t3.jobid,
  t3.tellercode,
  t3.jobname,
  t3.jobstatus,
  t3.jobstartpersname,
  t3.jobpriorpersname,
  t3.jobtype,
  t3.createtime,
  t3.tranname,
  t3.issucc,
  t3.tranprop,
  t3.trandata,
  t3.jbjg,
  t3.jbgy,
  t3.ldlcid,
  row_number() over (
   partition by
  t3.jobid
   order by
  t3.createtime desc
  ) as rn
  from
  jobinfo_his t3
  where
  exists (
   select
  t2.jobid
   from
  jobinfo_his t2
   where
  t2.jobid = t3.jobid
  and exists (
  select
   t1.jobid
  from
   jobinfo_his t1
  where
   t1.jobid = t2.jobid
   and t1.jobstatus = 'O'
   and substr(jobid, 0, 1) = 'A'
  )
   group by
  t2.jobid
   having
  count(decode(t2.jobstatus, 'N', 1, null)) = 0
  )
   ) tt
  where
   tt.rn = 1
  union all
  select
   t.jobid,
   t.tellercode,
   t.jobname,
   t.jobstatus,
   t.jobstartpersname,
   t.jobpriorpersname,
   t.jobtype,
   t.createtime,
   t.tranname,
   t.issucc,
   t.tranprop,
   t.trandata,
   t.jbjg,
   t.jbgy,
   t.ldlcid
  from
   jobinfo_his t,
   businodeinst t1,
   busiflowinst t2
  where
   t.jobid = t1.nodeinstid
   and t1.flowinstid = t2.flowinstid
   and t2.status = '1'
   and t.jobstatus = 'O'
  )

## Optimized SQL:

model_answers.model_answer: select count(*) from (select tt.jobid from (select t3.jobid, row_number() over (partition by t3.jobid order by t3.createtime desc) as rn from jobinfo_his t3 where exists (select 1 from jobinfo_his t2 where t2.jobid = t3.jobid and substr(t2.jobid, 1, 1) = 'A' group by t2.jobid having count(decode(t2.jobstatus, 'N', 1, null)) = 0 and count(decode(t2.jobstatus, 'O', 1, null)) > 0)) tt where tt.rn = 1 union all select t.jobid from jobinfo_his t, businodeinst t1, busiflowinst t2 where t.jobid = t1.nodeinstid and t1.flowinstid = t2.flowinstid and t2.status = '1' and t.jobstatus = 'O')

## Original SQL:
select
  count(*)
from
  (
  select
   tt.jobid,
   tt.tellercode,
   tt.jobname,
   tt.jobstatus,
   tt.jobstartpersname,
   tt.jobpriorpersname,
   tt.jobtype,
   tt.createtime,
   tt.tranname,
   tt.issucc,
   tt.tranprop,
   tt.trandata,
   tt.jbjg,
   tt.jbgy,
   tt.ldlcid
  from
   (
  select
  t3.jobid,
  t3.tellercode,
  t3.jobname,
  t3.jobstatus,
  t3.jobstartpersname,
  t3.jobpriorpersname,
  t3.jobtype,
  t3.createtime,
  t3.tranname,
  t3.issucc,
  t3.tranprop,
  t3.trandata,
  t3.jbjg,
  t3.jbgy,
  t3.ldlcid,
  row_number() over (
   partition by
  t3.jobid
   order by
  t3.createtime desc
  ) as rn
  from
  jobinfo_his t3
  where
  exists (
   select
  t2.jobid
   from
  jobinfo_his t2
   where
  t2.jobid = t3.jobid
  and exists (
  select
   t1.jobid
  from
   jobinfo_his t1
  where
   t1.jobid = t2.jobid
   and t1.jobstatus = 'O'
   and substr(jobid, 0, 1) = 'A'
  )
   group by
  t2.jobid
   having
  count(decode(t2.jobstatus, 'N', 1, null)) = 0
  )
   ) tt
  where
   tt.rn = 1
  union all
  select
   t.jobid,
   t.tellercode,
   t.jobname,
   t.jobstatus,
   t.jobstartpersname,
   t.jobpriorpersname,
   t.jobtype,
   t.createtime,
   t.tranname,
   t.issucc,
   t.tranprop,
   t.trandata,
   t.jbjg,
   t.jbgy,
   t.ldlcid
  from
   jobinfo_his t,
   businodeinst t1,
   busiflowinst t2
  where
   t.jobid = t1.nodeinstid
   and t1.flowinstid = t2.flowinstid
   and t2.status = '1'
   and t.jobstatus = 'O'
  )

CREATE SEQUENCE jobinfo_his_seq; CREATE TABLE jobinfo_his (id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, jobid VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, tellercode VARCHAR2(50), jobname VARCHAR2(100), jobstatus VARCHAR2(10), jobstartpersname VARCHAR2(100), jobpriorpersname VARCHAR2(100), jobtype VARCHAR2(50), createtime DATE NOT NULL, tranname VARCHAR2(100), issucc VARCHAR2(1), tranprop VARCHAR2(100), trandata VARCHAR2(4000), jbjg VARCHAR2(100), jbgy VARCHAR2(100), ldlcid VARCHAR2(50)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER jobinfo_his_bi BEFORE INSERT ON jobinfo_his FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.id IS NULL THEN SELECT jobinfo_his_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_jobinfo_his_jobid ON jobinfo_his(jobid);
CREATE INDEX idx_jobinfo_his_status ON jobinfo_his(jobstatus);

CREATE INDEX idx_jobinfo_his_composite ON jobinfo_his(jobid, jobstatus, createtime);
CREATE SEQUENCE businodeinst_seq; CREATE TABLE businodeinst (id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, nodeinstid VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, flowinstid VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER businodeinst_bi BEFORE INSERT ON businodeinst FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.id IS NULL THEN SELECT businodeinst_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_businodeinst_nodeinstid ON businodeinst(nodeinstid);

CREATE SEQUENCE busiflowinst_seq; CREATE TABLE busiflowinst (id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, flowinstid VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, status VARCHAR2(10)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER busiflowinst_bi BEFORE INSERT ON busiflowinst FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.id IS NULL THEN SELECT busiflowinst_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_busiflowinst_flowinstid ON busiflowinst(flowinstid);

case_datas.mode_question:
You are a database expert in SQL performance optimization.
Given the table definitions, explain output and the original SQL, apply appropriate optimizations.
Output only the optimized SQL as a single-line statement with no markdown or extra text.

## Table Definitions:
CREATE SEQUENCE jobinfo_his_seq; CREATE TABLE jobinfo_his (id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, jobid VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, tellercode VARCHAR2(50), jobname VARCHAR2(100), jobstatus VARCHAR2(10), jobstartpersname VARCHAR2(100), jobpriorpersname VARCHAR2(100), jobtype VARCHAR2(50), createtime DATE NOT NULL, tranname VARCHAR2(100), issucc VARCHAR2(1), tranprop VARCHAR2(100), trandata VARCHAR2(4000), jbjg VARCHAR2(100), jbgy VARCHAR2(100), ldlcid VARCHAR2(50)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER jobinfo_his_bi BEFORE INSERT ON jobinfo_his FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.id IS NULL THEN SELECT jobinfo_his_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_jobinfo_his_jobid ON jobinfo_his(jobid);
CREATE INDEX idx_jobinfo_his_status ON jobinfo_his(jobstatus);
CREATE INDEX idx_jobinfo_his_createtime ON jobinfo_his(createtime);
CREATE INDEX idx_jobinfo_his_composite ON jobinfo_his(jobid, jobstatus, createtime);
CREATE SEQUENCE businodeinst_seq; CREATE TABLE businodeinst (id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, nodeinstid VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, flowinstid VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER businodeinst_bi BEFORE INSERT ON businodeinst FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.id IS NULL THEN SELECT businodeinst_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_businodeinst_nodeinstid ON businodeinst(nodeinstid);
CREATE INDEX idx_businodeinst_flowinstid ON businodeinst(flowinstid);
CREATE SEQUENCE busiflowinst_seq; CREATE TABLE busiflowinst (id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, flowinstid VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, status VARCHAR2(10)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER busiflowinst_bi BEFORE INSERT ON busiflowinst FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.id IS NULL THEN SELECT busiflowinst_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_busiflowinst_flowinstid ON busiflowinst(flowinstid);
CREATE INDEX idx_busiflowinst_composite ON busiflowinst(flowinstid, status);
В·В·

## Original SQL:
select
  count(*)
from
  (
  select
   tt.jobid,
   tt.tellercode,
   tt.jobname,
   tt.jobstatus,
   tt.jobstartpersname,
   tt.jobpriorpersname,
   tt.jobtype,
   tt.createtime,
   tt.tranname,
   tt.issucc,
   tt.tranprop,
   tt.trandata,
   tt.jbjg,
   tt.jbgy,
   tt.ldlcid
  from
   (
  select
  t3.jobid,
  t3.tellercode,
  t3.jobname,
  t3.jobstatus,
  t3.jobstartpersname,
  t3.jobpriorpersname,
  t3.jobtype,
  t3.createtime,
  t3.tranname,
  t3.issucc,
  t3.tranprop,
  t3.trandata,
  t3.jbjg,
  t3.jbgy,
  t3.ldlcid,
  row_number() over (
   partition by
  t3.jobid
   order by
  t3.createtime desc
  ) as rn
  from
  jobinfo_his t3
  where
  exists (
   select
  t2.jobid
   from
  jobinfo_his t2
   where
  t2.jobid = t3.jobid
  and exists (
  select
   t1.jobid
  from
   jobinfo_his t1
  where
   t1.jobid = t2.jobid
   and t1.jobstatus = 'O'
   and substr(jobid, 0, 1) = 'A'
  )
   group by
  t2.jobid
   having
  count(decode(t2.jobstatus, 'N', 1, null)) = 0
  )
   ) tt
  where
   tt.rn = 1
  union all
  select
   t.jobid,
   t.tellercode,
   t.jobname,
   t.jobstatus,
   t.jobstartpersname,
   t.jobpriorpersname,
   t.jobtype,
   t.createtime,
   t.tranname,
   t.issucc,
   t.tranprop,
   t.trandata,
   t.jbjg,
   t.jbgy,
   t.ldlcid
  from
   jobinfo_his t,
   businodeinst t1,
   busiflowinst t2
  where
   t.jobid = t1.nodeinstid
   and t1.flowinstid = t2.flowinstid
   and t2.status = '1'
   and t.jobstatus = 'O'
  )

case_datas.mode_question:
You are a database expert in SQL performance optimization.
Given the table definitions, explain output and the original SQL, apply appropriate optimizations.
Output only the optimized SQL as a single-line statement with no markdown or extra text.

## Table Definitions:
CREATE SEQUENCE nobtran_seq; CREATE TABLE nobtran (nobtran_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, nobtran_transaction_no NUMBER NOT NULL, nobtran_acat_code VARCHAR2(20), nobtran_effective_date DATE, nobtran_trans_status_ind VARCHAR2(1), nobtran_pidm NUMBER NOT NULL, nobtran_apply_ind VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT 'N'); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER nobtran_bi BEFORE INSERT ON nobtran FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.nobtran_id IS NULL THEN SELECT nobtran_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.nobtran_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_nobtran_acat_code ON nobtran(nobtran_acat_code);
CREATE INDEX idx_nobtran_pidm ON nobtran(nobtran_pidm);
CREATE INDEX idx_nobtran_transaction_no ON nobtran(nobtran_transaction_no);
CREATE INDEX idx_nobtran_status ON nobtran(nobtran_trans_status_ind);
CREATE INDEX idx_nobtran_apply_ind ON nobtran(nobtran_apply_ind);
CREATE SEQUENCE spriden_seq; CREATE TABLE spriden (spriden_pidm NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, spriden_id VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, spriden_last_name VARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL, spriden_first_name VARCHAR2(100), spriden_change_ind VARCHAR2(1)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER spriden_bi BEFORE INSERT ON spriden FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.spriden_pidm IS NULL THEN SELECT spriden_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.spriden_pidm FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_spriden_change_ind ON spriden(spriden_change_ind);
CREATE SEQUENCE norrout_seq; CREATE TABLE norrout (norrout_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, norrout_transaction_no NUMBER NOT NULL, norrout_queue_status_ind VARCHAR2(1), norrout_level_no NUMBER); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER norrout_bi BEFORE INSERT ON norrout FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.norrout_id IS NULL THEN SELECT norrout_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.norrout_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_norrout_transaction_no ON norrout(norrout_transaction_no);
CREATE INDEX idx_norrout_level_no ON norrout(norrout_level_no);
CREATE INDEX idx_norrout_queue_status ON norrout(norrout_queue_status_ind);
CREATE SEQUENCE pebempl_seq; CREATE TABLE pebempl (pebempl_pidm NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, pebempl_ecls_code VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL, pebempl_current_hire_date DATE); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER pebempl_bi BEFORE INSERT ON pebempl FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.pebempl_pidm IS NULL THEN SELECT pebempl_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.pebempl_pidm FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_pebempl_ecls_code ON pebempl(pebempl_ecls_code);
CREATE SEQUENCE nortran_seq; CREATE TABLE nortran (nortran_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, nortran_transaction_no NUMBER NOT NULL, nortran_apty_code VARCHAR2(20), nortran_aufd_code VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, nortran_value VARCHAR2(200), nortran_posn VARCHAR2(50)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER nortran_bi BEFORE INSERT ON nortran FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.nortran_id IS NULL THEN SELECT nortran_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.nortran_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_nortran_transaction_no ON nortran(nortran_transaction_no);
CREATE INDEX idx_nortran_aufd_code ON nortran(nortran_aufd_code);
CREATE INDEX idx_nortran_apty_code ON nortran(nortran_apty_code);
CREATE SEQUENCE nortern_seq; CREATE TABLE nortern (nortern_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, nortern_transaction_no NUMBER NOT NULL, nortern_effective_date DATE, nortern_earn_code VARCHAR2(20), nortern_hrs NUMBER(10,2), nortern_special_rate NUMBER(15,2)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER nortern_bi BEFORE INSERT ON nortern FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.nortern_id IS NULL THEN SELECT nortern_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.nortern_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_nortern_transaction_no ON nortern(nortern_transaction_no);

select s.spriden_id EID,
  s.spriden_last_name ||', '||s.spriden_first_name "NAME",
  b.nobtran_transaction_no "TRANS NO.",
  z.nortran_posn "POSN NO",
  b.nobtran_effective_date "QUERY DATE", 
  b.nobtran_acat_code "ACAT CODE",
  n1.nortran_value "CURRENT HIRE DATE",
  n2.nortran_value "BEGIN PERSONNEL DATE",
  n3.nortran_value "SALARY GROUP",
  n4.nortran_value "APPOINTMENT PERCENT",
  n5.nortran_value "ANNUAL SALARY",
  t1.nortern_effective_date "PAY DATA EFFECTIVE DATE",
  t1.nortern_earn_code "PAY DATA EARNINGS",
  t1.nortern_hrs "PAY DATA HOURS",
  t1.nortern_special_rate "PAY DATA SPECIAL RATE",
  n6.nortran_value "END JOB EFFECTIVE DATE",
  n7.nortran_value "END PERSONNEL DATE"
   ,case b.nobtran_trans_status_ind
   when 'A' then 'Approved'
   when 'C' then 'Completed'
   when 'V' then 'Voided' 
   when 'D' then 'Disapproved'
   when 'R' then 'Return for Correction'
   when 'P' then 'Pending'
   when 'W' then 'Waiting'
   when 'T' then 'Partially Completed'
   when 'N' then 'Cancelled'
   when 'U' then 'Superuser Update'
  end trans_status   
  ,case r.norrout_queue_status_ind
   when 'A' then 'Approved by that Approver'
   when 'D' then 'Disapproved'
   when 'F' then 'FYI'
   when 'I' then 'In Queue'
   when 'K' then 'Acknowledged'
   when 'L' then 'Applied by Applier'
   when 'M' then 'More Information'
   when 'O' then 'Overridden'
   when 'P' then 'Pending Action by Approver/Applier '
   when 'Q' then 'Removed from Queue'
   when 'R' then 'Return for Correction'
  end queue_status
  ,r.norrout_level_no
  

  from nobtran b,spriden s, norrout r, pebempl pp, /*nbrjobs nbr,*/
  (select nc.nortran_transaction_no,nc.nortran_apty_code,nc.nortran_aufd_code,nc.nortran_value
  from nortran nc
   where nc.nortran_aufd_code = 'PEBEMPL_CURRENT_HIRE_DATE'
  ) n1, /* Current Hire Date */
  (select nb.nortran_transaction_no,nb.nortran_apty_code,nb.nortran_aufd_code,nb.nortran_value
  from nortran nb
   where nb.nortran_aufd_code = 'NBRJOBS_PERS_CHG_DATE' 
  ) n2,  /*Begin Personnnel Date*/ 
  (select ns.nortran_transaction_no,ns.nortran_apty_code,ns.nortran_aufd_code,ns.nortran_value
  from nortran ns
   where ns.nortran_aufd_code = 'NBRJOBS_SGRP_CODE'
   ) n3, /* Salary Group */
  (select na.nortran_transaction_no,na.nortran_apty_code,na.nortran_aufd_code,na.nortran_value
  from nortran na
   where na.nortran_aufd_code = 'NBRJOBS_APPT_PCT'
  ) n4, /*Appointment Percent*/ 
  (select nu.nortran_transaction_no,nu.nortran_apty_code,nu.nortran_aufd_code,nu.nortran_value
  from nortran nu
   where nu.nortran_aufd_code = 'NBRJOBS_ANN_SALARY'
  ) n5, /*Annual Salary*/
  (select nj.nortran_transaction_no,nj.nortran_apty_code,nj.nortran_aufd_code,nj.nortran_value
  from nortran nj
   where nj.nortran_aufd_code = 'NBRJOBS_EFFECTIVE_DATE'  
  and nj.nortran_apty_code in ('CFOAP','NWHIR','NWTMP','ADCOMP','JBTERM')) n6,  /*End Job Effective Date*/
  (select np.nortran_transaction_no,np.nortran_apty_code,np.nortran_aufd_code,np.nortran_value
  from nortran np
   where np.nortran_aufd_code = 'NBRJOBS_PERS_CHG_DATE'  
  and np.nortran_apty_code in ('CFOAP','NWHIR','NWTMP','ADCOMP','JBTERM')) n7,  /*End Personnel Date*/

  (select t.nortern_transaction_no,t.nortern_effective_date,t.nortern_earn_code,
   t.nortern_hrs, t.nortern_special_rate
  from nortern t) t1 

   ,(select unique zz.nortran_transaction_no,zz.nortran_posn
  from nortran zz
   where zz.nortran_posn is not null
  ) z

 where b.nobtran_acat_code in ('CFOAP','NWHIR','NWTMP','ADCOMP','JBTERM') /*employee*/
  /*waiting,completed,partially completedc,ancelled,supperuser update */
  /* and nobtran_trans_status_ind in ('W','C','T','U') */
   and b.nobtran_pidm = s.spriden_pidm
   and s.spriden_change_ind is null
   
   and b.nobtran_transaction_no = t1.nortern_transaction_no(+) /*Pay Data*/
   
   and b.nobtran_transaction_no = n1.nortran_transaction_no(+) /*Current Hire Date*/
   
   and b.nobtran_transaction_no = n2.nortran_transaction_no(+) /*Begin Personnnel Date*/
   
   and b.nobtran_transaction_no = n3.nortran_transaction_no(+) /*Salary Group*/
   
   and b.nobtran_transaction_no = n4.nortran_transaction_no(+) /*Appointment Percent*/
   
   and b.nobtran_transaction_no = n5.nortran_transaction_no(+) /*Annual Salary*/
   
   and b.nobtran_transaction_no = n6.nortran_transaction_no(+) /*End Job Effective Date*/
   
   and b.nobtran_transaction_no = n7.nortran_transaction_no(+) /*End Personnel Date*/
   
   and nobtran_transaction_no = r.norrout_transaction_no(+)
   --get all queue status
   /*and r.norrout_queue_status_ind = 'A'*/
   and r.norrout_level_no = 90 /* Pending HR approval Queue */
   -- not applied yet
   and b.nobtran_apply_ind = 'N' /*Applied ePAFs will not be listed*/
   --HR does not care about voided ePAFs
   and nobtran_trans_status_ind <> 'V'
   --get posn
   and b.nobtran_transaction_no = z.nortran_transaction_no
   and r.norrout_queue_status_ind <> 'A'
  -- exclude student
   and s.spriden_pidm = pp.pebempl_pidm
   and pp.pebempl_ecls_code not in ('RE','FW','GS','MW')

   order by 3

when 'R' then 'Return for Correction' end queue_status, r.norrout_level_no from nobtran b join spriden s on b.nobtran_pidm = s.spriden_pidm and s.spriden_change_ind is null join pebempl pp on z.nortran_transaction_no left join nortran n1 on b.nobtran_transaction_no = n1.nortran_transaction_no and n1.nortran_aufd_code = 'PEBEMPL_CURRENT_HIRE_DATE' left join nortran n2 on n3.nortran_aufd_code = 'NBRJOBS_SGRP_CODE' left join nortran n4 on b.nobtran_transaction_no = n4.nortran_transaction_no and n4.nortran_aufd_code = 'NBRJOBS_APPT_PCT' left join nortran n5 on b.nobtran_transaction_no = n5.nortran_transaction_no and n5.nortran_aufd_code = 'NBRJOBS_ANN_SALARY' left join nortran n6 on b.nobtran_transaction_no = n6.nortran_transaction_no and n6.nortran_aufd_code = 'NBRJOBS_EFFECTIVE_DATE' and n6.nortran_apty_code in ('CFOAP','NWHIR','NWTMP','ADCOMP','JBTERM') left join nortran n7 on b.nobtran_transaction_no = n7.nortran_transaction_no and n7.nortran_aufd_code = 'NBRJOBS_PERS_CHG_DATE' and n7.nortran_apty_code in ('CFOAP','NWHIR','NWTMP','ADCOMP','JBTERM') left join nortern t1 on b.nobtran_transaction_no = t1.nortern_transaction_no where b.nobtran_acat_code in ('CFOAP','NWHIR','NWTMP','ADCOMP','JBTERM') and b.nobtran_apply_ind = 'N' and b.nobtran_trans_status_ind <> 'V' order by b.nobtran_transaction_no

{"case_id": "30", "db_type": "oracle", "description": "ж”№еҶҷзҡ„ж ёеҝғжҳҜе°ҶеҺҹSQLдёӯй’ҲеҜ№nortranиЎЁзҡ„7дёӘзӢ¬з«ӢеӯҗжҹҘиҜў(n1-n7)е’Ң1дёӘеҺ»йҮҚеӯҗжҹҘиҜў(z)йҖҡиҝҮCTEзҡ„GROUP BY + MAX + CASE WHENжҠҖжңҜеҗҲе№¶гҖӮеҺҹSQLдёӯжҜҸдёӘеӯҗжҹҘиҜўйғҪжңүWHEREжқЎд»¶иҝҮж»ӨдёҚеҗҢзҡ„nortran_aufd_codeпјҢж”№еҶҷеҗҺйҖҡиҝҮCASE WHENеңЁеҚ•ж¬Ўжү«жҸҸдёӯеҗҢж—¶жҸҗеҸ–жүҖжңүйңҖиҰҒзҡ„еӯ—ж®өеҖјпјҢз„¶еҗҺз”ЁMAXиҒҡеҗҲйҖүжӢ©жҜҸдёӘtransactionзҡ„еҖјгҖӮиҝҷз§ҚиЎҢеҲ—иҪ¬жҚўжҠҖжңҜе°ҶEAV(Entity-Attribute-Value)жЁЎеһӢзҡ„еӨҡиЎҢж•°жҚ®йҖҸи§Ҷдёәе®ҪиЎЁзҡ„еҚ•иЎҢж•°жҚ®гҖӮеҗҢж—¶пјҢе°Ҷnobtranзҡ„иҝҮж»ӨжқЎд»¶еүҚзҪ®пјҢеҮҸе°‘JOINж—¶зҡ„ж•°жҚ®йҮҸгҖӮиҝҷз§Қж”№еҶҷж–№ејҸеңЁOLAPеңәжҷҜдёӯеёёз”ЁдәҺдјҳеҢ–з»ҙеәҰеұһжҖ§зҡ„еӨҡж¬ЎJOINгҖӮ", "create_table_statements": ["CREATE SEQUENCE nobtran_seq; case_datas.mode_question:
You are a database expert in SQL performance optimization.
Given the table definitions, explain output and the original SQL, apply appropriate optimizations.
Output only the optimized SQL as a single-line statement with no markdown or extra text.

## Table Definitions:
CREATE SEQUENCE nobtran_seq; CREATE TABLE nobtran (nobtran_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, nobtran_transaction_no NUMBER NOT NULL, nobtran_acat_code VARCHAR2(20), nobtran_effective_date DATE, nobtran_trans_status_ind VARCHAR2(1), nobtran_pidm NUMBER NOT NULL, nobtran_apply_ind VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT 'N'); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER nobtran_bi BEFORE INSERT ON nobtran FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.nobtran_id IS NULL THEN SELECT nobtran_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.nobtran_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_nobtran_acat_code ON nobtran(nobtran_acat_code);
CREATE INDEX idx_nobtran_pidm ON nobtran(nobtran_pidm);
CREATE INDEX idx_nobtran_transaction_no ON nobtran(nobtran_transaction_no);
CREATE INDEX idx_nobtran_status ON nobtran(nobtran_trans_status_ind);
CREATE INDEX idx_nobtran_apply_ind ON nobtran(nobtran_apply_ind);
CREATE SEQUENCE spriden_seq; CREATE TABLE spriden (spriden_pidm NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, spriden_id VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, spriden_last_name VARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL, spriden_first_name VARCHAR2(100), spriden_change_ind VARCHAR2(1)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER spriden_bi BEFORE INSERT ON spriden FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.spriden_pidm IS NULL THEN SELECT spriden_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.spriden_pidm FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_spriden_change_ind ON spriden(spriden_change_ind);
CREATE SEQUENCE norrout_seq; CREATE TABLE norrout (norrout_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, norrout_transaction_no NUMBER NOT NULL, norrout_queue_status_ind VARCHAR2(1), norrout_level_no NUMBER); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER norrout_bi BEFORE INSERT ON norrout FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.norrout_id IS NULL THEN SELECT norrout_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.norrout_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_norrout_transaction_no ON norrout(norrout_transaction_no);
CREATE INDEX idx_norrout_level_no ON norrout(norrout_level_no);
CREATE INDEX idx_norrout_queue_status ON norrout(norrout_queue_status_ind);
CREATE SEQUENCE pebempl_seq; CREATE TABLE pebempl (pebempl_pidm NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, pebempl_ecls_code VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL, pebempl_current_hire_date DATE); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER pebempl_bi BEFORE INSERT ON pebempl FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.pebempl_pidm IS NULL THEN SELECT pebempl_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.pebempl_pidm FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_pebempl_ecls_code ON pebempl(pebempl_ecls_code);
CREATE SEQUENCE nortran_seq; CREATE TABLE nortran (nortran_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, nortran_transaction_no NUMBER NOT NULL, nortran_apty_code VARCHAR2(20), nortran_aufd_code VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, nortran_value VARCHAR2(200), nortran_posn VARCHAR2(50)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER nortran_bi BEFORE INSERT ON nortran FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.nortran_id IS NULL THEN SELECT nortran_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.nortran_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_nortran_transaction_no ON nortran(nortran_transaction_no);
CREATE INDEX idx_nortran_aufd_code ON nortran(nortran_aufd_code);
CREATE INDEX idx_nortran_apty_code ON nortran(nortran_apty_code);
CREATE SEQUENCE nortern_seq; CREATE TABLE nortern (nortern_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, nortern_transaction_no NUMBER NOT NULL, nortern_effective_date DATE, nortern_earn_code VARCHAR2(20), nortern_hrs NUMBER(10,2), nortern_special_rate NUMBER(15,2)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER nortern_bi BEFORE INSERT ON nortern FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.nortern_id IS NULL THEN SELECT nortern_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.nortern_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_nortern_transaction_no ON nortern(nortern_transaction_no);
