## Original SQL:
;WITH rank_general AS (
  SELECT 
  ta.TIENDA AS id,
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
  ORDER BY SUM(v.MERCANCIASINIVA) DESC
  ) AS actual_rank_global
  FROM catalogos.tiendas ta
  LEFT JOIN flashdeventas.vetas_y_formas_de_pago v ON v.TIENDA = ta.TIENDA
  WHERE ta.tipo = 'S' AND estatus = 'A' AND ta.marca = 30
  GROUP BY ta.TIENDA
) 
SELECT 
  rg.actual_rank_global   
  ,t.nombre
  ,vw_r.nombre as regional
  ,vw_s.nombre as supervisor
  ,t.estado
  ,'RUTA' as ruta  ----
  ,t.m2 as tienda_m2
  ,'TAMAГ‘O' as tamanio   ----
  ,rj.ranking as rank_jerarquia_n4
  ,t.ciudad
  ,cam.matrices_min as propuesta
  ,otr.abierto_otr as abierto_otr
  ,c.* 
FROM clusters.tienda_atributos c
LEFT JOIN catalogos.tiendas t ON c.tienda = t.tienda
LEFT JOIN catalogos.vw_supervisores vw_s ON c.tienda = vw_s.tienda
LEFT JOIN catalogos.vw_regionales vw_r ON c.tienda = vw_r.tienda
LEFT JOIN rank_general rg ON c.tienda = rg.id
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT departamento, subdepartamento, clase, subclase, proveedor, estilo, tipo_articulo
  FROM catalogos.maestro_estilos me
  WHERE me.proveedor = 1162 AND me.estilo = 'C21031101'
) me
LEFT JOIN catalogos.ranking_tda_jerarquia rj 
  ON c.tienda = rj.id_tienda
  AND rj.departamento = me.departamento
  AND rj.subdepartamento = me.subdepartamento
  AND rj.clase = me.clase
  AND rj.subclase = me.subclase
LEFT JOIN catalogos.control_asignacion_matrices cam
  ON rj.ranking = cam.clasificacion
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT
  oc.id_tienda,
  oc.id_departamento,
  oc.id_subdepartamento,
  oc.id_clase,
  oc.id_subclase,
  oc.tipo_articulo,
  SUM(CASE WHEN n >= MONTH(GETDATE()) THEN ISNULL(val, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS abierto_otr
  FROM otr.otr_consulta oc
  CROSS APPLY (VALUES
  (1,  oc.mes1_compra_adicional),
  (2,  oc.mes2_compra_adicional),
  (3,  oc.mes3_compra_adicional),
  (4,  oc.mes4_compra_adicional),
  (5,  oc.mes5_compra_adicional),
  (6,  oc.mes6_compra_adicional),
  (7,  oc.mes7_compra_adicional),
  (8,  oc.mes8_compra_adicional),
  (9,  oc.mes9_compra_adicional),
  (10, oc.mes10_compra_adicional),
  (11, oc.mes11_compra_adicional),
  (12, oc.mes12_compra_adicional)
  ) m(n, val)
  GROUP BY
  oc.id_tienda,
  oc.id_departamento,
  oc.id_subdepartamento,
  oc.id_clase,
  oc.id_subclase,
  oc.tipo_articulo
) otr
  ON  otr.id_tienda = c.tienda
  AND otr.id_departamento = me.departamento
  AND otr.id_subdepartamento = me.subdepartamento
  AND otr.id_clase = me.clase
  AND otr.id_subclase = me.subclase
  AND otr.tipo_articulo = me.tipo_articulo
WHERE 1=1  AND c.centro_comercial = 1 AND c.clima LIKE '%calor todo el tiempo%' AND c.tienda = 3064

## Optimized SQL:

model_answers.model_answer: ;WITH rank_general AS (SELECT ta.TIENDA AS id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(v.MERCANCIASINIVA) DESC) AS actual_rank_global FROM catalogos.tiendas ta LEFT JOIN flashdeventas.vetas_y_formas_de_pago v ON v.TIENDA = ta.TIENDA WHERE ta.tipo = 'S' AND ta.estatus = 'A' AND ta.marca = 30 GROUP BY ta.TIENDA), me AS (SELECT departamento, subdepartamento, clase, subclase, proveedor, estilo, tipo_articulo FROM catalogos.maestro_estilos WHERE proveedor = 1162 AND estilo = 'C21031101'), otr AS (SELECT oc.id_tienda, oc.id_departamento, oc.id_subdepartamento, oc.id_clase, oc.id_subclase, oc.tipo_articulo, (CASE WHEN 1 >= MONTH(GETDATE()) THEN ISNULL(oc.mes1_compra_adicional,0) ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN 2 >= MONTH(GETDATE()) THEN ISNULL(oc.mes2_compra_adicional,0) ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN 3 >= MONTH(GETDATE()) THEN ISNULL(oc.mes3_compra_adicional,0) ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN 4 >= MONTH(GETDATE()) THEN ISNULL(oc.mes4_compra_adicional,0) ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN 5 >= MONTH(GETDATE()) THEN ISNULL(oc.mes5_compra_adicional,0) ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN 6 >= MONTH(GETDATE()) THEN ISNULL(oc.mes6_compra_adicional,0) ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN 7 >= MONTH(GETDATE()) THEN ISNULL(oc.mes7_compra_adicional,0) ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN 8 >= MONTH(GETDATE()) THEN ISNULL(oc.mes8_compra_adicional,0) ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN 9 >= MONTH(GETDATE()) THEN ISNULL(oc.mes9_compra_adicional,0) ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN 10 >= MONTH(GETDATE()) THEN ISNULL(oc.mes10_compra_adicional,0) ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN 11 >= MONTH(GETDATE()) THEN ISNULL(oc.mes11_compra_adicional,0) ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN 12 >= MONTH(GETDATE()) THEN ISNULL(oc.mes12_compra_adicional,0) ELSE 0 END) AS abierto_otr FROM otr.otr_consulta oc WHERE oc.id_tienda = 3064) SELECT rg.actual_rank_global, t.nombre, vw_r.nombre AS regional, vw_s.nombre AS supervisor, t.estado, 'RUTA' AS ruta, t.m2 AS tienda_m2, 'TAMAГ‘O' AS tamanio, rj.ranking AS rank_jerarquia_n4, t.ciudad, cam.matrices_min AS propuesta, otr.abierto_otr AS abierto_otr, c.* FROM clusters.tienda_atributos c LEFT JOIN catalogos.tiendas t ON c.tienda = t.tienda LEFT JOIN catalogos.vw_supervisores vw_s ON c.tienda = vw_s.tienda LEFT JOIN catalogos.vw_regionales vw_r ON c.tienda = vw_r.tienda LEFT JOIN rank_general rg ON c.tienda = rg.id CROSS JOIN me LEFT JOIN catalogos.ranking_tda_jerarquia rj ON c.tienda = rj.id_tienda AND rj.departamento = me.departamento AND rj.subdepartamento = me.subdepartamento AND rj.clase = me.clase AND rj.subclase = me.subclase LEFT JOIN catalogos.control_asignacion_matrices cam ON rj.ranking = cam.clasificacion LEFT JOIN otr ON otr.id_tienda = c.tienda AND otr.id_departamento = me.departamento AND otr.id_subdepartamento = me.subdepartamento AND otr.id_clase = me.clase AND otr.id_subclase = me.subclase AND otr.tipo_articulo = me.tipo_articulo WHERE c.centro_comercial = 1 AND c.clima LIKE '%calor todo el tiempo%' AND c.tienda = 3064;

{"case_id": "39", "db_type": "sqlserver", "description": "й—®йўҳжҰӮиҝ°пјҡеҺҹе§ӢжҹҘиҜўеҢ…еҗ«дёҖдёӘе…ЁиЎЁиҒҡеҗҲ + зӘ—еҸЈеҮҪж•°зҡ„ CTEпјҲrank_generalпјүпјҢеӨҡдёӘ LEFT JOIN дёҺдёҖдёӘ CROSS JOIN(me еӯҗжҹҘиҜў)пјҢд»ҘеҸҠеҜ№ otr.otr_consulta зҡ„иЎҢзә§еұ•ејҖ (CROSS APPLY (VALUES ...)) еҶҚеҒҡ GROUP BYгҖӮжҖ§иғҪз“¶йўҲеҸҜиғҪжқҘиҮӘеҮ еӨ„пјҡ
1) rank_general йңҖиҰҒеҜ№ flashdeventas.vetas_y_formas_de_pago еҒҡ GROUP BY е№¶жҢү SUM жҺ’еәҸеҶҚи®Ўз®— ROW_NUMBERпјҢиӢҘж— еҗҲйҖӮзҙўеј•/йў„иҒҡеҗҲдјҡеҜјиҮҙе…ЁиЎЁжү«жҸҸдёҺжҳӮиҙөзҡ„жҺ’еәҸпјӣ
2) me дҪҝз”ЁеёёйҮҸзӯӣйҖүдҪҶиў« CROSS JOIN еҲ°дё»жҹҘпјҢиӢҘ me иҝ”еӣһеӨҡиЎҢдјҡд№ҳжү©еӨ§еӨ–еұӮиЎҢж•°пјӣеҚідҪҝ me д»…иҝ”еӣһдёҖиЎҢпјҢдҝқз•ҷжңӘиў«еӨ–еұӮдҪҝз”Ёзҡ„еҲ—дјҡйҖ жҲҗдёҚеҝ…иҰҒзҡ„ж•°жҚ®дј йҖ’пјҲеҸҜз”ЁжҠ•еҪұдёӢжҺЁз§»йҷӨ proveedor дёҺ estiloпјүпјӣ
3) otr еӯҗжҹҘиҜўеҜ№ otr.otr_consulta еҒҡдәҶ VALUES еұ•ејҖеҗҺ GROUP BYпјҢиӢҘдёҚжҠҠй«ҳйҖүжӢ©жҖ§и°“иҜҚпјҲc.tienda = 3064пјүдёӢжҺЁпјҢдјҡжү«жҸҸеӨ§йҮҸж— е…іиЎҢе№¶дә§з”ҹеӨ§и§„жЁЎиҒҡеҗҲдёӯй—ҙз»“жһңпјӣ
4) еӨҡдёӘ LEFT JOINпјҲдҫӢеҰӮ ranking_tda_jerarquiaгҖҒcontrol_asignacion_matricesпјүиӢҘзјәд№ҸиҰҶзӣ–зҙўеј•пјҢдјҡеј•еҸ‘еӨ§йҮҸеӣһиЎЁе’ҢйҡҸжңә I/OгҖӮ

е»әи®®пјҲдёҺе®һд№ з”ҹз»ҷеҮәзҡ„и§„еҲҷдёҖиҮҙпјүпјҡ
- иҝӣиЎҢжҠ•еҪұдёӢжҺЁпјҡеңЁ me еӯҗжҹҘиҜўдёӯз§»йҷӨжңӘиў«еӨ–еұӮз”ЁеҲ°зҡ„еҲ—пјҲеҰӮ proveedorгҖҒestiloпјүпјҢеҮҸе°‘дёӯй—ҙз»“жһңе®ҪеәҰпјӣ
- иҝӣиЎҢи°“иҜҚдёӢжҺЁпјҡжҠҠй«ҳйҖүжӢ©жҖ§жқЎд»¶ c.tienda = 3064 дёӢжҺЁиҮі otr зҡ„жү«жҸҸ/иҒҡеҗҲеӯҗжҹҘиҜўпјҲеҚі WHERE oc.id_tienda = 3064пјүпјҢжҳҫи‘—йҷҚдҪҺ otr иҒҡеҗҲйҮҸпјӣ
- жЈҖжҹҘе№¶е»әз«Ӣеҝ…иҰҒзҙўеј•пјҡдҫӢеҰӮ otr.otr_consulta дёҠеә”жңү (id_tienda, id_departamento, id_subdepartamento, id_clase, id_subclase, tipo_articulo) зҡ„еӨҚеҗҲзҙўеј•жҲ–иҮіе°‘ id_tienda зҡ„зҙўеј•пјӣcatalogos.maestro_estilos еҸҜеңЁ (proveedor, estilo) е»әзҙўеј•пјӣcatalogos.ranking_tda_jerarquia еңЁ (id_tienda, departamento, subdepartamento, clase, subclase) дёҠе»әзҙўеј•пјӣclusters.tienda_atributos еңЁ (centro_comercial, clima, tienda) е»әеӨҚеҗҲ/еүҚзјҖзҙўеј•пјӣcatalogos.tiendas еңЁ TIENDA еҲ—е»әдё»й”®/зҙўеј•гҖӮ 
- еҜ№ rank_general зҡ„е…ЁиЎЁжҺ’еәҸејҖй”Җж•Ҹж„ҹж—¶пјҢиҖғиҷ‘зҰ»зәҝзү©еҢ–/е‘Ёжңҹз»ҙжҠӨжҺ’еҗҚиЎЁжҲ–йҷҗеҲ¶и®Ўз®—иҢғеӣҙпјҲиӢҘдёҡеҠЎе…Ғи®ёпјүгҖӮ

еңЁж»Ўи¶іиҜӯд№үеүҚжҸҗдёӢпјҲзЎ®дҝқз§»йҷӨзҡ„еҲ—зЎ®е®һдёҚиў«еӨ–еұӮеј•з”ЁпјҢдё” c.tienda дёәејәйҖүжӢ©жҖ§иҝҮж»ӨпјүпјҢж–№ејҸ1 зҡ„жҠ•еҪұдёҺи°“иҜҚдёӢжҺЁжҳҜдҪҺйЈҺйҷ©дё”з«ӢеҚіи§Ғж•Ҳзҡ„ж”№иҝӣпјӣж–№ејҸ2пјҲжӣҙжҝҖиҝӣзҡ„жҸҗеүҚиҝҮж»Ө/LEFTвҶ’INNER зӯүпјүиӢҘиҰҒйҮҮз”ЁйңҖдёҘж јйӘҢиҜҒдёҚдјҡж”№еҸҳз»“жһңгҖӮ", "create_table_statements": ["CREATE TABLE catalogos.tiendas (TIENDA INT PRIMARY KEY, nombre NVARCHAR(200), tipo CHAR(1), estatus CHAR(1), marca INT, ciudad NVARCHAR(100), estado NVARCHAR(100), m2 DECIMAL(10,2));", "CREATE INDEX DATETIME);", "CREATE INDEX IDX_VETAS_TIENDA ON flashdeventas.vetas_y_formas_de_pago(TIENDA);", "CREATE TABLE clusters.tienda_atributos (tienda INT PRIMARY KEY, centro_comercial INT, clima case_datas.mode_question:
You are a database expert in SQL performance optimization.
Given the table definitions, explain output and the original SQL, apply appropriate optimizations.
Output only the optimized SQL as a single-line statement with no markdown or extra text.

## Table Definitions:
CREATE TABLE catalogos.tiendas (TIENDA INT PRIMARY KEY, nombre NVARCHAR(200), tipo CHAR(1), estatus CHAR(1), marca INT, ciudad NVARCHAR(100), estado NVARCHAR(100), m2 DECIMAL(10,2));
CREATE INDEX IDX_TIENDA_TIPO_MARCA ON catalogos.tiendas(tipo, estatus, marca);
CREATE TABLE flashdeventas.vetas_y_formas_de_pago (ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY, TIENDA INT, MERCANCIASINIVA DECIMAL(18,4), FECHA DATETIME);
CREATE INDEX IDX_VETAS_TIENDA ON flashdeventas.vetas_y_formas_de_pago(TIENDA);
CREATE TABLE clusters.tienda_atributos (tienda INT PRIMARY KEY, centro_comercial INT, clima NVARCHAR(200));
CREATE INDEX IDX_TIENDA_ATR_CENTRO_CLIMA ON clusters.tienda_atributos(centro_comercial, clima, tienda);
CREATE TABLE catalogos.maestro_estilos (departamento INT, subdepartamento INT, clase INT, subclase INT, proveedor INT, estilo NVARCHAR(100), tipo_articulo INT);
CREATE INDEX IDX_MAESTRO_ESTILOS_PROV_ESTILO ON catalogos.maestro_estilos(proveedor, estilo);
CREATE TABLE catalogos.ranking_tda_jerarquia (id_tienda INT, departamento INT, subdepartamento INT, clase INT, subclase INT, ranking INT);
CREATE INDEX IDX_RJ_IDTIENDA_DEPT ON catalogos.ranking_tda_jerarquia(id_tienda, departamento, subdepartamento, clase, subclase);
CREATE TABLE catalogos.control_asignacion_matrices (clasificacion INT, matrices_min INT);
CREATE INDEX IDX_CAM_CLASIFICACION ON catalogos.control_asignacion_matrices(clasificacion);
CREATE TABLE otr.otr_consulta (id_tienda INT, id_departamento INT, id_subdepartamento INT, id_clase INT, id_subclase INT, tipo_articulo INT, mes1_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes2_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes3_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes4_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes5_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes6_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes7_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes8_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes9_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes10_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes11_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes12_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4));
CREATE INDEX IDX_OTR_ID_TIENDA_FULL ON otr.otr_consulta(id_tienda, id_departamento, id_subdepartamento, id_clase, id_subclase, tipo_articulo);
CREATE VIEW catalogos.vw_supervisores AS SELECT tienda, nombre FROM catalogos.tiendas; -- з®ҖеҢ–зӨәдҫӢ
CREATE VIEW catalogos.vw_regionales AS SELECT tienda, nombre FROM catalogos.tiendas; -- з®ҖеҢ–зӨәдҫӢ
В·В·

## Original SQL:
;WITH rank_general AS (
  SELECT 
  ta.TIENDA AS id,
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
  ORDER BY SUM(v.MERCANCIASINIVA) DESC
  ) AS actual_rank_global
  FROM catalogos.tiendas ta
  LEFT JOIN flashdeventas.vetas_y_formas_de_pago v ON v.TIENDA = ta.TIENDA
  WHERE ta.tipo = 'S' AND estatus = 'A' AND ta.marca = 30
  GROUP BY ta.TIENDA
) 
SELECT 
  rg.actual_rank_global   
  ,t.nombre
  ,vw_r.nombre as regional
  ,vw_s.nombre as supervisor
  ,t.estado
  ,'RUTA' as ruta  ----
  ,t.m2 as tienda_m2
  ,'TAMAГ‘O' as tamanio   ----
  ,rj.ranking as rank_jerarquia_n4
  ,t.ciudad
  ,cam.matrices_min as propuesta
  ,otr.abierto_otr as abierto_otr
  ,c.* 
FROM clusters.tienda_atributos c
LEFT JOIN catalogos.tiendas t ON c.tienda = t.tienda
LEFT JOIN catalogos.vw_supervisores vw_s ON c.tienda = vw_s.tienda
LEFT JOIN catalogos.vw_regionales vw_r ON c.tienda = vw_r.tienda
LEFT JOIN rank_general rg ON c.tienda = rg.id
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT departamento, subdepartamento, clase, subclase, proveedor, estilo, tipo_articulo
  FROM catalogos.maestro_estilos me
  WHERE me.proveedor = 1162 AND me.estilo = 'C21031101'
) me
LEFT JOIN catalogos.ranking_tda_jerarquia rj 
  ON c.tienda = rj.id_tienda
  AND rj.departamento = me.departamento
  AND rj.subdepartamento = me.subdepartamento
  AND rj.clase = me.clase
  AND rj.subclase = me.subclase
LEFT JOIN catalogos.control_asignacion_matrices cam
  ON rj.ranking = cam.clasificacion
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT
  oc.id_tienda,
  oc.id_departamento,
  oc.id_subdepartamento,
  oc.id_clase,
  oc.id_subclase,
  oc.tipo_articulo,
  SUM(CASE WHEN n >= MONTH(GETDATE()) THEN ISNULL(val, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS abierto_otr
  FROM otr.otr_consulta oc
  CROSS APPLY (VALUES
  (1,  oc.mes1_compra_adicional),
  (2,  oc.mes2_compra_adicional),
  (3,  oc.mes3_compra_adicional),
  (4,  oc.mes4_compra_adicional),
  (5,  oc.mes5_compra_adicional),
  (6,  oc.mes6_compra_adicional),
  (7,  oc.mes7_compra_adicional),
  (8,  oc.mes8_compra_adicional),
  (9,  oc.mes9_compra_adicional),
  (10, oc.mes10_compra_adicional),
  (11, oc.mes11_compra_adicional),
  (12, oc.mes12_compra_adicional)
  ) m(n, val)
  GROUP BY
  oc.id_tienda,
  oc.id_departamento,
  oc.id_subdepartamento,
  oc.id_clase,
  oc.id_subclase,
  oc.tipo_articulo
) otr
  ON  otr.id_tienda = c.tienda
  AND otr.id_departamento = me.departamento
  AND otr.id_subdepartamento = me.subdepartamento
  AND otr.id_clase = me.clase
  AND otr.id_subclase = me.subclase
  AND otr.tipo_articulo = me.tipo_articulo
WHERE 1=1  AND c.centro_comercial = 1 AND c.clima LIKE '%calor todo el tiempo%' AND c.tienda = 3064

supervisor, t.estado, 'RUTA' AS ruta, t.m2 AS tienda_m2, 'TAMAГ‘O' AS tamanio, rj.ranking AS rank_jerarquia_n4, t.ciudad, cam.matrices_min AS propuesta, otr.abierto_otr AS abierto_otr, c.* FROM clusters.tienda_atributos c LEFT JOIN catalogos.tiendas t ON c.tienda = t.tienda LEFT JOIN catalogos.vw_supervisores vw_s ON c.tienda = vw_s.tienda LEFT JOIN catalogos.vw_regionales vw_r ON c.tienda = vw_r.tienda LEFT JOIN rank_general rg ON c.tienda = rg.id CROSS JOIN me LEFT JOIN catalogos.ranking_tda_jerarquia rj ON c.tienda = rj.id_tienda AND rj.departamento = me.departamento AND rj.subdepartamento = me.subdepartamento AND rj.clase = me.clase AND rj.subclase = me.subclase LEFT JOIN catalogos.control_asignacion_matrices cam ON rj.ranking = cam.clasificacion LEFT JOIN otr ON otr.id_tienda = c.tienda AND otr.id_departamento = me.departamento AND otr.id_subdepartamento = me.subdepartamento AND otr.id_clase = me.clase AND otr.id_subclase = me.subclase AND otr.tipo_articulo = me.tipo_articulo WHERE c.centro_comercial = 1 AND c.clima LIKE '%calor todo el tiempo%' AND c.tienda = 3064;

еӨҡдёӘж ҮйҮҸеӯҗжҹҘиҜўдёҺеҮҪж•°и°ғз”Ёпјӣдёӯй—ҙдёҖеұӮеҶҚеҢ…дёҖеұӮе№¶йҷҗеҲ¶ ROWNUM<=10пјӣжңҖеӨ–еұӮеҶҚжҢү rn>0 иҝҮж»ӨпјүпјҢеҜјиҮҙдёҚеҝ…иҰҒзҡ„и§Ҷеӣҫзү©еҢ–дёҺж•°жҚ®дј йҖ’ејҖй”ҖгҖӮдё»иҰҒжҖ§иғҪйҡҗжӮЈиҝҳжңүпјҡ1) еӨ§йҮҸж ҮйҮҸеӯҗжҹҘиҜўпјҲдҫӢеҰӮд»Һ RES_SYS.PUB_MFRгҖҒRES_SYS.PUB_DIC_EQP_TYPEгҖҒRES_SYS.PUB_RME_EQP_MODEL зӯүжҢү ID жҹҘиҜўеҗҚз§°пјүдјҡеҜ№жҜҸдёҖиЎҢи§ҰеҸ‘зӢ¬з«Ӣзҙўеј•/иЎЁи®ҝй—®пјҢејҖй”ҖжҲҗеҖҚж”ҫеӨ§пјӣ2) йў‘з№Ғи°ғз”Ёзҡ„иЎҢзә§еҮҪж•°пјҲRES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA / SF_GET_STAFF_NAME зӯүпјүиӢҘжңӘзј“еӯҳпјҢдјҡеҜјиҮҙеӨ§йҮҸ CPU ж—¶й—ҙпјӣ3) IN еӯҗжҹҘиҜўеҢ…еҗ« CONNECT BY зҡ„йҖ’еҪ’еұӮж¬ЎжҹҘиҜўпјҢиӢҘдёҚе…Ҳе°Ҷе…¶зү©еҢ–дёәиҫғе°ҸйӣҶеҗҲпјҢдјҡдҪҝдё»иЎЁзӯӣйҖүжҲҗжң¬еўһй«ҳпјӣ4) е®ҪиЎЁ SELECT CREATE TABLE RES_ENTITY.ENT_ENTITY (ENTITY_ID VARCHAR2(50) PRIMARY KEY, DELETE_STATE VARCHAR2(2), RES_TYPE_ID NUMBER, STATION_CODE VARCHAR2(50), TIME_TO_OVERDUE VARCHAR2(50), CHECK_MODE_ID NUMBER, BUSINESS_ID NUMBER, SUB_BUSINESS_ID NUMBER, PROP_ID NUMBER, OLD_PROP_ID NUMBER, PROPERTY_ID NUMBER, ENTITY_STATE_ID NUMBER, IS_LOCKED_ID NUMBER, IS_FAULT_ID NUMBER, IS_OVERDUE NUMBER, WARRANTY_GRADE_ID NUMBER, IS_OUTMAINTENANCE_ID NUMBER, ASSETS_RECEIVE_TYPE_ID NUMBER, ENTITY_CREATE_SOURCE_ID NUMBER, SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID NUMBER, CHECK_RESULT_ID NUMBER, SERVICE_STATE_ID NUMBER, IS_MONITOR_ID NUMBER, MONITOR_STYLE_ID NUMBER, IS_UPLOAD_PHOTO NUMBER, STORAGE_STATE_ID NUMBER, IS_STORAGE NUMBER, RES_FROM_PROJBUILDTYPE_ID NUMBER, SPLIT_MERGE_REASON_ID NUMBER, SOURCE_RES_NO VARCHAR2(100), ROOM_ID VARCHAR2(50), RES_TYPE_ID_TEXT VARCHAR2(100), DEV_TYPE_ID NUMBER, DEV_MODEL_ID NUMBER, OLD_DEV_MODEL_ID NUMBER, MFR_ID NUMBER, DW_MFR_ID NUMBER, OLD_DW_MFR_ID NUMBER, MNT_MFR_ID NUMBER, MODIFY_OP VARCHAR2(50), CREATE_OP VARCHAR2(50), CHECK_PERSON VARCHAR2(50), STATION_CODE_ALT VARCHAR2(50));

CREATE TABLE RES_ENTITY.ENT_ROOM (ENTITY_ID VARCHAR2(50), WIDTH NUMBER, LENGTH NUMBER, HEIGHT NUMBER, AREA NUMBER, FLOOR_NO NUMBER, IS_OIL_MACH_ROOM NUMBER, IS_HAVE_WALL NUMBER, STRUCTURE_ID NUMBER, ADDRESS VARCHAR2(400), AIRBLAST_STYLE NUMBER, VACANT_CABLE_SEAT NUMBER, CONTACTS VARCHAR2(200), LINK_TEL VARCHAR2(50), NUM_HOLE_FEED NUMBER, NUM_HOLE_FEED_OCCU NUMBER, NUM_HOLE_FEED_FREE NUMBER, LIGHT_PROTECTION_BRAND VARCHAR2(200), LIGHT_PROTECTION_MODE VARCHAR2(200), FIRE_EXTINGUISHER_TYPE VARCHAR2(100), NUM_FIRE_EXTINGUISHER NUMBER, STATION_ROAD_ID NUMBER, DEGREE_ARRIVAL_ID NUMBER, REASON_UNARRIVAL VARCHAR2(400), IS_ARRIVEL NUMBER, IS_POWER NUMBER, REASON_UNPOWER VARCHAR2(400), INOUT_MODE NUMBER, PLATE_DRAWINGS_ID VARCHAR2(50), DECORATION_DRAWINGS_ID VARCHAR2(50), DESIGN_DRAWINGS_ID VARCHAR2(50), GROUND_SYSTEM_DRAWINGS_ID VARCHAR2(50), IS_EXPAND_OIL_ROOM NUMBER, SECURITY_ENVIRONMENT_ID NUMBER, GENERATION_TIME DATE, WNG_STYLE NUMBER, ROOM_GRADE_ID NUMBER, NUM_RMEBAY_TOTAL NUMBER, NUM_RMEBAY_FREE NUMBER, PRODUCT_TYPE NUMBER, ENT_AUDIT_RESULT_ID NUMBER, AUDIT_FLOW_RESULT_ID NUMBER, CATEGORY_IDENT_RESULT_ID NUMBER, AGENT_MNT_CONTACT VARCHAR2(50), IS_VR_FULLSCENE_ID NUMBER, IS_SHARE NUMBER, SHARE_UNIT_ID VARCHAR2(50), INTEG_CABINET_SPACE_NUM NUMBER, INTEG_CABINET_AC_BRAND VARCHAR2(200), INTEG_CABINET_AC_MODEL_DC VARCHAR2(200), INTEG_CABINET_AC_NUM_DC NUMBER, INTEG_CABINET_AC_MODEL VARCHAR2(200), INTEG_CABINET_AC_NUM_DC_AC NUMBER, INTEG_CABINET_AC_NUM_ID VARCHAR2(50), INTEG_CABINET_AC_MFR_ID NUMBER, INTEG_CABINET_AC_NUM_ID_TEXT VARCHAR2(200));
CREATE INDEX IDX_ENT_ROOM_ENTITY_ID ON RES_ENTITY.ENT_ROOM(ENTITY_ID);
CREATE TABLE RES_ENTITY.STA_STATION (STATION_ID NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, STATION_CODE VARCHAR2(50), DISTRICT_PROVINCE_ID VARCHAR2(50), DISTRICT_REGION_ID VARCHAR2(50), DISTRICT_COUNTY_ID VARCHAR2(50), STATION_NAME VARCHAR2(200));

CREATE TABLE RES_ENTITY.STA_APP_INFO (STATION_ID NUMBER, APP_REGION_ID VARCHAR2(50));

CREATE TABLE RES_ENTITY.STA_BIZ_INFO (STATION_CODE VARCHAR2(50), REGION_ID VARCHAR2(50));

CREATE TABLE RES_ENTITY.REG_MANAGE (REGION_ID VARCHAR2(50) PRIMARY KEY, SUPER_REGION_ID VARCHAR2(50), REGION_NAME VARCHAR2(200), DELETE_STATE VARCHAR2(2));

select *  from (select t.*,ROWNUM AS rn  from (SELECT
	EE.*,
	B.WIDTH,
	B.LENGTH,
	B.HEIGHT,
	B.AREA,
	B.FLOOR_NO,
	B.IS_OIL_MACH_ROOM,
	B.IS_HAVE_WALL,
	B.STRUCTURE_ID,
	B.ADDRESS,
	B.AIRBLAST_STYLE,
	B.VACANT_CABLE_SEAT,
	B.CONTACTS,
	B.LINK_TEL,
	B.NUM_HOLE_FEED,
	B.NUM_HOLE_FEED_OCCU,
	B.NUM_HOLE_FEED_FREE,
	B.LIGHT_PROTECTION_BRAND,
	B.LIGHT_PROTECTION_MODE,
	B.FIRE_EXTINGUISHER_TYPE,
	B.NUM_FIRE_EXTINGUISHER,
	B.STATION_ROAD_ID,
	B.DEGREE_ARRIVAL_ID,

	B.IS_ARRIVEL,
	B.IS_POWER,
	B.REASON_UNPOWER,
	B.INOUT_MODE,

	B.ROOM_GRADE_ID,
	B.NUM_RMEBAY_TOTAL,
	B.NUM_RMEBAY_FREE,
	B.PRODUCT_TYPE,
	B.ENT_AUDIT_RESULT_ID,
	B.AUDIT_FLOW_RESULT_ID,
	B.CATEGORY_IDENT_RESULT_ID,
	B.AGENT_MNT_CONTACT,
	B.IS_VR_FULLSCENE_ID,
	B.IS_SHARE,
	B.SHARE_UNIT_ID,
	B.INTEG_CABINET_SPACE_NUM,
	B.INTEG_CABINET_AC_BRAND,
	B.INTEG_CABINET_AC_MODEL_DC,
	B.INTEG_CABINET_AC_NUM_DC,
	B.INTEG_CABINET_AC_MODEL,
	B.INTEG_CABINET_AC_NUM_DC_AC,
	B.INTEG_CABINET_SPACE_NUM AS INTEG_CABINET_SPACE_NUM_TEXT,
	EE.RES_FROM_PROJECT_NAME AS RES_FROM_PROJECT_NAME_TEXT,
	B.INTEG_CABINET_AC_NUM_ID,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(B.INTEG_CABINET_AC_NUM_ID) AS INTEG_CABINET_AC_NUM_ID_TEXT,
	B.INTEG_CABINET_AC_MFR_ID,
	B.INTEG_CABINET_AC_MODEL,
	(SELECT MFR FROM RES_SYS.PUB_MFR WHERE MFR_ID=B.INTEG_CABINET_AC_MFR_ID and delete_state='0') AS INTEG_CABINET_AC_MFR_ID_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.TIME_TO_OVERDUE) AS TIME_TO_OVERDUE_TEXT,
	(SELECT EQP_TYPE FROM RES_SYS.PUB_DIC_EQP_TYPE WHERE EQP_TYPE_ID=B.CATEGORY_IDENT_RESULT_ID AND DELETE_STATE = '0') AS CATEGORY_IDENT_RESULT_ID_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_STAFF_NAME(B.AGENT_MNT_CONTACT) AS AGENT_MNT_CONTACT_TEXT,
	CASE WHEN B.IS_VR_FULLSCENE_ID = 1 THEN 'жңү' WHEN B.IS_VR_FULLSCENE_ID= 0 THEN 'ж— ' END AS IS_VR_FULLSCENE_ID_TEXT,
	CASE WHEN B.AIRBLAST_STYLE = 1 THEN 'дёӢйҖҒйЈҺ' WHEN B.AIRBLAST_STYLE= 0 THEN 'дёҠйҖҒйЈҺ' END AS AIRBLAST_STYLE_TEXT,
	CASE WHEN B.WNG_STYLE = 1 THEN 'дёҠиө°зәҝ' WHEN B.WNG_STYLE= 0 THEN 'дёӢиө°зәҝ' END AS WNG_STYLE_STYLE_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(B.IS_SHARE) AS IS_SHARE_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(B.SHARE_UNIT_ID) AS SHARE_UNIT_ID_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(B.AUDIT_FLOW_RESULT_ID) AS AUDIT_FLOW_RESULT_ID_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(B.ENT_AUDIT_RESULT_ID) AS ENT_AUDIT_RESULT_ID_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(B.PRODUCT_TYPE) AS PRODUCT_TYPE_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(B.IS_OIL_MACH_ROOM) AS IS_OIL_MACH_ROOM_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(B.IS_HAVE_WALL) AS IS_HAVE_WALL_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(B.STRUCTURE_ID) AS STRUCTURE_ID_TEXT, 
	res_entity.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(B.VACANT_CABLE_SEAT) AS VACANT_CABLE_SEAT_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(B.STATION_ROAD_ID) AS STATION_ROAD_ID_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(B.DEGREE_ARRIVAL_ID) AS DEGREE_ARRIVAL_ID_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(B.IS_ARRIVEL) AS IS_ARRIVEL_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(B.IS_POWER) AS IS_POWER_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(B.INOUT_MODE) AS INOUT_MODE_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(B.IS_EXPAND_OIL_ROOM) AS IS_EXPAND_OIL_ROOM_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(B.SECURITY_ENVIRONMENT_ID) AS SECURITY_ENVIRONMENT_ID_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(B.WNG_STYLE) AS WNG_STYLE_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(B.ROOM_GRADE_ID) AS ROOM_GRADE_ID_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.CHECK_MODE_ID) AS CHECK_MODE_ID_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.BUSINESS_ID) AS BUSINESS_ID_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.SUB_BUSINESS_ID) AS SUB_BUSINESS_ID_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.PROP_ID) AS PROP_ID_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.OLD_PROP_ID) AS OLD_PROP_ID_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.PROPERTY_ID) AS PROPERTY_ID_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.ENTITY_STATE_ID) AS ENTITY_STATE_ID_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.IS_LOCKED_ID) AS IS_LOCKED_ID_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.IS_FAULT_ID) AS IS_FAULT_ID_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.IS_OVERDUE) AS IS_OVERDUE_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.WARRANTY_GRADE_ID) AS WARRANTY_GRADE_ID_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.IS_OUTMAINTENANCE_ID) AS IS_OUTMAINTENANCE_ID_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.ASSETS_RECEIVE_TYPE_ID) AS ASSETS_RECEIVE_TYPE_ID_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.ENTITY_CREATE_SOURCE_ID) AS ENTITY_CREATE_SOURCE_ID_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID) AS SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.CHECK_RESULT_ID) AS CHECK_RESULT_ID_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.SERVICE_STATE_ID) AS SERVICE_STATE_ID_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.IS_MONITOR_ID) AS IS_MONITOR_ID_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.MONITOR_STYLE_ID) AS MONITOR_STYLE_ID_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.IS_UPLOAD_PHOTO) AS IS_UPLOAD_PHOTO_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.STORAGE_STATE_ID) AS STORAGE_STATE_ID_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.IS_STORAGE) AS IS_STORAGE_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.RES_FROM_PROJBUILDTYPE_ID) AS RES_FROM_PROJBUILDTYPE_ID_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.SPLIT_MERGE_REASON_ID) AS SPLIT_MERGE_REASON_ID_TEXT,
	EE.SOURCE_RES_NO AS SOURCE_RES_NO_TEXT,
	(SELECT ENTITY_NAME FROM res_entity.ent_entity WHERE ENTITY_ID=EE.ROOM_ID and res_type_id='205' and delete_state='0') AS ROOM_ID_TEXT,
	(SELECT RES_TYPE FROM RES_SYS.PUB_DIC_RES_TYPE WHERE RES_TYPE_ID=EE.RES_TYPE_ID and delete_state='0') AS RES_TYPE_ID_TEXT,
	(SELECT EQP_TYPE FROM RES_SYS.PUB_DIC_EQP_TYPE WHERE EQP_TYPE_ID=EE.DEV_TYPE_ID and delete_state='0') AS DEV_TYPE_ID_TEXT,
	(SELECT EQP_MODEL FROM RES_SYS.PUB_RME_EQP_MODEL WHERE EQP_MODEL_ID=EE.DEV_MODEL_ID and delete_state='0') AS DEV_MODEL_ID_TEXT,
	(SELECT EQP_MODEL FROM RES_SYS.PUB_RME_EQP_MODEL WHERE EQP_MODEL_ID=EE.OLD_DEV_MODEL_ID and delete_state='0') AS OLD_DEV_MODEL_ID_TEXT,
	(SELECT MFR FROM RES_SYS.PUB_MFR WHERE MFR_ID=EE.MFR_ID and delete_state='0') AS MFR_ID_TEXT,
	(SELECT MFR FROM RES_SYS.PUB_MFR WHERE MFR_ID=EE.DW_MFR_ID and delete_state='0') AS DW_MFR_ID_TEXT,
	(SELECT MFR FROM RES_SYS.PUB_MFR WHERE MFR_ID=EE.OLD_DW_MFR_ID and delete_state='0') AS OLD_DW_MFR_ID_TEXT,
	(SELECT MFR FROM RES_SYS.PUB_MFR WHERE MFR_ID=EE.MNT_MFR_ID and delete_state='0') AS MNT_MFR_ID_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_STAFF_NAME(EE.MODIFY_OP) AS MODIFY_OP_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_STAFF_NAME(EE.CREATE_OP) AS CREATE_OP_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_STAFF_NAME(EE.CHECK_PERSON) AS CHECK_PERSON_TEXT,
	ST.DISTRICT_PROVINCE_ID,
	ST.DISTRICT_REGION_ID,
	ST.DISTRICT_COUNTY_ID,
	ST.STATION_NAME,
	ST.STATION_NAME AS STATION_ID_TEXT,
	D.APP_REGION_ID,
	(SELECT REGION_NAME FROM res_entity.REG_MANAGE WHERE REGION_ID = D.APP_REGION_ID AND delete_state = '0') AS APP_REGION_ID_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DISTRICT_NAME(ST.DISTRICT_PROVINCE_ID) AS DISTRICT_PROVINCE_ID_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DISTRICT_NAME(ST.DISTRICT_REGION_ID) AS DISTRICT_REGION_ID_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DISTRICT_NAME(ST.DISTRICT_COUNTY_ID) AS DISTRICT_COUNTY_ID_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DISTRICT_NAME(ST.DISTRICT_PROVINCE_ID) || res_entity.SF_GET_DISTRICT_NAME(ST.DISTRICT_REGION_ID) || res_entity.SF_GET_DISTRICT_NAME(ST.DISTRICT_COUNTY_ID) AS REGION_ID_TEXT 
FROM RES_ENTITY.ENT_ENTITY EE 
LEFT JOIN RES_ENTITY.ENT_ROOM B ON B.ENTITY_ID = EE.ENTITY_ID
LEFT JOIN RES_ENTITY.STA_STATION ST ON ST.STATION_CODE = EE.STATION_CODE  
LEFT JOIN RES_ENTITY.STA_APP_INFO D ON ST.STATION_ID=D.STATION_ID
WHERE EE.DELETE_STATE = '0' AND EE.RES_TYPE_ID=205  
AND EE.STATION_CODE in  (select station_code  from res_entity.sta_biz_info  where  REGION_ID in (  select REGION_ID from res_entity.reg_manage  connect by prior REGION_ID = SUPER_REGION_ID and nvl(delete_state, '0') = '0' start with region_id in ('000102000000000000370100') ) ) 
)t where ROWNUM <= 10) where rn > 0;

IS_EXPAND_OIL_ROOM_TEXT, res_entity.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(B.SECURITY_ENVIRONMENT_ID) AS SECURITY_ENVIRONMENT_ID_TEXT, res_entity.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(B.WNG_STYLE) AS WNG_STYLE_TEXT, res_entity.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(B.ROOM_GRADE_ID) AS ROOM_GRADE_ID_TEXT, RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.CHECK_MODE_ID) AS CHECK_MODE_ID_TEXT, RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.BUSINESS_ID) AS BUSINESS_ID_TEXT, RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.SUB_BUSINESS_ID) AS SUB_BUSINESS_ID_TEXT, RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.PROP_ID) AS PROP_ID_TEXT, RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.OLD_PROP_ID) AS OLD_PROP_ID_TEXT, RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.PROPERTY_ID) AS PROPERTY_ID_TEXT, RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.ENTITY_STATE_ID) AS ENTITY_STATE_ID_TEXT, RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.IS_LOCKED_ID) AS IS_LOCKED_ID_TEXT, RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.IS_FAULT_ID) AS IS_FAULT_ID_TEXT, RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.IS_OVERDUE) AS IS_OVERDUE_TEXT, RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.WARRANTY_GRADE_ID) AS WARRANTY_GRADE_ID_TEXT, RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.IS_OUTMAINTENANCE_ID) AS IS_OUTMAINTENANCE_ID_TEXT, RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.ASSETS_RECEIVE_TYPE_ID) AS ASSETS_RECEIVE_TYPE_ID_TEXT, RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.ENTITY_CREATE_SOURCE_ID) AS ENTITY_CREATE_SOURCE_ID_TEXT, RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID) AS SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID_TEXT, RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.CHECK_RESULT_ID) AS CHECK_RESULT_ID_TEXT, RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.SERVICE_STATE_ID) AS SERVICE_STATE_ID_TEXT, RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.IS_MONITOR_ID) AS IS_MONITOR_ID_TEXT, RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.MONITOR_STYLE_ID) AS MONITOR_STYLE_ID_TEXT, RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.IS_UPLOAD_PHOTO) AS IS_UPLOAD_PHOTO_TEXT, RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.STORAGE_STATE_ID) AS STORAGE_STATE_ID_TEXT, RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.IS_STORAGE) AS IS_STORAGE_TEXT, RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.RES_FROM_PROJBUILDTYPE_ID) AS RES_FROM_PROJBUILDTYPE_ID_TEXT, RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_DESC_CHINA(EE.SPLIT_MERGE_REASON_ID) AS SPLIT_MERGE_REASON_ID_TEXT, EE.SOURCE_RES_NO AS SOURCE_RES_NO_TEXT, (SELECT ENTITY_NAME FROM res_entity.ent_entity WHERE ENTITY_ID=EE.ROOM_ID and res_type_id='205' and delete_state='0') AS ROOM_ID_TEXT, (SELECT RES_TYPE FROM RES_SYS.PUB_DIC_RES_TYPE WHERE RES_TYPE_ID=EE.RES_TYPE_ID and delete_state='0') AS RES_TYPE_ID_TEXT, (SELECT EQP_TYPE FROM RES_SYS.PUB_DIC_EQP_TYPE WHERE EQP_TYPE_ID=EE.DEV_TYPE_ID and delete_state='0') AS DEV_TYPE_ID_TEXT, (SELECT EQP_MODEL FROM RES_SYS.PUB_RME_EQP_MODEL WHERE EQP_MODEL_ID=EE.DEV_MODEL_ID and delete_state='0') AS DEV_MODEL_ID_TEXT, (SELECT EQP_MODEL FROM RES_SYS.PUB_RME_EQP_MODEL WHERE EQP_MODEL_ID=EE.OLD_DEV_MODEL_ID and delete_state='0') AS OLD_DEV_MODEL_ID_TEXT, (SELECT MFR FROM RES_SYS.PUB_MFR WHERE MFR_ID=EE.MFR_ID and delete_state='0') AS MFR_ID_TEXT, (SELECT MFR FROM RES_SYS.PUB_MFR WHERE MFR_ID=EE.DW_MFR_ID and delete_state='0') AS DW_MFR_ID_TEXT, (SELECT MFR FROM RES_SYS.PUB_MFR WHERE MFR_ID=EE.OLD_DW_MFR_ID and delete_state='0') AS OLD_DW_MFR_ID_TEXT, (SELECT MFR FROM RES_SYS.PUB_MFR WHERE MFR_ID=EE.MNT_MFR_ID and delete_state='0') AS MNT_MFR_ID_TEXT, RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_STAFF_NAME(EE.MODIFY_OP) AS MODIFY_OP_TEXT, RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_STAFF_NAME(EE.CREATE_OP) AS CREATE_OP_TEXT, RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_STAFF_NAME(EE.CHECK_PERSON) AS CHECK_PERSON_TEXT, ST.DISTRICT_PROVINCE_ID, ST.DISTRICT_REGION_ID, ST.DISTRICT_COUNTY_ID, ST.STATION_NAME, ST.STATION_NAME AS STATION_ID_TEXT, D.APP_REGION_ID, (SELECT REGION_NAME FROM res_entity.REG_MANAGE WHERE REGION_ID = D.APP_REGION_ID AND delete_state = '0') AS APP_REGION_ID_TEXT, res_entity.SF_GET_DISTRICT_NAME(ST.DISTRICT_PROVINCE_ID) AS DISTRICT_PROVINCE_ID_TEXT, res_entity.SF_GET_DISTRICT_NAME(ST.DISTRICT_REGION_ID) AS DISTRICT_REGION_ID_TEXT, res_entity.SF_GET_DISTRICT_NAME(ST.DISTRICT_COUNTY_ID) AS DISTRICT_COUNTY_ID_TEXT, res_entity.SF_GET_DISTRICT_NAME(ST.DISTRICT_PROVINCE_ID) || res_entity.SF_GET_DISTRICT_NAME(ST.DISTRICT_REGION_ID) || res_entity.SF_GET_DISTRICT_NAME(ST.DISTRICT_COUNTY_ID) AS REGION_ID_TEXT FROM RES_ENTITY.ENT_ENTITY EE LEFT JOIN RES_ENTITY.ENT_ROOM B ON B.ENTITY_ID = EE.ENTITY_ID LEFT JOIN RES_ENTITY.STA_STATION ST ON ST.STATION_CODE = EE.STATION_CODE LEFT JOIN RES_ENTITY.STA_APP_INFO D ON ST.STATION_ID=D.STATION_ID WHERE EE.DELETE_STATE = '0' AND EE.RES_TYPE_ID=205 AND EE.STATION_CODE IN (SELECT sbi.station_code FROM res_entity.sta_biz_info sbi WHERE sbi.REGION_ID IN (SELECT REGION_ID FROM res_entity.reg_manage WHERE nvl(delete_state,'0')='0' START WITH region_id IN ('000102000000000000370100') CONNECT BY PRIOR REGION_ID = SUPER_REGION_ID)) AND ROWNUM <= 10) t) where rn > 0;

{"case_id": "41", "db_type": "postgresql", "description": "иҜҘSQLж—ЁеңЁз»ҹи®ЎеӣӣдёӘдёҚеҗҢж—¶й—ҙзӘ—еҸЈеҶ…пјҲиҝҮеҺ»7гҖҒ13гҖҒ25гҖҒ2е°Ҹж—¶пјүпјҢеҗ„иЎҢж”ҝеҢәеҲ’зҡ„'zdjs'жҢҮж ҮжңҖеӨ§еҖјгҖӮеӯҳеңЁжҳҫи‘—зҡ„жҖ§иғҪй—®йўҳпјҡ1. **еҶ—дҪҷеҲ—жҠ•еҪұ**пјҡжңҖеҶ…еұӮжҹҘиҜўйҖүеҸ–дәҶ`zdbh`гҖҒ`zxjs`зӯүеҗҺз»ӯиҒҡеҗҲдёҚйңҖиҰҒзҡ„еӯ—ж®өпјҢеўһеҠ дәҶдёҚеҝ…иҰҒзҡ„I/Oе’ҢеҶ…еӯҳејҖй”ҖгҖӮ2. **ж— ж•ҲжҺ’еәҸ**пјҡеӣӣдёӘдҪңдёәJOINжәҗиЎЁзҡ„еӯҗжҹҘиҜўпјҲDerived TableпјүеҶ…йғЁеқҮеҢ…еҗ«`ORDER BY "zdjs" desc`дҪҶж— `LIMIT`пјҢиҝҷз§ҚжҺ’еәҸеңЁе…іиҒ”ж“ҚдҪңдёӯжҳҜж— ж„Ҹд№үзҡ„пјҢдё”еҸҜиғҪи§ҰеҸ‘йўқеӨ–зҡ„жҺ’еәҸж“ҚдҪңгҖӮ3. **еӨҡеұӮеөҢеҘ—**пјҡеӯҳеңЁеҶ—дҪҷзҡ„еӯҗжҹҘиҜўеұӮзә§пјҢеҜјиҮҙз”ҹжҲҗдёҚеҝ…иҰҒзҡ„дёҙж—¶з»“жһңйӣҶгҖӮдјҳеҢ–ж–№еҗ‘еҢ…жӢ¬з§»йҷӨж— ж•ҲжҺ’еәҸгҖҒиЈҒеүӘйқһеҝ…иҰҒеҲ—д»ҘеҸҠеӯҗжҹҘиҜўжүҒе№іеҢ–гҖӮ", "create_table_statements": ["CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS WHYJ_SJZL;", "CREATE TABLE WHYJ_SJZL."ds_dm_tqyj_jssk" ("xzqhdm" VARCHAR(50), "zdbh" VARCHAR(50), "zdjs" NUMERIC, "zxjs" NUMERIC, "gxsj" TIMESTAMP);", "CREATE INDEX idx_ds_dm_tqyj_jssk_gxsj ON WHYJ_SJZL."ds_dm_tqyj_jssk"("gxsj");", "CREATE INDEX idx_ds_dm_tqyj_jssk_xzqhdm ON WHYJ_SJZL."ds_dm_tqyj_jssk"("xzqhdm");"], "sql": "select "a"."qh" as "qhmc","d"."zdjs" as "1xszdjs","a"."zdjs" as "6xszdjs","b"."zdjs" as "12xszdjs","c"."zdjs" as "24xszdjs" from
(select 
case substr("xzqhdm",1,6) 
	 when '420102' then 'жұҹеІёеҢә'
	 when '420103' then 'жұҹжұүеҢә'
	 when '420104' then 'зЎҡеҸЈеҢә'
	 when '420105' then 'жұүйҳіеҢә'
	 when '420106' then 'жӯҰжҳҢеҢә'
	 when '420107' then 'йқ’еұұеҢә'
	 when '420111' then 'жҙӘеұұеҢә'
	 when '420112' then 'дёңиҘҝж№–еҢә'
	 when '420113' then 'жұүеҚ—еҢә'
	 when '420114' then 'и”Ўз”ёеҢә'
	 when '420115' then 'жұҹеӨҸеҢә'
	 when '420116' then 'й»„йҷӮеҢә'
	 when '420117' then 'ж–°жҙІеҢә' end as "qh" ,max("zdjs") as "zdjs" from (
select "xzqhdm",sum("zdjs") as "zdjs" from (
select "xzqhdm","zdbh","zdjs","zxjs","gxsj" from WHYJ_SJZL."ds_dm_tqyj_jssk" where 
"gxsj">=NOW() - INTERVAL '7' HOUR
) group by "xzqhdm" 
)

model_answers.model_answer: WITH base AS (SELECT "xzqhdm", sum("zdjs") FILTER (WHERE "gxsj">=NOW()-INTERVAL '7' HOUR) AS s7, sum("zdjs") FILTER (WHERE "gxsj">=NOW()-INTERVAL '13' HOUR) AS s13, sum("zdjs") FILTER (WHERE "gxsj">=NOW()-INTERVAL '25' HOUR) AS s25, sum("zdjs") FILTER (WHERE "gxsj">=NOW()-INTERVAL '2' HOUR) AS s2 FROM WHYJ_SJZL."ds_dm_tqyj_jssk" WHERE "gxsj">=NOW()-INTERVAL '25' HOUR GROUP BY "xzqhdm"), agg AS (SELECT CASE substr("xzqhdm",1,6) WHEN '420102' THEN 'жұҹеІёеҢә' WHEN '420103' THEN 'жұҹжұүеҢә' WHEN '420104' THEN 'зЎҡеҸЈеҢә' WHEN '420105' THEN 'жұүйҳіеҢә' WHEN '420106' THEN 'жӯҰжҳҢеҢә' WHEN '420107' THEN 'йқ’еұұеҢә' WHEN '420111' THEN 'жҙӘеұұеҢә' WHEN '420112' THEN 'дёңиҘҝж№–еҢә' WHEN '420113' THEN 'жұүеҚ—еҢә' WHEN '420114' THEN 'и”Ўз”ёеҢә' WHEN '420115' THEN 'жұҹеӨҸеҢә' WHEN '420116' THEN 'й»„йҷӮеҢә' WHEN '420117' THEN 'ж–°жҙІеҢә' END AS "qh", max(s7) AS z7, max(s13) AS z13, max(s25) AS z25, max(s2) AS z2 FROM base GROUP BY 1) SELECT "qh" AS "qhmc", z2 AS "1xszdjs", z7 AS "6xszdjs", z13 AS "12xszdjs", z25 AS "24xszdjs" FROM agg WHERE z7 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY z7 DESC;

{"case_id": "41", "db_type": "postgresql", "description": "иҜҘSQLж—ЁеңЁз»ҹи®ЎеӣӣдёӘдёҚеҗҢж—¶й—ҙзӘ—еҸЈеҶ…пјҲиҝҮеҺ»7гҖҒ13гҖҒ25гҖҒ2е°Ҹж—¶пјүпјҢеҗ„иЎҢж”ҝеҢәеҲ’зҡ„'zdjs'жҢҮж ҮжңҖеӨ§еҖјгҖӮеӯҳеңЁжҳҫи‘—зҡ„жҖ§иғҪй—®йўҳпјҡ1. **еҶ—дҪҷеҲ—жҠ•еҪұ**пјҡжңҖеҶ…еұӮжҹҘиҜўйҖүеҸ–дәҶ`zdbh`гҖҒ`zxjs`зӯүеҗҺз»ӯиҒҡеҗҲдёҚйңҖиҰҒзҡ„еӯ—ж®өпјҢеўһеҠ дәҶдёҚеҝ…иҰҒзҡ„I/Oе’ҢеҶ…еӯҳејҖй”ҖгҖӮ2. **ж— ж•ҲжҺ’еәҸ**пјҡеӣӣдёӘдҪңдёәJOINжәҗиЎЁзҡ„еӯҗжҹҘиҜўпјҲDerived TableпјүеҶ…йғЁеқҮеҢ…еҗ«`ORDER BY "zdjs" desc`дҪҶж— `LIMIT`пјҢиҝҷз§ҚжҺ’еәҸеңЁе…іиҒ”ж“ҚдҪңдёӯжҳҜж— ж„Ҹд№үзҡ„пјҢдё”еҸҜиғҪи§ҰеҸ‘йўқеӨ–зҡ„жҺ’еәҸж“ҚдҪңгҖӮ3. **еӨҡеұӮеөҢеҘ—**пјҡеӯҳеңЁеҶ—дҪҷзҡ„еӯҗжҹҘиҜўеұӮзә§пјҢеҜјиҮҙз”ҹжҲҗдёҚеҝ…иҰҒзҡ„дёҙж—¶з»“жһңйӣҶгҖӮдјҳеҢ–ж–№еҗ‘еҢ…жӢ¬з§»йҷӨж— ж•ҲжҺ’еәҸгҖҒиЈҒеүӘйқһеҝ…иҰҒеҲ—д»ҘеҸҠеӯҗжҹҘиҜўжүҒе№іеҢ–гҖӮ", "create_table_statements": ["CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS WHYJ_SJZL;", "CREATE TABLE WHYJ_SJZL."ds_dm_tqyj_jssk" ("xzqhdm" VARCHAR(50), "zdbh" VARCHAR(50), "zdjs" NUMERIC, "zxjs" NUMERIC, "gxsj" TIMESTAMP);", "CREATE INDEX idx_ds_dm_tqyj_jssk_gxsj ON WHYJ_SJZL."ds_dm_tqyj_jssk"("gxsj");", "CREATE INDEX idx_ds_dm_tqyj_jssk_xzqhdm ON WHYJ_SJZL."ds_dm_tqyj_jssk"("xzqhdm");"], "sql": "select "a"."qh" as "qhmc","d"."zdjs" as "1xszdjs","a"."zdjs" as "6xszdjs","b"."zdjs" as "12xszdjs","c"."zdjs" as "24xszdjs" from

model_answers.model_answer: WITH base AS (SELECT "xzqhdm", sum("zdjs") FILTER (WHERE "gxsj">=NOW()-INTERVAL '7' HOUR) AS s7, sum("zdjs") FILTER (WHERE "gxsj">=NOW()-INTERVAL '13' HOUR) AS s13, sum("zdjs") FILTER (WHERE "gxsj">=NOW()-INTERVAL '25' HOUR) AS s25, sum("zdjs") FILTER (WHERE "gxsj">=NOW()-INTERVAL '2' HOUR) AS s2 FROM WHYJ_SJZL."ds_dm_tqyj_jssk" WHERE "gxsj">=NOW()-INTERVAL '25' HOUR GROUP BY "xzqhdm"), agg AS (SELECT CASE substr("xzqhdm",1,6) WHEN '420102' THEN 'жұҹеІёеҢә' WHEN '420103' THEN 'жұҹжұүеҢә' WHEN '420104' THEN 'зЎҡеҸЈеҢә' WHEN '420105' THEN 'жұүйҳіеҢә' WHEN '420106' THEN 'жӯҰжҳҢеҢә' WHEN '420107' THEN 'йқ’еұұеҢә' WHEN '420111' THEN 'жҙӘеұұеҢә' WHEN '420112' THEN 'дёңиҘҝж№–еҢә' WHEN '420113' THEN 'жұүеҚ—еҢә' WHEN '420114' THEN 'и”Ўз”ёеҢә' WHEN '420115' THEN 'жұҹеӨҸеҢә' WHEN '420116' THEN 'й»„йҷӮеҢә' WHEN '420117' THEN 'ж–°жҙІеҢә' END AS "qh", max(s7) AS z7, max(s13) AS z13, max(s25) AS z25, max(s2) AS z2 FROM base GROUP BY 1) SELECT "qh" AS "qhmc", z2 AS "1xszdjs", z7 AS "6xszdjs", z13 AS "12xszdjs", z25 AS "24xszdjs" FROM agg WHERE z7 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY z7 DESC;

 В temp.*,
 В t_rmm_store.STORE_NAME,
 В t_rmm_location.LOCATION_NAME,
 В t_qdm_standard.STANDARD_NAME,
 В t_bdm_column.COLUMN_NAME AS `STEEL_GRADE_NAME`,
 В t_dgm_send_info.SEND_ID AS `CONNECT_ID`,
 В t_dgm_send_info_detail.SEND_PRODUCT_DETAIL_ID AS `CONNECT_DETAIL_ID`,
 В IF (
 В t_dgm_send_info_detail.SPOT_TYPE = '40',
 В IFNULL(t_dgm_send_info_detail.WEIGHT, 0),
 В IFNULL(t_dgm_send_info_detail.NUMBER, 0)
 В ) AS `SEND_NUMBER`,
 В IF (
 В t_dgm_send_info_detail.SPOT_TYPE = '40',
 В IFNULL(t_dgm_send_info_return_detail.WEIGHT, 0),
 В IFNULL(t_dgm_send_info_return_detail.NUMBER, 0)
 В ) AS `RETURN_NUMBER`
FROM
 В t_dgm_send_info_detail
 В LEFT JOIN t_dgm_send_info ON t_dgm_send_info.SEND_ID = t_dgm_send_info_detail.SEND_ID
 В LEFT JOIN t_dgm_send_info_return_detail ON t_dgm_send_info_return_detail.CONNECT_DETAIL_ID = t_dgm_send_info_detail.SEND_PRODUCT_DETAIL_ID
 В LEFT JOIN (
 В SELECT
 В  v_pre_product_material.PRODUCE_MATERIAL_ID,
 В  IFNULL(
 В v_pre_product_material.PACKAGE_NO,
 В v_pre_product_material.MATERIAL_NO
 В  ) AS MIXED_NO,
 В  '30' AS SPOT_TYPE,
 В  v_pre_product_material.MATERIAL_NO,
 В  v_pre_product_material.PACKAGE_NO,
 В  v_pre_product_material.PSR_ID,
 В  v_pre_product_material.CUSTOMER_ID,
 В  v_pre_product_material.CONTRACT_ID,
 В  v_pre_product_material.CONTRACT_NO,
 В  v_pre_product_material.NUMBER,
 В  v_pre_product_material.NET_WEIGHT,
 В  v_pre_product_material.GROSS_WT,
 В  v_pre_product_material.STORE_ID,

 В  v_pre_product_material.STANDARD_ID,
 В  v_pre_product_material.STEEL_GRADE,
 В  v_pre_product_material.SURFACE_GROUP_DESC,
 В  v_pre_product_material.CONTRACT_DETAIL_ID,
 В  NULL AS VARIETY_ID,
 В  IF(
 В (v_pre_product_material.LENGTH IS NOT NULL)
 В AND (v_pre_product_material.LENGTH != 0),
 В CONCAT(
 В v_pre_product_material.THICK,
 В '*',
 В v_pre_product_material.WIDTH,
 В '*',
 В v_pre_product_material.LENGTH
 В ),
 В CONCAT(
 В v_pre_product_material.THICK,
 В '*',
 В v_pre_product_material.WIDTH,
 В '*C'
 В )
 В  ) AS specs,
 В  SUM(
 В IF (
 В t_sam_contract_detail.BUY_UNIT = '10',
 В -- еҚ•дҪҚжөӢиҜ•
 В t_sam_contract_detail.TAX_PRICE * v_pre_product_material.NET_WEIGHT,
 В t_sam_contract_detail.TAX_PRICE * IFNULL(t_sam_contract_detail.NUMBER, 1)
 В )
 В  ) AS `PRICE`

CREATE INDEX idx_score_s_id ON Score(s_id);

CREATE INDEX idx_score_c_id ON Score(c_id);

## Original SQL:
WITH StudentStats AS (
  SELECT 
  s.s_id,
  s.s_name,
  s.s_sex,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sc.c_id) AS course_count,
  AVG(sc.s_score) AS avg_score,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sc.s_score > 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS excellent_course_count
  FROM Student s
  JOIN Score sc ON s.s_id = sc.s_id
  GROUP BY s.s_id, s.s_name, s.s_sex
  HAVING AVG(sc.s_score) > 80 AND SUM(CASE WHEN sc.s_score > 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 2
)
SELECT 
  ss.s_id,
  ss.s_name,
  ss.s_sex,
  ss.course_count,
  ss.avg_score,
  ss.excellent_course_count,
  RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY ss.s_sex ORDER BY ss.avg_score DESC) AS gender_rank
FROM StudentStats ss
ORDER BY ss.avg_score DESC;

## Optimized SQL:

model_answers.model_answer: WITH ScoreStats AS (SELECT sc.s_id, COUNT(DISTINCT sc.c_id) AS course_count, AVG(sc.s_score) AS avg_score, SUM(CASE WHEN sc.s_score > 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS excellent_course_count FROM Score sc GROUP BY sc.s_id HAVING AVG(sc.s_score) > 80 AND SUM(CASE WHEN sc.s_score > 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 2) SELECT s.s_id, s.s_name, s.s_sex, ss.course_count, ss.avg_score, ss.excellent_course_count, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_sex ORDER BY ss.avg_score DESC) AS gender_rank FROM ScoreStats ss JOIN Student s ON s.s_id = ss.s_id ORDER BY ss.avg_score DESC;

WITH product_revenue AS (SELECT o3.user_id, p.product_name, SUM(oi2.quantity * oi2.unit_price * (1 - oi2.discount / 100)) AS rev FROM order_items AS oi2 INNER JOIN orders AS o3 ON o3.order_id = oi2.order_id INNER JOIN products AS p ON oi2.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY o3.user_id, p.product_name), ranked_products AS (SELECT user_id, product_name, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY rev DESC) AS rank_num FROM product_revenue), top_products AS (SELECT user_id, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT product_name ORDER BY product_name SEPARATOR ', ') AS GROUP_CONCAT_ FROM ranked_products WHERE rank_num <= 3 GROUP BY user_id), order_agg AS (SELECT o.user_id, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price * (1 - oi.discount / 100)) AS total_spent, AVG(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price * (1 - oi.discount / 100)) AS avg_order_value, MAX(o.order_date) AS last_order_date FROM orders AS o LEFT JOIN order_items AS oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 3 YEAR) GROUP BY o.user_id) SELECT u.user_id, u.username, a.total_orders, a.total_spent, a.avg_order_value, a.last_order_date, tp.GROUP_CONCAT_ AS top_products FROM order_agg AS a INNER JOIN users AS u ON u.user_id = a.user_id AND u.status = 'active' LEFT JOIN top_products AS tp ON tp.user_id = u.user_id WHERE a.total_orders > 0 ORDER BY a.total_spent DESC;

WITH product_revenue AS (SELECT o3.user_id, p.product_name, SUM(oi2.quantity * oi2.unit_price * (1 - oi2.discount / 100)) AS rev FROM order_items AS oi2 INNER JOIN orders AS o3 ON o3.order_id = oi2.order_id INNER JOIN products AS p ON oi2.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY o3.user_id, p.product_name), ranked_products AS (SELECT user_id, product_name, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY rev DESC) AS rank_num FROM product_revenue), top_products AS (SELECT user_id, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT product_name ORDER BY product_name SEPARATOR ', ') AS GROUP_CONCAT_ FROM ranked_products WHERE rank_num <= 3 GROUP BY user_id), order_agg AS (SELECT o.user_id, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price * (1 - oi.discount / 100)) AS total_spent, AVG(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price * (1 - oi.discount / 100)) AS avg_order_value, MAX(o.order_date) AS last_order_date FROM orders AS o LEFT JOIN order_items AS oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.order_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 3 YEAR) GROUP BY o.user_id) SELECT u.user_id, u.username, a.total_orders, a.total_spent, a.avg_order_value, a.last_order_date, tp.GROUP_CONCAT_ AS top_products FROM order_agg AS a INNER JOIN users AS u ON u.user_id = a.user_id AND u.status = 'active' LEFT JOIN top_products AS tp ON tp.user_id = u.user_id WHERE a.total_orders > 0 ORDER BY a.total_spent DESC;

select * from (select vehicle_type, booking_status, payment_method, ride_distance, rate, row_number() over (partition by vehicle_type order by abs(rate) desc) as rank_num from (select vehicle_type, booking_status, payment_method, ride_distance, coalesce(ride_distance, 0) - coalesce(avg(ride_distance) over (partition by vehicle_type, booking_status, payment_method), 0) as rate from ride_bookings) t where abs(rate) >= 1) fn where rank_num <= 5;

SELECT rb.customer_id, COUNT(*) AS total_bookings, SUM(rb.booking_value) AS total_revenue, stats.avg_driver_rating, stats.last_booking_date FROM ride_bookings rb JOIN (SELECT customer_id, AVG(driver_rating) AS avg_driver_rating, MAX(booking_date) AS last_booking_date FROM ride_bookings GROUP BY customer_id) stats ON stats.customer_id = rb.customer_id WHERE rb.booking_status IN ('Completed', 'Cancelled', 'No Show') AND rb.booking_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 180 DAY) GROUP BY rb.customer_id, stats.avg_driver_rating, stats.last_booking_date HAVING total_bookings > 10 ORDER BY total_revenue DESC, avg_driver_rating ASC;

SELECT rb.customer_id, COUNT(*) AS total_bookings, SUM(rb.booking_value) AS total_revenue, stats.avg_driver_rating, stats.last_booking_date FROM ride_bookings rb JOIN (SELECT customer_id, AVG(driver_rating) AS avg_driver_rating, MAX(booking_date) AS last_booking_date FROM ride_bookings GROUP BY customer_id) stats ON stats.customer_id = rb.customer_id WHERE rb.booking_status IN ('Completed', 'Cancelled', 'No Show') AND rb.booking_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 180 DAY) GROUP BY rb.customer_id, stats.avg_driver_rating, stats.last_booking_date HAVING total_bookings > 10 ORDER BY total_revenue DESC, avg_driver_rating ASC;

model_answers.model_answer: SELECT count(1) stockNum, COUNT(c.FIRST_IN_HOSTSTOCK_DATE) hostStockNum FROM t_mdm_dlr_car_store c LEFT JOIN t_mdm_dlr_car CAR ON car.CAR_ID = c.CAR_ID LEFT JOIN t_ve_bu_sale_order_d SOD ON SOD.SALE_PLAN_CODE = c.SALES_PLAN_CODE LEFT JOIN t_ve_bu_sale_order SO ON SOD.SALE_ORDER_ID = SO.SALE_ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN t_mdm_ve_car_config con ON con.CAR_CONFIG_ID = car.CAR_CONFIG_ID LEFT JOIN t_ve_bu_inv_apply_d iad ON SO.sale_order_id = iad.link_order_id and iad.is_Enable='1' LEFT JOIN (SELECT m.MOVESTOCK_ORDER_CODE,m.CAR_ID,m.AUDIT_STATUS,m.NEW_HOUSE_ID,m.NEW_DLR_ID FROM t_ve_bu_movestock_order m JOIN (SELECT max(MOVESTOCK_ORDER_CODE) MOVESTOCK_ORDER_CODE FROM t_ve_bu_movestock_order GROUP BY VIN) mx ON m.MOVESTOCK_ORDER_CODE = mx.MOVESTOCK_ORDER_CODE) mo ON mo.CAR_ID = c.CAR_ID LEFT JOIN t_ve_bu_month_plan_d mpd ON mpd.SALES_PLAN_CODE = c.SALES_PLAN_CODE LEFT JOIN t_usc_mdm_org_dlr tumod ON c.DLR_ID = tumod.DLR_ID LEFT JOIN T_USC_MDM_ORG_CITY CI ON CI.CITY_ID = tumod.CITY_ID LEFT JOIN t_ve_db_zb_stock tvdzs ON tvdzs.ZB_STOCK_ID = c.CAR_STOCK_HOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN t_ve_db_car_stock_house tvdcsh ON tvdcsh.CAR_STOCK_HOUSE_ID = c.CAR_STOCK_HOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN T_VE_DB_CAR_STOCK_HOUSE SHd ON SHd.CAR_STOCK_HOUSE_ID = c.CAR_SALE_HOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN t_mdm_ve_car_optionalpag optionl ON CAR.OPTIONAL_PAG_ID = optionl.OPTIONAL_PAG_ID LEFT JOIN t_mdm_car_color cols ON CAR.CAR_COLOR_ID = cols.CAR_COLOR_ID LEFT JOIN t_mdm_car_incolor incol ON CAR.CAR_INCOLOR_ID = incol.CAR_INCOLOR_ID LEFT JOIN t_ve_db_car_stock_house oge ON oge.CAR_HOUSE_CODE = SOD.DELIVERY_FAC_HW_CODE LEFT JOIN t_ve_finance_wholesale_purchase_order ord ON ord.SALES_PLAN_CODE = c.SALES_PLAN_CODE LEFT JOIN t_ve_bu_invoice_info_upload tvbiiu ON ord.WHOLESALE_PURCHASE_ORDER_CODE = tvbiiu.WHOLESALE_PURCHASE_ORDER_CODE and tvbiiu.IS_ENABLE = '1' LEFT JOIN t_prc_mds_lookup_value v5 ON v5.LOOKUP_VALUE_CODE = ord.ORDER_STATUS and v5.LOOKUP_TYPE_CODE = 'VE1414' LEFT JOIN (SELECT max(PURCHASE_ORDER_CODE) PURCHASE_ORDER_CODE, SALE_PLAN_CODE FROM t_ve_bu_purchase_order GROUP BY SALE_PLAN_CODE) purchase ON purchase.SALE_PLAN_CODE = c.SALES_PLAN_CODE WHERE c.IS_ENABLE = '1'

model_answers.model_answer: SELECT count(1) stockNum, COUNT(c.FIRST_IN_HOSTSTOCK_DATE) hostStockNum FROM t_mdm_dlr_car_store c LEFT JOIN t_mdm_dlr_car CAR ON car.CAR_ID = c.CAR_ID LEFT JOIN t_ve_bu_sale_order_d SOD ON SOD.SALE_PLAN_CODE = c.SALES_PLAN_CODE LEFT JOIN t_ve_bu_sale_order SO ON SOD.SALE_ORDER_ID = SO.SALE_ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN t_mdm_ve_car_config con ON con.CAR_CONFIG_ID = car.CAR_CONFIG_ID LEFT JOIN t_ve_bu_inv_apply_d iad ON SO.sale_order_id = iad.link_order_id and iad.is_Enable='1' LEFT JOIN (SELECT m.MOVESTOCK_ORDER_CODE,m.CAR_ID,m.AUDIT_STATUS,m.NEW_HOUSE_ID,m.NEW_DLR_ID FROM t_ve_bu_movestock_order m JOIN (SELECT max(MOVESTOCK_ORDER_CODE) MOVESTOCK_ORDER_CODE FROM t_ve_bu_movestock_order GROUP BY VIN) mx ON m.MOVESTOCK_ORDER_CODE = mx.MOVESTOCK_ORDER_CODE) mo ON mo.CAR_ID = c.CAR_ID LEFT JOIN t_ve_bu_month_plan_d mpd ON mpd.SALES_PLAN_CODE = c.SALES_PLAN_CODE LEFT JOIN t_usc_mdm_org_dlr tumod ON c.DLR_ID = tumod.DLR_ID LEFT JOIN T_USC_MDM_ORG_CITY CI ON CI.CITY_ID = tumod.CITY_ID LEFT JOIN t_ve_db_zb_stock tvdzs ON tvdzs.ZB_STOCK_ID = c.CAR_STOCK_HOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN t_ve_db_car_stock_house tvdcsh ON tvdcsh.CAR_STOCK_HOUSE_ID = c.CAR_STOCK_HOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN T_VE_DB_CAR_STOCK_HOUSE SHd ON SHd.CAR_STOCK_HOUSE_ID = c.CAR_SALE_HOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN t_mdm_ve_car_optionalpag optionl ON CAR.OPTIONAL_PAG_ID = optionl.OPTIONAL_PAG_ID LEFT JOIN t_mdm_car_color cols ON CAR.CAR_COLOR_ID = cols.CAR_COLOR_ID LEFT JOIN t_mdm_car_incolor incol ON CAR.CAR_INCOLOR_ID = incol.CAR_INCOLOR_ID LEFT JOIN t_ve_db_car_stock_house oge ON oge.CAR_HOUSE_CODE = SOD.DELIVERY_FAC_HW_CODE LEFT JOIN t_ve_finance_wholesale_purchase_order ord ON ord.SALES_PLAN_CODE = c.SALES_PLAN_CODE LEFT JOIN t_ve_bu_invoice_info_upload tvbiiu ON ord.WHOLESALE_PURCHASE_ORDER_CODE = tvbiiu.WHOLESALE_PURCHASE_ORDER_CODE and tvbiiu.IS_ENABLE = '1' LEFT JOIN t_prc_mds_lookup_value v5 ON v5.LOOKUP_VALUE_CODE = ord.ORDER_STATUS and v5.LOOKUP_TYPE_CODE = 'VE1414' LEFT JOIN (SELECT max(PURCHASE_ORDER_CODE) PURCHASE_ORDER_CODE, SALE_PLAN_CODE FROM t_ve_bu_purchase_order GROUP BY SALE_PLAN_CODE) purchase ON purchase.SALE_PLAN_CODE = c.SALES_PLAN_CODE WHERE c.IS_ENABLE = '1'

{"case_id": "50", "db_type": "sqlserver", "description": "иҜҘSQLжҹҘиҜўз”ЁдәҺзӯӣйҖүзү№е®ҡзҡ„зҙўиө”и®°еҪ•пјҲclaimпјүпјҢйҖ»иҫ‘дёҠеҢ…еҗ«еӨҚжқӮзҡ„`OR`жқЎд»¶е…іиҒ”жҹҘиҜўе’Ңз”ЁдәҺеҺ»йҮҚзҡ„е…іиҒ”еӯҗжҹҘиҜўгҖӮеӯҳеңЁзҡ„дё»иҰҒжҖ§иғҪз“¶йўҲпјҡ1. **ж— иҫ“еҮәзҡ„JOINж“ҚдҪң**пјҡжҹҘиҜўеҜ№`serie`иЎЁиҝӣиЎҢдәҶдёӨж¬ЎLEFT JOINпјҲеҲҶеҲ«дҪңдёә`serie`е’Ң`exchange_serie`пјүпјҢдҪҶеңЁSELECTеҲ—иЎЁдёӯе№¶жңӘиҜ·жұӮиҝҷдәӣиЎЁзҡ„д»»дҪ•еӯ—ж®өпјҢд»…з”ЁдәҺWHEREеӯҗеҸҘзҡ„иҝҮж»ӨгҖӮиҝҷз§ҚеҶҷжі•еўһеҠ дәҶдёҚеҝ…иҰҒзҡ„иҝһжҺҘејҖй”ҖгҖӮ2. **и°“иҜҚжңӘдёӢжҺЁ**пјҡWHEREеӯҗеҸҘдёӯеҢ…еҗ«и·ЁиЎЁзҡ„`OR`йҖ»иҫ‘ `(A AND B) OR (C AND D)`пјҢиҝҷйҖҡеёёйҳ»жӯўдјҳеҢ–еҷЁжңүж•Ҳең°еҲ©з”Ёзҙўеј•иҝӣиЎҢиҝҮж»ӨпјҢеҜјиҮҙдјҳеҢ–еҷЁеҸҜиғҪйҖүжӢ©жү«жҸҸж•ҙдёӘ`claim`иЎЁеҗҺеҶҚиҝӣиЎҢиҝҮж»ӨпјҢиҖҢдёҚжҳҜе…ҲйҖҡиҝҮзҙўеј•е®ҡдҪҚгҖӮ3. **жҳӮиҙөзҡ„е…іиҒ”еӯҗжҹҘиҜў**пјҡдёәдәҶдҝқз•ҷжҜҸдёӘ`claim_folder_id`дёӢзҡ„жңҖж–°и®°еҪ•пјҢдҪҝз”ЁдәҶе…іиҒ”еӯҗжҹҘиҜў `c.id = (SELECT MAX(...) ...)`пјҢиҝҷдјҡеҜјиҮҙеҜ№жҜҸдёҖиЎҢз»“жһңйғҪжү§иЎҢдёҖж¬ЎеӯҗжҹҘиҜўпјҲN+1й—®йўҳпјүпјҢеңЁж•°жҚ®йҮҸеӨ§ж—¶жҖ§иғҪжҖҘеү§дёӢйҷҚгҖӮ", "create_table_statements": ["CREATE TABLE claim (id int PRIMARY KEY, sap_code nvarchar(4000), claim_folder_id int, repair_date datetime, claim_status_id int, is_e2e bit, serie_id int, exchange_serie_id int, serial_number nvarchar(4000), production_code nvarchar(4000), exchange_serial_number nvarchar(4000), exchange_production_code nvarchar(4000));", "CREATE TABLE serie (id int PRIMARY KEY, sap_code nvarchar(4000));", "CREATE INDEX idx_claim_folder ON claim(claim_folder_id);", "CREATE INDEX idx_claim_serial ON claim(serial_number);", "CREATE INDEX idx_serie_sap ON serie(sap_code);"], "sql": "SELECT c.id, 
 В  c.sap_code, 
 В  c.claim_folder_id, 
 В  DATEDIFF(day, c.repair_date, GETDATE()) AS DATE_REPAIR_DIFF, 
 В  c.claim_status_id AS status, 
 В  c.is_e2e AS e2e 
FROM claim c 
LEFT JOIN serie 
ON serie.id = c.serie_id 
LEFT JOIN serie exchange_serie 
ON exchange_serie.id = c.exchange_serie_id 
WHERE ( ((serie.sap_code = @P0 
OR serie.sap_code = CONCAT('4000', @P1)) 
AND c.serial_number = @P2 
AND c.production_code = @P3) 
OR ((exchange_serie.sap_code = @P4 
OR exchange_serie.sap_code = CONCAT('4000', @P5)) 
AND c.exchange_serial_number = @P6 
AND c.exchange_production_code = @P7) ) 
AND (c.serial_number NOT IN (@P8) 
AND c.production_code NOT IN (@P9, @P10, @P11)) 
AND c.id = 
 В  (
 В  SELECT MAX(c2.id) 
 В  FROM claim c2 
 В  WHERE c2.claim_folder_id = c.claim_folder_id 
 В  OR (c.claim_folder_id IS NULL 
 В AND c2.id = c.id)
 В  ) 
ORDER BY c.id DESC

*/
(@P0 nvarchar(4000),@P1 nvarchar(4000),@P2 nvarchar(4000),@P3 nvarchar(4000),@P4 nvarchar(4000),@P5 
nvarchar(4000),@P6 nvarchar(4000),@P7 nvarchar(4000),@P8 nvarchar(4000),@P9 nvarchar(4000),@P10 В

model_answers.model_answer: SELECT s.student_id, s.student_name, c.course_name, e.enrollment_date, t.teacher_name FROM enrollments e JOIN students s ON s.student_id = e.student_id JOIN courses c ON c.course_id = e.course_id LEFT JOIN teachers t ON c.department_id = t.teacher_id LEFT JOIN departments d ON t.department_id = d.department_id AND d.location = 'Building A' WHERE e.enrollment_year = 2024 AND e.enrollment_date BETWEEN '2024-01-01' AND '2024-06-30' AND s.enroll_count > 5 AND s.major = 'Physics' AND c.course_credits >= 3 AND c.course_name LIKE 'Advanced %';

## Original SQL:
SELECT afi.pkid,afi.FILE_TITLE,afi.FILE_CODE fdNo,w.sumNumber countNumber FROM (
  SELECT  max(CONTENT_ID) CONTENT_ID,sum(countNumber) sumNumber ,max(ARCHIVE_ID) ARCHIVE_ID FROM (
  SELECT CONTENT_ID,count(1) countNumber from
  DOC_VIEW_HISTORY WHERE CONTENT_TYPE= 'org.demo.repository.model.RecordEntry' AND  CONTENT_ID IS NOT NULL
  <if test="startDate != null and startDate != ''">
   and ACCESS_TIME >= to_date(#{startDate},'yyyy-mm-dd')
  </if>
  <if test="endDate != null and endDate != ''">
   and ACCESS_TIME <= to_date(#{endDate},'yyyy-mm-dd')
  </if>
  GROUP BY CONTENT_ID ) t LEFT JOIN ARCHIVE_FILE af ON af.REF_ID = t.CONTENT_ID
  GROUP BY ARCHIVE_ID order by  sumNumber desc ) w
  LEFT JOIN ARCHIVE_FILE_INFO afi
  ON afi.PKID = w.ARCHIVE_ID
  left join ARCHIVE_CATEGORY_INFO aci  ON aci.PKID  = afi.CATEGORY_ID
  <where>
   afi.IS_DELETED = '0'
   <if test=" categoryTypeIds != null  and categoryTypeIds.size>0">
  and  aci.TYPE_ID in
  <foreach collection="categoryTypeIds" item="typeId" open="(" separator="," close=")">
  #{typeId}
  </foreach>
   </if>
   and rownum <![CDATA[ <= ]]> 10
  </where>

## Table Definitions:
CREATE SEQUENCE mrtopration_seq; CREATE TABLE mrtopration (ID NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, PRAMARYID NUMBER, OPERCODE VARCHAR2(50), OPERNAME VARCHAR2(100), OPERDEPT VARCHAR2(100), OPERDATE DATE NOT NULL, MARK VARCHAR2(500), MARK2 VARCHAR2(500), MARK3 VARCHAR2(500), MARK4 VARCHAR2(500), OPERTYPE VARCHAR2(50), NEXTOPERTYPE VARCHAR2(50), PREOPERTYPE VARCHAR2(50), VALID NUMBER(1), CONFIRMUSER VARCHAR2(100), CONFIRMDEPT VARCHAR2(100), VERSIONNUMBER NUMBER); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER mrtopration_bi BEFORE INSERT ON mrtopration FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.ID IS NULL THEN SELECT mrtopration_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.ID FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_mrtopration_operdate ON mrtopration(OPERDATE);
CREATE INDEX idx_mrtopration_opercode ON mrtopration(OPERCODE);
CREATE SEQUENCE mrtrecordinfo_seq; CREATE TABLE mrtrecordinfo (ID NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, IN_TIMES NUMBER, NAME VARCHAR2(100), IN_DATE DATE, OUT_DATE DATE, OUT_DEPT VARCHAR2(100), RECORD_STATE VARCHAR2(50)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER mrtrecordinfo_bi BEFORE INSERT ON mrtrecordinfo FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.ID IS NULL THEN SELECT mrtrecordinfo_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.ID FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_mrtrecordinfo_indate ON mrtrecordinfo(IN_DATE);
CREATE TABLE mrtrecordregresses (RECODE_NO NUMBER NOT NULL, OPER_DATE DATE NOT NULL, OPERID VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, BACKREASON VARCHAR2(500), CONSTRAINT pk_mrtrecordregresses PRIMARY KEY (RECODE_NO, OPER_DATE, OPERID));

## Original SQL:
SELECT A.ID AS id, A.PRAMARYID AS primaryId, A.OPERCODE AS operCode, A.OPERNAME AS operName, A.OPERDEPT AS operDept, A.OPERDATE AS operDate, A.MARK AS mark, C.BACKREASON AS mark1, A.MARK2 AS mark2, A.MARK3 AS mark3, A.MARK4 AS mark4, A.OPERTYPE AS operType, A.NEXTOPERTYPE AS nextOperType, A.PREOPERTYPE AS preOperType, A.VALID AS valid, A.CONFIRMUSER AS confirmUser, A.CONFIRMDEPT AS confirmDept, A.VERSIONNUMBER AS versionNumber, B.IN_TIMES AS inTimes, B.NAME AS patient, B.IN_DATE AS inDate, B.OUT_DATE AS outDate, B.OUT_DEPT AS outDept, B.RECORD_STATE AS recordState FROM mrtopration A LEFT JOIN mrtrecordinfo B ON A.ID = B.ID LEFT JOIN mrtrecordregresses C ON B.ID = C.RECODE_NO AND A.OPERDATE = C.OPER_DATE AND A.OPERCODE = C.OPERID WHERE A.ID IN (SELECT bid FROM (SELECT B.ID AS bid, B.IN_DATE AS inDate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY B.IN_DATE DESC) AS rn FROM mrtopration A LEFT JOIN mrtrecordinfo B ON A.ID = B.ID WHERE B.ID LIKE :"SYS_B_0" || :1 || :" SYS_B_1" GROUP BY B.ID, B.IN_DATE) WHERE rn BETWEEN :2 + :"SYS_B_2" AND :3 + :4 ) ORDER BY A.OPERDATE DESC

model_answers.model_answer: SELECT A.ID AS id, A.PRAMARYID AS primaryId, A.OPERCODE AS operCode, A.OPERNAME AS operName, A.OPERDEPT AS operDept, A.OPERDATE AS operDate, A.MARK AS mark, C.BACKREASON AS mark1, A.MARK2 AS mark2, A.MARK3 AS mark3, A.MARK4 AS mark4, A.OPERTYPE AS operType, A.NEXTOPERTYPE AS nextOperType, A.PREOPERTYPE AS preOperType, A.VALID AS valid, A.CONFIRMUSER AS confirmUser, A.CONFIRMDEPT AS confirmDept, A.VERSIONNUMBER AS versionNumber, B.IN_TIMES AS inTimes, B.NAME AS patient, B.IN_DATE AS inDate, B.OUT_DATE AS outDate, B.OUT_DEPT AS outDept, B.RECORD_STATE AS recordState FROM mrtopration A JOIN (SELECT bid FROM (SELECT B.ID AS bid, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY B.IN_DATE DESC) AS rn FROM mrtrecordinfo B WHERE B.ID LIKE :"SYS_B_0" || :1 || :"SYS_B_1") WHERE rn BETWEEN :2 + :"SYS_B_2" AND :3 + :4) D ON A.ID = D.bid LEFT JOIN mrtrecordinfo B ON A.ID = B.ID LEFT JOIN mrtrecordregresses C ON B.ID = C.RECODE_NO AND A.OPERDATE = C.OPER_DATE AND A.OPERCODE = C.OPERID ORDER BY A.OPERDATE DESC

{"case_id": "24", "db_type": "oracle", "description": "иҝҷжҳҜдёҖз§Қз»Ҹе…ёзҡ„UNION ALLж¶ҲйҷӨдјҳеҢ–жҠҖжңҜгҖӮеҪ“UNION ALLзҡ„еӨҡдёӘеҲҶж”ҜжҹҘиҜўзӣёеҗҢзҡ„иЎЁпјҢдё”д»…еңЁSELECTеҲ—иЎЁзҡ„и®Ўз®—йҖ»иҫ‘жҲ–WHEREжқЎд»¶зҡ„еёёйҮҸеҖјдёҠжңүе·®ејӮж—¶пјҢеҸҜд»ҘйҖҡиҝҮCASEиЎЁиҫҫејҸе°ҶдёҚеҗҢзҡ„и®Ўз®—йҖ»иҫ‘з»ҹдёҖеҲ°дёҖдёӘSELECTиҜӯеҸҘдёӯгҖӮж”№еҶҷзҡ„ж ёеҝғжҳҜе°Ҷ'metric_name IN (йӣҶеҗҲ1) иҝ”еӣһround(VALUE,2)'е’Ң'metric_name IN (йӣҶеҗҲ2) иҝ”еӣһround(VALUE*10,2)'дёӨдёӘеҲҶж”ҜпјҢеҗҲе№¶дёә'metric_name IN (йӣҶеҗҲ1+йӣҶеҗҲ2) иҝ”еӣһCASE WHEN...END'гҖӮиҝҷж ·WHEREжқЎд»¶д»ҺдёӨж¬ЎеҲҶеҲ«иҝҮж»ӨеҸҳдёәдёҖж¬ЎиҝҮж»ӨжӣҙеӨ§зҡ„йӣҶеҗҲпјҢSELECTеҲ—иЎЁдҪҝз”ЁCASEж №жҚ®metric_nameеҠЁжҖҒйҖүжӢ©и®Ўз®—ж–№ејҸгҖӮиҝҷз§Қж”№еҶҷеңЁдҝқиҜҒйҖ»иҫ‘зӯүд»·зҡ„еүҚжҸҗдёӢпјҢжҳҫи‘—еҮҸе°‘дәҶI/Oж“ҚдҪңгҖӮ", "difficulty_level": "1", "create_table_statements": ["CREATE SEQUENCE gv_session_seq; CREATE TABLE gv$session (session_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, inst_id NUMBER NOT NULL, TYPE VARCHAR2(20) NOT NULL, status VARCHAR2(20)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER gv_session_bi BEFORE INSERT ON gv$session FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.session_id IS NULL THEN SELECT gv_session_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.session_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_gv_session_inst_id ON gv$session(inst_id);", "CREATE INDEX idx_gv_session_type_status ON gv$session(TYPE, status);", "CREATE SEQUENCE gv_sysmetric_seq; CREATE TABLE gv$sysmetric (metric_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, inst_id NUMBER NOT NULL, end_time TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, metric_name VARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL, VALUE NUMBER(20,2), intsize_csec NUMBER); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER gv_sysmetric_bi BEFORE INSERT ON gv$sysmetric FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.metric_id IS NULL THEN SELECT gv_sysmetric_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.metric_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_gv_sysmetric_inst_id ON gv$sysmetric(inst_id);", "CREATE INDEX idx_gv_sysmetric_intsize ON gv$sysmetric(intsize_csec);", "CREATE INDEX idx_gv_sysmetric_metric_name ON gv$sysmetric(metric_name);"], "sql": "SELECT
  c.inst_id,
  m.end_time AS checktime,
  c.conn,
  c.activeconn,
  m.sqlthroughput,
  m.sqlavgtime,
  m.user_commits,
  m.user_rollbacks,
  m.user_commits + m.user_rollbacks AS transactioncount,
  m.transactionavgtime
FROM
  (
  WITH
   t1 AS (
  SELECT
  inst_id,
  COUNT(*) conn
  FROM
  gv$session
  WHERE
  TYPE = 'USER'
  GROUP BY
  inst_id
   ),
   t2 AS (
  SELECT
  inst_id,
  COUNT(*) activeconn
  FROM
  gv$session
  WHERE
  TYPE = 'USER'
  AND status = 'ACTIVE'
  GROUP BY
  inst_id
   )
  SELECT
   t1.inst_id,
   t1.conn,
   t2.activeconn
  FROM
   t1,
   t2
  WHERE
   t1.inst_id = t2.inst_id
  ) c,
  (
  SELECT
   *
  FROM
   (
  SELECT
  inst_id,
  end_time,
  metric_name,
  round(VALUE, 2) VALUE
  FROM
  gv$sysmetric
  WHERE
  round(intsize_csec / 100, 0) = 60
  AND metric_name IN (
   'Executions Per Sec',
   'User Commits Per Sec',
   'User Rollbacks Per Sec'
  )
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
  inst_id,
  end_time,
  metric_name,
  round(VALUE * 10, 2) VALUE
  FROM
  gv$sysmetric
  WHERE
  round(intsize_csec / 100, 0) = 60
  AND metric_name IN (
   'SQL Service Response Time',
   'Response Time Per Txn'
  )
   ) PIVOT (
  AVG(VALUE) FOR metric_name IN (
  'Executions Per Sec' sqlthroughput,
  'SQL Service Response Time' sqlavgtime,
  'User Commits Per Sec' user_commits,
  'User Rollbacks Per Sec' user_rollbacks,
  'Response Time Per Txn' transactionavgtime
  )
   )
  ) m
WHERE
  c.inst_id = m.inst_id
ORDER BY

## Original SQL:
SELECT
  c.inst_id,
  m.end_time AS checktime,
  c.conn,
  c.activeconn,
  m.sqlthroughput,
  m.sqlavgtime,
  m.user_commits,
  m.user_rollbacks,
  m.user_commits + m.user_rollbacks AS transactioncount,
  m.transactionavgtime
FROM
  (
  WITH
   t1 AS (
  SELECT
  inst_id,
  COUNT(*) conn
  FROM
  gv$session
  WHERE
  TYPE = 'USER'
  GROUP BY
  inst_id
   ),
   t2 AS (
  SELECT
  inst_id,
  COUNT(*) activeconn
  FROM
  gv$session
  WHERE
  TYPE = 'USER'
  AND status = 'ACTIVE'
  GROUP BY
  inst_id
   )
  SELECT
   t1.inst_id,
   t1.conn,
   t2.activeconn
  FROM
   t1,
   t2
  WHERE
   t1.inst_id = t2.inst_id
  ) c,
  (
  SELECT
   *
  FROM
   (
  SELECT
  inst_id,
  end_time,
  metric_name,
  round(VALUE, 2) VALUE
  FROM
  gv$sysmetric
  WHERE
  round(intsize_csec / 100, 0) = 60
  AND metric_name IN (
   'Executions Per Sec',
   'User Commits Per Sec',
   'User Rollbacks Per Sec'
  )
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
  inst_id,
  end_time,
  metric_name,
  round(VALUE * 10, 2) VALUE
  FROM
  gv$sysmetric
  WHERE
  round(intsize_csec / 100, 0) = 60
  AND metric_name IN (
   'SQL Service Response Time',
   'Response Time Per Txn'
  )
   ) PIVOT (
  AVG(VALUE) FOR metric_name IN (
  'Executions Per Sec' sqlthroughput,
  'SQL Service Response Time' sqlavgtime,
  'User Commits Per Sec' user_commits,
  'User Rollbacks Per Sec' user_rollbacks,
  'Response Time Per Txn' transactionavgtime
  )
   )
  ) m
WHERE
  c.inst_id = m.inst_id
ORDER BY
  inst_id

model_answers.model_answer: SELECT c.inst_id, m.end_time AS checktime, c.conn, c.activeconn, m.sqlthroughput, m.sqlavgtime, m.user_commits, m.user_rollbacks, m.user_commits + m.user_rollbacks AS transactioncount, m.transactionavgtime FROM ( SELECT inst_id, COUNT(*) conn, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 END) activeconn FROM gv$session WHERE TYPE = 'USER' GROUP BY inst_id ) c, ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT inst_id, end_time, metric_name, CASE WHEN metric_name IN ('SQL Service Response Time','Response Time Per Txn') THEN round(VALUE * 10, 2) ELSE round(VALUE, 2) END VALUE FROM gv$sysmetric WHERE intsize_csec BETWEEN 5950 AND 6049 AND metric_name IN ('Executions Per Sec','User Commits Per Sec','User Rollbacks Per Sec','SQL Service Response Time','Response Time Per Txn') ) PIVOT ( AVG(VALUE) FOR metric_name IN ('Executions Per Sec' sqlthroughput, 'SQL Service Response Time' sqlavgtime, 'User Commits Per Sec' user_commits, 'User Rollbacks Per Sec' user_rollbacks, 'Response Time Per Txn' transactionavgtime) ) ) m WHERE c.inst_id = m.inst_id ORDER BY c.inst_id

WITH acctg AS (SELECT A.tenant_id, A.gl_account_id, B.acctg_period, sum(A.base_posted_dr) AS base_posted_dr1, sum(A.base_posted_cr) AS base_posted_cr1 FROM acctg_trans_detail A LEFT JOIN acctg_trans B ON A.master_voucher_id = B.id AND B.tenant_id = 1065587309019136 WHERE A.tenant_id = 1065587309019136 AND (A.voucher_status_enum IS NULL OR A.voucher_status_enum != 'CANCELLED') AND (B.bo_name IS NULL OR B.bo_name != 'DraftAcctgTrans') GROUP BY A.tenant_id, A.gl_account_id, B.acctg_period) SELECT acctg.tenant_id, acctg.gl_account_id, ac.code, acctg.acctg_period, A.base_posted_dr, A.base_posted_cr, acctg.base_posted_dr1, acctg.base_posted_cr1 FROM acctg LEFT JOIN gl_account_balance A ON A.gl_account_id = acctg.gl_account_id AND A.acctg_period = acctg.acctg_period AND A.tenant_id = 1065587309019136 LEFT JOIN gl_account ac ON ac.id = acctg.gl_account_id AND ac.tenant_id = 1065587309019136 WHERE acctg.base_posted_dr1 != ifnull(A.base_posted_dr, 0) OR acctg.base_posted_cr1 != ifnull(A.base_posted_cr, 0) UNION SELECT A.tenant_id, A.gl_account_id, ac.code, A.acctg_period, A.base_posted_dr, A.base_posted_cr, acctg.base_posted_dr1, acctg.base_posted_cr1 FROM gl_account_balance A LEFT JOIN acctg ON acctg.gl_account_id = A.gl_account_id AND acctg.acctg_period = A.acctg_period AND acctg.tenant_id = A.tenant_id LEFT JOIN gl_account ac ON ac.id = A.gl_account_id AND ac.tenant_id = 1065587309019136 WHERE A.tenant_id = 1065587309019136 AND A.acctg_period NOT LIKE '%00' AND (A.base_posted_dr != ifnull(acctg.base_posted_dr1, 0) OR A.base_posted_cr != ifnull(acctg.base_posted_cr1, 0)) LIMIT 50001;

Given the table definitions, explain output and the original SQL, apply appropriate optimizations.
Output only the optimized SQL as a single-line statement with no markdown or extra text.

## Table Definitions:
CREATE TABLE cash_transaction (id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, member_num VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, balance DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, created_on TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, cash_type INTEGER NOT NULL);
CREATE INDEX idx_cash_transaction_member_num ON cash_transaction(member_num);
CREATE INDEX idx_cash_transaction_cash_type ON cash_transaction(cash_type);
CREATE INDEX idx_cash_transaction_composite ON cash_transaction(member_num, cash_type, id DESC);
CREATE TABLE cash (id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, member_num VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE, credit_available DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0);
CREATE INDEX idx_cash_member_num ON cash(member_num);

## Original SQL:
with temp as(
 select * from (
 select ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY member_num ORDER BY id desc)a,
 member_num,balance,created_on
 from cash_transaction where cash_type=2 )a
 where a=1 and balance<>0)
 select * from temp a 
 full outer join
 ( select * from  cash where  credit_available<>0)b
 on a.member_num=b.member_num
 where a.balance<>b.credit_available
 or a.member_num is null
 or b.member_num is null

## Optimized SQL:

model_answers.model_answer: WITH temp AS (SELECT member_num, balance, created_on FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (member_num) member_num, balance, created_on FROM cash_transaction WHERE cash_type=2 ORDER BY member_num, id DESC) s WHERE balance <> 0) SELECT * FROM temp a FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT * FROM cash WHERE credit_available <> 0) b ON a.member_num = b.member_num WHERE a.balance <> b.credit_available OR a.member_num IS NULL OR b.member_num IS NULL;

{"case_id": "28", "db_type": "oracle", "description": "жң¬ж¬Ўж”№еҶҷдё»иҰҒеҒҡдәҶдёӨж–№йқўдјҳеҢ–пјҡ1) ж¶ҲйҷӨдәҶеӯҗжҹҘиҜўдёӯи®Ўз®—дҪҶд»ҺжңӘдҪҝз”Ёзҡ„first_tran_dateеӯ—ж®өпјҢеҮҸе°‘дәҶдёҖж¬Ўmin()иҒҡеҗҲж“ҚдҪңпјӣ2) е°Ҷonhold_accountsиҝҷдёӘеҶ…иҒ”и§Ҷеӣҫеұ•ејҖпјҢзӣҙжҺҘеңЁдё»жҹҘиҜўдёӯJOIN audit_headerе’Ңaudit_detailиЎЁпјҢе№¶е°ҶиҝҮж»ӨжқЎд»¶з§»еҲ°WHEREеӯҗеҸҘдёӯгҖӮиҝҷз§Қж”№еҶҷзҗҶи®әдёҠеҸҜд»Ҙз»ҷдјҳеҢ–еҷЁжӣҙеӨҡзҡ„дјҳеҢ–з©әй—ҙпјҢдҪҶз”ұдәҺеҺҹSQLз»“жһ„е·Із»ҸиҫғдёәдјҳеҢ–пјҢе®һйҷ…ж”¶зӣҠжңүйҷҗгҖӮ", "difficulty_level": "3", "create_table_statements": ["CREATE SEQUENCE accounts_seq; CREATE TABLE accounts (acc_account_no VARCHAR2(50), acc_subacc_no VARCHAR2(50), acc_incep_date DATE NOT NULL, acc_act_code VARCHAR2(20), acc_gact_type VARCHAR2(10), PRIMARY KEY (acc_account_no, acc_subacc_no)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER accounts_bi BEFORE INSERT ON accounts FOR EACH ROW BEGIN NULL; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_accounts_act_code ON accounts(acc_act_code);", "CREATE INDEX idx_accounts_gact_type ON accounts(acc_gact_type);", "CREATE INDEX idx_accounts_incep_date ON accounts(acc_incep_date);", "CREATE SEQUENCE account_headers_seq; CREATE TABLE account_headers (acch_account_no VARCHAR2(50) PRIMARY KEY, acch_title VARCHAR2(200), acch_brn_code VARCHAR2(20)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER account_headers_bi BEFORE INSERT ON account_headers FOR EACH ROW BEGIN NULL; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_acch_account_no ON account_headers(acch_account_no);", "CREATE SEQUENCE account_types_seq; CREATE TABLE account_types (act_code VARCHAR2(20) PRIMARY KEY, act_long_name VARCHAR2(100)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER account_types_bi BEFORE INSERT ON account_types FOR EACH ROW BEGIN NULL; END;", "CREATE SEQUENCE transactions_seq; CREATE TABLE transactions (tran_seqno NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, tran_account_no VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, tran_subacc_no VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, tran_date DATE NOT NULL, tran_amount_cr NUMBER(18,2), tran_trans_code VARCHAR2(20), tran_pay_method VARCHAR2(10), tran_create_by VARCHAR2(50)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER transactions_bi BEFORE INSERT ON transactions FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.tran_seqno IS NULL THEN SELECT transactions_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.tran_seqno FROM DUAL; END IF; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_trans_account_subacc ON transactions(tran_account_no, tran_subacc_no);", "CREATE INDEX idx_trans_date ON transactions(tran_date);", "CREATE INDEX idx_trans_trans_code ON transactions(tran_trans_code);", "CREATE INDEX idx_trans_pay_method ON transactions(tran_pay_method);", "CREATE SEQUENCE audit_header_seq; CREATE TABLE audit_header (audh_seqno NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, audh_key1 VARCHAR2(50), audh_key2 VARCHAR2(50), audh_date DATE, audh_table_prefix VARCHAR2(20), audh_change_type VARCHAR2(10)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER audit_header_bi BEFORE INSERT ON audit_header FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.audh_seqno IS NULL THEN SELECT audit_header_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.audh_seqno FROM DUAL; END IF; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_audh_keys ON audit_header(audh_key1, audh_key2);", "CREATE INDEX idx_audh_table_prefix ON audit_header(audh_table_prefix);", "CREATE INDEX idx_audh_change_type ON audit_header(audh_change_type);", "CREATE SEQUENCE audit_detail_seq; CREATE TABLE audit_detail (audd_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, audd_audh_seqno NUMBER NOT NULL, audd_col_sufix VARCHAR2(50), audd_old_value VARCHAR2(200), audd_new_value VARCHAR2(200)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER audit_detail_bi BEFORE INSERT ON audit_detail FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.audd_id IS NULL THEN SELECT audit_detail_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.audd_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_audd_audh_seqno ON audit_detail(audd_audh_seqno);", "CREATE INDEX idx_audd_col_sufix ON audit_detail(audd_col_sufix);", "CREATE SEQUENCE account_links_seq; CREATE TABLE ACCOUNT_LINKS (accl_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, accl_account_no VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, accl_subacc_no VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, accl_holder_pos NUMBER, accl_cust_seqno NUMBER); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER account_links_bi BEFORE INSERT ON ACCOUNT_LINKS FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.accl_id IS NULL THEN SELECT account_links_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.accl_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_accl_account_subacc ON ACCOUNT_LINKS(accl_account_no, accl_subacc_no);", "CREATE INDEX idx_accl_holder_pos ON ACCOUNT_LINKS(accl_holder_pos);", "CREATE SEQUENCE account_holding_tax_seq; CREATE TABLE SUMMIT.ACCOUNT_HOLDING_TAX (acctax_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, ACCTAX_ACCOUNT_NO VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, ACCTAX_SUBACC_NO VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, ACCTAX_CUST_SEQNO NUMBER, ACCTAX_EFF_DATE_FROM DATE); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER account_holding_tax_bi BEFORE INSERT ON SUMMIT.ACCOUNT_HOLDING_TAX FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.acctax_id IS NULL THEN SELECT account_holding_tax_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.acctax_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_acctax_composite ON SUMMIT.ACCOUNT_HOLDING_TAX(ACCTAX_ACCOUNT_NO, ACCTAX_SUBACC_NO, ACCTAX_CUST_SEQNO);"], "sql": "SELECT DISTINCT acc_account_no, 
  acc_subacc_no, 
  acch_title,
  to_char(acc_incep_date,'DD/MM/YYYY') acc_incep_date,
  htax.ACCTAX_EFF_DATE_FROM,
  to_char(onhold_accounts.audh_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') approved_date,
  act_long_name, 
  tran_amount_cr,
  tran_create_by,
  CASE WHEN (trunc(acc_incep_date) - trunc(onhold_accounts.audh_date)) < 0 THEN 0 ELSE
   (trunc(acc_incep_date) - trunc(onhold_accounts.audh_date)) END time_on_approved,
  acch_brn_code
  FROM
  (
   (
  SELECT accounts.acc_account_no,
   acch_title, 
   accounts.acc_subacc_no,
   acc_incep_date,
   act_long_name,
   tran_amount_cr,
   transactions.tran_create_by,
   first_tran_date,
   acch_brn_code
  FROM accounts 
  JOIN account_headers ON account_headers.acch_account_no = accounts.acc_account_no
  JOIN account_types ON acc_act_code = act_code
  JOIN 
   (
  SELECT tran_account_no, tran_subacc_no, min(tran_seqno) first_tran_seq, min(tran_date) first_tran_date
  FROM transactions
  WHERE tran_amount_cr IS NOT NULL
  AND tran_trans_code IN ('RIC','RSAV')
  AND tran_date BETWEEN IN_FUND_FROM_DATE AND IN_FUND_TO_DATE
  AND tran_pay_method not in ('C','CQ')   --Exclude cash and cheque receipts as those accounts will already have the passbook.
  GROUP BY tran_account_no, tran_subacc_no
   ) first_trans
   ON tran_account_no = acc_account_no AND tran_subacc_no = acc_subacc_no
  JOIN transactions ON tran_seqno = first_trans.first_tran_seq
  WHERE acc_gact_type IN ('S', 'IC') 
   AND acc_incep_date BETWEEN IN_INCEP_FROM_DATE and IN_INCEP_TO_DATE
   ) opened_accounts
   JOIN
   (
  SELECT audh_key1, audh_key2, audh_date, audd_old_value, audd_new_value
  FROM audit_header
  JOIN audit_detail
   ON audh_seqno = audd_audh_seqno
  WHERE audh_table_prefix = 'ACC'
   AND audd_col_sufix = 'PROCESS_STATUS'
   AND audh_change_type  = 'I'
   AND audd_old_value IS NULL 
   AND audd_new_value = 1
   ) onhold_accounts
  ON opened_accounts.acc_account_no = onhold_accounts.audh_key1
   AND opened_accounts.acc_subacc_no = onhold_accounts.audh_key2
   JOIN ACCOUNT_LINKS al ON al.accl_account_no = opened_accounts.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO and al.accl_subacc_no = opened_accounts.ACC_SUBACC_NO and al.accl_holder_pos = 1
   JOIN SUMMIT.ACCOUNT_HOLDING_TAX htax 
  ON htax.ACCTAX_ACCOUNT_NO = al.ACCL_ACCOUNT_NO
   AND htax.ACCTAX_SUBACC_NO = al.ACCL_SUBACC_NO
   AND htax.ACCTAX_CUST_SEQNO = al.ACCL_CUST_SEQNO
  )", "explain": "ID	PLAN_STEP	COST	CARDINALITY	BYTES	CPU_COST	IO_COST

## Original SQL:
SELECT DISTINCT acc_account_no, 
  acc_subacc_no, 
  acch_title,
  to_char(acc_incep_date,'DD/MM/YYYY') acc_incep_date,
  htax.ACCTAX_EFF_DATE_FROM,
  to_char(onhold_accounts.audh_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') approved_date,
  act_long_name, 
  tran_amount_cr,
  tran_create_by,
  CASE WHEN (trunc(acc_incep_date) - trunc(onhold_accounts.audh_date)) < 0 THEN 0 ELSE
   (trunc(acc_incep_date) - trunc(onhold_accounts.audh_date)) END time_on_approved,
  acch_brn_code
  FROM
  (
   (
  SELECT accounts.acc_account_no,
   acch_title, 
   accounts.acc_subacc_no,
   acc_incep_date,
   act_long_name,
   tran_amount_cr,
   transactions.tran_create_by,
   first_tran_date,
   acch_brn_code
  FROM accounts 
  JOIN account_headers ON account_headers.acch_account_no = accounts.acc_account_no
  JOIN account_types ON acc_act_code = act_code
  JOIN 
   (
  SELECT tran_account_no, tran_subacc_no, min(tran_seqno) first_tran_seq, min(tran_date) first_tran_date
  FROM transactions
  WHERE tran_amount_cr IS NOT NULL
  AND tran_trans_code IN ('RIC','RSAV')
  AND tran_date BETWEEN IN_FUND_FROM_DATE AND IN_FUND_TO_DATE
  AND tran_pay_method not in ('C','CQ')   --Exclude cash and cheque receipts as those accounts will already have the passbook.
  GROUP BY tran_account_no, tran_subacc_no
   ) first_trans
   ON tran_account_no = acc_account_no AND tran_subacc_no = acc_subacc_no
  JOIN transactions ON tran_seqno = first_trans.first_tran_seq
  WHERE acc_gact_type IN ('S', 'IC') 
   AND acc_incep_date BETWEEN IN_INCEP_FROM_DATE and IN_INCEP_TO_DATE
   ) opened_accounts
   JOIN
   (
  SELECT audh_key1, audh_key2, audh_date, audd_old_value, audd_new_value
  FROM audit_header
  JOIN audit_detail
   ON audh_seqno = audd_audh_seqno
  WHERE audh_table_prefix = 'ACC'
   AND audd_col_sufix = 'PROCESS_STATUS'
   AND audh_change_type  = 'I'
   AND audd_old_value IS NULL 
   AND audd_new_value = 1
   ) onhold_accounts
  ON opened_accounts.acc_account_no = onhold_accounts.audh_key1
   AND opened_accounts.acc_subacc_no = onhold_accounts.audh_key2
   JOIN ACCOUNT_LINKS al ON al.accl_account_no = opened_accounts.ACC_ACCOUNT_NO and al.accl_subacc_no = opened_accounts.ACC_SUBACC_NO and al.accl_holder_pos = 1
   JOIN SUMMIT.ACCOUNT_HOLDING_TAX htax 
  ON htax.ACCTAX_ACCOUNT_NO = al.ACCL_ACCOUNT_NO
   AND htax.ACCTAX_SUBACC_NO = al.ACCL_SUBACC_NO
   AND htax.ACCTAX_CUST_SEQNO = al.ACCL_CUST_SEQNO
  )

END IF; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_businodeinst_nodeinstid ON businodeinst(nodeinstid);", "CREATE INDEX idx_businodeinst_flowinstid ON businodeinst(flowinstid);", "CREATE SEQUENCE busiflowinst_seq; CREATE TABLE busiflowinst (id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, flowinstid VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, status VARCHAR2(10)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER busiflowinst_bi BEFORE INSERT ON busiflowinst FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.id IS NULL THEN SELECT busiflowinst_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_busiflowinst_flowinstid ON busiflowinst(flowinstid);", "CREATE INDEX idx_busiflowinst_composite ON busiflowinst(flowinstid, status);"], "sql": "select
  count(*)
from
  (
  select
   tt.jobid,
   tt.tellercode,
   tt.jobname,
   tt.jobstatus,
   tt.jobstartpersname,
   tt.jobpriorpersname,
   tt.jobtype,
   tt.createtime,
   tt.tranname,
   tt.issucc,
   tt.tranprop,
   tt.trandata,
   tt.jbjg,
   tt.jbgy,
   tt.ldlcid
  from
   (
  select
  t3.jobid,
  t3.tellercode,
  t3.jobname,
  t3.jobstatus,
  t3.jobstartpersname,
  t3.jobpriorpersname,
  t3.jobtype,
  t3.createtime,
  t3.tranname,
  t3.issucc,
  t3.tranprop,
  t3.trandata,
  t3.jbjg,
  t3.jbgy,
  t3.ldlcid,
  row_number() over (
   partition by
  t3.jobid
   order by
  t3.createtime desc
  ) as rn
  from
  jobinfo_his t3
  where
  exists (
   select
  t2.jobid
   from
  jobinfo_his t2
   where
  t2.jobid = t3.jobid
  and exists (
  select
   t1.jobid
  from
   jobinfo_his t1
  where
   t1.jobid = t2.jobid
   and t1.jobstatus = 'O'
   and substr(jobid, 0, 1) = 'A'
  )
   group by
  t2.jobid
   having
  count(decode(t2.jobstatus, 'N', 1, null)) = 0
  )
   ) tt
  where
   tt.rn = 1
  union all
  select
   t.jobid,
   t.tellercode,
   t.jobname,
   t.jobstatus,
   t.jobstartpersname,
   t.jobpriorpersname,
   t.jobtype,
   t.createtime,
   t.tranname,
   t.issucc,
   t.tranprop,
   t.trandata,
   t.jbjg,
   t.jbgy,
   t.ldlcid
  from
   jobinfo_his t,
   businodeinst t1,
   busiflowinst t2
  where

## Table Definitions:
CREATE SEQUENCE jobinfo_his_seq; CREATE TABLE jobinfo_his (id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, jobid VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, tellercode VARCHAR2(50), jobname VARCHAR2(100), jobstatus VARCHAR2(10), jobstartpersname VARCHAR2(100), jobpriorpersname VARCHAR2(100), jobtype VARCHAR2(50), createtime DATE NOT NULL, tranname VARCHAR2(100), issucc VARCHAR2(1), tranprop VARCHAR2(100), trandata VARCHAR2(4000), jbjg VARCHAR2(100), jbgy VARCHAR2(100), ldlcid VARCHAR2(50)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER jobinfo_his_bi BEFORE INSERT ON jobinfo_his FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.id IS NULL THEN SELECT jobinfo_his_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_jobinfo_his_jobid ON jobinfo_his(jobid);
CREATE INDEX idx_jobinfo_his_status ON jobinfo_his(jobstatus);
