## Original SQL:
select
  count(*)
from
  (
  select
   tt.jobid,
   tt.tellercode,
   tt.jobname,
   tt.jobstatus,
   tt.jobstartpersname,
   tt.jobpriorpersname,
   tt.jobtype,
   tt.createtime,
   tt.tranname,
   tt.issucc,
   tt.tranprop,
   tt.trandata,
   tt.jbjg,
   tt.jbgy,
   tt.ldlcid
  from
   (
  select
  t3.jobid,
  t3.tellercode,
  t3.jobname,
  t3.jobstatus,
  t3.jobstartpersname,
  t3.jobpriorpersname,
  t3.jobtype,
  t3.createtime,
  t3.tranname,
  t3.issucc,
  t3.tranprop,
  t3.trandata,
  t3.jbjg,
  t3.jbgy,
  t3.ldlcid,
  row_number() over (
   partition by
  t3.jobid
   order by
  t3.createtime desc
  ) as rn
  from
  jobinfo_his t3
  where
  exists (
   select
  t2.jobid
   from
  jobinfo_his t2
   where
  t2.jobid = t3.jobid
  and exists (
  select
   t1.jobid
  from
   jobinfo_his t1
  where
   t1.jobid = t2.jobid
   and t1.jobstatus = 'O'
   and substr(jobid, 0, 1) = 'A'
  )
   group by
  t2.jobid
   having
  count(decode(t2.jobstatus, 'N', 1, null)) = 0
  )
   ) tt
  where
   tt.rn = 1
  union all
  select
   t.jobid,
   t.tellercode,
   t.jobname,
   t.jobstatus,
   t.jobstartpersname,
   t.jobpriorpersname,
   t.jobtype,
   t.createtime,
   t.tranname,
   t.issucc,
   t.tranprop,
   t.trandata,
   t.jbjg,
   t.jbgy,
   t.ldlcid
  from
   jobinfo_his t,
   businodeinst t1,
   busiflowinst t2
  where
   t.jobid = t1.nodeinstid
   and t1.flowinstid = t2.flowinstid
   and t2.status = '1'
   and t.jobstatus = 'O'
  )

## Optimized SQL:

model_answers.model_answer: select count(*) from ( select tt.jobid from ( select t3.jobid, row_number() over (partition by t3.jobid order by t3.createtime desc) as rn from jobinfo_his t3 where exists ( select 1 from jobinfo_his t2 where t2.jobid = t3.jobid group by t2.jobid having count(decode(t2.jobstatus, 'N', 1, null)) = 0 and count(decode(t2.jobstatus, 'O', 1, null)) > 0 ) and substr(t3.jobid, 1, 1) = 'A' ) tt where tt.rn = 1 union all select t.jobid from jobinfo_his t, businodeinst t1, busiflowinst t2 where t.jobid = t1.nodeinstid and t1.flowinstid = t2.flowinstid and t2.status = '1' and t.jobstatus = 'O' )

{"case_id": "30", "db_type": "oracle", "description": "жӯӨж”№еҶҷзҡ„ж ёеҝғжҳҜе°ҶеҺҹSQLдёӯй’ҲеҜ№nortranиЎЁзҡ„7дёӘзӢ¬з«ӢеӯҗжҹҘиҜў(n1-n7)е’Ң1дёӘеҺ»йҮҚеӯҗжҹҘиҜў(z)йҖҡиҝҮCTEзҡ„GROUP BY + MAX + CASE WHENжҠҖжңҜеҗҲе№¶гҖӮеҺҹSQLдёӯжҜҸдёӘеӯҗжҹҘиҜўйғҪжңүWHEREжқЎд»¶иҝҮж»ӨдёҚеҗҢзҡ„nortran_aufd_codeпјҢж”№еҶҷеҗҺйҖҡиҝҮCASE WHENеңЁеҚ•ж¬Ўжү«жҸҸдёӯеҗҢж—¶жҸҗеҸ–жүҖжңүйңҖиҰҒзҡ„еӯ—ж®өеҖјпјҢз„¶еҗҺз”ЁMAXиҒҡеҗҲйҖүжӢ©жҜҸдёӘtransactionзҡ„еҖјгҖӮиҝҷз§ҚиЎҢеҲ—иҪ¬жҚўжҠҖжңҜе°ҶEAV(Entity-Attribute-Value)жЁЎеһӢзҡ„еӨҡиЎҢж•°жҚ®йҖҸи§Ҷдёәе®ҪиЎЁзҡ„еҚ•иЎҢж•°жҚ®гҖӮеҗҢж—¶пјҢе°Ҷnobtranзҡ„иҝҮж»ӨжқЎд»¶еүҚзҪ®пјҢеҮҸе°‘JOINж—¶зҡ„ж•°жҚ®йҮҸгҖӮиҝҷз§Қж”№еҶҷж–№ејҸеңЁOLAPеңәжҷҜдёӯеёёз”ЁдәҺдјҳеҢ–з»ҙеәҰеұһжҖ§зҡ„еӨҡж¬ЎJOINгҖӮ", "difficulty_level": "1", "create_table_statements": ["CREATE SEQUENCE nobtran_seq; CREATE TABLE nobtran (nobtran_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, nobtran_transaction_no NUMBER NOT NULL, nobtran_acat_code VARCHAR2(20), nobtran_effective_date DATE, nobtran_trans_status_ind VARCHAR2(1), nobtran_pidm NUMBER NOT NULL, nobtran_apply_ind VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT 'N'); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER nobtran_bi BEFORE INSERT ON nobtran FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.nobtran_id IS NULL THEN SELECT nobtran_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.nobtran_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_nobtran_acat_code ON nobtran(nobtran_acat_code);", "CREATE INDEX idx_nobtran_pidm ON nobtran(nobtran_pidm);", "CREATE INDEX idx_nobtran_transaction_no ON nobtran(nobtran_transaction_no);", "CREATE INDEX idx_nobtran_status ON nobtran(nobtran_trans_status_ind);", "CREATE INDEX idx_nobtran_apply_ind ON nobtran(nobtran_apply_ind);", "CREATE SEQUENCE spriden_seq; CREATE TABLE spriden (spriden_pidm NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, spriden_id VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, spriden_last_name VARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL, spriden_first_name VARCHAR2(100), spriden_change_ind VARCHAR2(1)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER spriden_bi BEFORE INSERT ON spriden FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.spriden_pidm IS NULL THEN SELECT spriden_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.spriden_pidm FROM DUAL; END IF; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_spriden_change_ind ON spriden(spriden_change_ind);", "CREATE SEQUENCE norrout_seq; CREATE TABLE norrout (norrout_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, norrout_transaction_no NUMBER NOT NULL, norrout_queue_status_ind VARCHAR2(1), norrout_level_no NUMBER); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER norrout_bi BEFORE INSERT ON norrout FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.norrout_id IS NULL THEN SELECT norrout_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.norrout_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_norrout_transaction_no ON norrout(norrout_transaction_no);", "CREATE INDEX idx_norrout_level_no ON norrout(norrout_level_no);", "CREATE INDEX idx_norrout_queue_status ON norrout(norrout_queue_status_ind);", "CREATE SEQUENCE pebempl_seq; CREATE TABLE pebempl (pebempl_pidm NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, pebempl_ecls_code VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL, pebempl_current_hire_date DATE); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER pebempl_bi BEFORE INSERT ON pebempl FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.pebempl_pidm IS NULL THEN SELECT pebempl_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.pebempl_pidm FROM DUAL; END IF; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_pebempl_ecls_code ON pebempl(pebempl_ecls_code);", "CREATE SEQUENCE nortran_seq; CREATE TABLE nortran (nortran_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, nortran_transaction_no NUMBER NOT NULL, nortran_apty_code VARCHAR2(20), nortran_aufd_code VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, nortran_value VARCHAR2(200), nortran_posn VARCHAR2(50)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER nortran_bi BEFORE INSERT ON nortran FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.nortran_id IS NULL THEN SELECT nortran_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.nortran_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_nortran_transaction_no ON nortran(nortran_transaction_no);", "CREATE INDEX idx_nortran_aufd_code ON nortran(nortran_aufd_code);", "CREATE INDEX idx_nortran_apty_code ON nortran(nortran_apty_code);", "CREATE SEQUENCE nortern_seq; CREATE TABLE nortern (nortern_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, nortern_transaction_no NUMBER NOT NULL, nortern_effective_date DATE, nortern_earn_code VARCHAR2(20), nortern_hrs NUMBER(10,2), nortern_special_rate NUMBER(15,2)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER nortern_bi BEFORE INSERT ON nortern FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.nortern_id IS NULL THEN SELECT nortern_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.nortern_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;", "CREATE INDEX idx_nortern_transaction_no ON nortern(nortern_transaction_no);"], "sql": "select s.spriden_id EID,
  s.spriden_last_name ||', '||s.spriden_first_name "NAME",
  b.nobtran_transaction_no "TRANS NO.",
  z.nortran_posn "POSN NO",
  b.nobtran_effective_date "QUERY DATE", 
  b.nobtran_acat_code "ACAT CODE",
  n1.nortran_value "CURRENT HIRE DATE",
  n2.nortran_value "BEGIN PERSONNEL DATE",
  n3.nortran_value "SALARY GROUP",
  n4.nortran_value "APPOINTMENT PERCENT",
  n5.nortran_value "ANNUAL SALARY",
  t1.nortern_effective_date "PAY DATA EFFECTIVE DATE",
  t1.nortern_earn_code "PAY DATA EARNINGS",
  t1.nortern_hrs "PAY DATA HOURS",
  t1.nortern_special_rate "PAY DATA SPECIAL RATE",
  n6.nortran_value "END JOB EFFECTIVE DATE",
  n7.nortran_value "END PERSONNEL DATE"
   ,case b.nobtran_trans_status_ind
   when 'A' then 'Approved'
   when 'C' then 'Completed'
   when 'V' then 'Voided' 
   when 'D' then 'Disapproved'
   when 'R' then 'Return for Correction'
   when 'P' then 'Pending'
   when 'W' then 'Waiting'
   when 'T' then 'Partially Completed'
   when 'N' then 'Cancelled'
   when 'U' then 'Superuser Update'
  end trans_status   
  ,case r.norrout_queue_status_ind
   when 'A' then 'Approved by that Approver'
   when 'D' then 'Disapproved'
   when 'F' then 'FYI'
   when 'I' then 'In Queue'
   when 'K' then 'Acknowledged'
   when 'L' then 'Applied by Applier'
   when 'M' then 'More Information'
   when 'O' then 'Overridden'
   when 'P' then 'Pending Action by Approver/Applier '
   when 'Q' then 'Removed from Queue'
   when 'R' then 'Return for Correction'
  end queue_status
  ,r.norrout_level_no
  

  from nobtran b,spriden s, norrout r, pebempl pp, /*nbrjobs nbr,*/
  (select nc.nortran_transaction_no,nc.nortran_apty_code,nc.nortran_aufd_code,nc.nortran_value
  from nortran nc
   where nc.nortran_aufd_code = 'PEBEMPL_CURRENT_HIRE_DATE'
  ) n1, /* Current Hire Date */
  (select nb.nortran_transaction_no,nb.nortran_apty_code,nb.nortran_aufd_code,nb.nortran_value
  from nortran nb
   where nb.nortran_aufd_code = 'NBRJOBS_PERS_CHG_DATE' 
  ) n2,  /*Begin Personnnel Date*/ 
  (select ns.nortran_transaction_no,ns.nortran_apty_code,ns.nortran_aufd_code,ns.nortran_value
  from nortran ns
   where ns.nortran_aufd_code = 'NBRJOBS_SGRP_CODE'
   ) n3, /* Salary Group */
  (select na.nortran_transaction_no,na.nortran_apty_code,na.nortran_aufd_code,na.nortran_value
  from nortran na
   where na.nortran_aufd_code = 'NBRJOBS_APPT_PCT'
  ) n4, /*Appointment Percent*/ 
  (select nu.nortran_transaction_no,nu.nortran_apty_code,nu.nortran_aufd_code,nu.nortran_value
  from nortran nu
   where nu.nortran_aufd_code = 'NBRJOBS_ANN_SALARY'
  ) n5, /*Annual Salary*/
  (select nj.nortran_transaction_no,nj.nortran_apty_code,nj.nortran_aufd_code,nj.nortran_value
  from nortran nj
   where nj.nortran_aufd_code = 'NBRJOBS_EFFECTIVE_DATE'  
  and nj.nortran_apty_code in ('CFOAP','NWHIR','NWTMP','ADCOMP','JBTERM')) n6,  /*End Job Effective Date*/
  (select np.nortran_transaction_no,np.nortran_apty_code,np.nortran_aufd_code,np.nortran_value
  from nortran np
   where np.nortran_aufd_code = 'NBRJOBS_PERS_CHG_DATE'  
  and np.nortran_apty_code in ('CFOAP','NWHIR','NWTMP','ADCOMP','JBTERM')) n7,  /*End Personnel Date*/

  (select t.nortern_transaction_no,t.nortern_effective_date,t.nortern_earn_code,
   t.nortern_hrs, t.nortern_special_rate
  from nortern t) t1 

   ,(select unique zz.nortran_transaction_no,zz.nortran_posn
  from nortran zz
   where zz.nortran_posn is not null
  ) z

 where b.nobtran_acat_code in ('CFOAP','NWHIR','NWTMP','ADCOMP','JBTERM') /*employee*/
  /*waiting,completed,partially completedc,ancelled,supperuser update */
  /* and nobtran_trans_status_ind in ('W','C','T','U') */
   and b.nobtran_pidm = s.spriden_pidm
   and s.spriden_change_ind is null
   
   and b.nobtran_transaction_no = t1.nortern_transaction_no(+) /*Pay Data*/
   
   and b.nobtran_transaction_no = n1.nortran_transaction_no(+) /*Current Hire Date*/
   
   and b.nobtran_transaction_no = n2.nortran_transaction_no(+) /*Begin Personnnel Date*/
   
   and b.nobtran_transaction_no = n3.nortran_transaction_no(+) /*Salary Group*/
   
   and b.nobtran_transaction_no = n4.nortran_transaction_no(+) /*Appointment Percent*/
   
   and b.nobtran_transaction_no = n5.nortran_transaction_no(+) /*Annual Salary*/
   
   and b.nobtran_transaction_no = n6.nortran_transaction_no(+) /*End Job Effective Date*/
   
   and b.nobtran_transaction_no = n7.nortran_transaction_no(+) /*End Personnel Date*/
   
   and nobtran_transaction_no = r.norrout_transaction_no(+)
   --get all queue status
   /*and r.norrout_queue_status_ind = 'A'*/
   and r.norrout_level_no = 90 /* Pending HR approval Queue */
   -- not applied yet
   and b.nobtran_apply_ind = 'N' /*Applied ePAFs will not be listed*/
   --HR does not care about voided ePAFs
   and nobtran_trans_status_ind <> 'V'
   --get posn
   and b.nobtran_transaction_no = z.nortran_transaction_no
   and r.norrout_queue_status_ind <> 'A'
  -- exclude student
   and s.spriden_pidm = pp.pebempl_pidm
   and pp.pebempl_ecls_code not in ('RE','FW','GS','MW')

case_datas.mode_question:
You are a database expert in SQL performance optimization.
Given the table definitions, explain output and the original SQL, apply appropriate optimizations.
Output only the optimized SQL as a single-line statement with no markdown or extra text.

## Table Definitions:
CREATE SEQUENCE nobtran_seq; CREATE TABLE nobtran (nobtran_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, nobtran_transaction_no NUMBER NOT NULL, nobtran_acat_code VARCHAR2(20), nobtran_effective_date DATE, nobtran_trans_status_ind VARCHAR2(1), nobtran_pidm NUMBER NOT NULL, nobtran_apply_ind VARCHAR2(1) DEFAULT 'N'); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER nobtran_bi BEFORE INSERT ON nobtran FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.nobtran_id IS NULL THEN SELECT nobtran_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.nobtran_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_nobtran_acat_code ON nobtran(nobtran_acat_code);
CREATE INDEX idx_nobtran_pidm ON nobtran(nobtran_pidm);
CREATE INDEX idx_nobtran_transaction_no ON nobtran(nobtran_transaction_no);
CREATE INDEX idx_nobtran_status ON nobtran(nobtran_trans_status_ind);
CREATE INDEX idx_nobtran_apply_ind ON nobtran(nobtran_apply_ind);
CREATE SEQUENCE spriden_seq; CREATE TABLE spriden (spriden_pidm NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, spriden_id VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, spriden_last_name VARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL, spriden_first_name VARCHAR2(100), spriden_change_ind VARCHAR2(1)); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER spriden_bi BEFORE INSERT ON spriden FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.spriden_pidm IS NULL THEN SELECT spriden_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.spriden_pidm FROM DUAL; END IF; END;
CREATE INDEX idx_spriden_change_ind ON spriden(spriden_change_ind);
CREATE SEQUENCE norrout_seq; CREATE TABLE norrout (norrout_id NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, norrout_transaction_no NUMBER NOT NULL, norrout_queue_status_ind VARCHAR2(1), norrout_level_no NUMBER); CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER norrout_bi BEFORE INSERT ON norrout FOR EACH ROW BEGIN IF :NEW.norrout_id IS NULL THEN SELECT norrout_seq.NEXTVAL INTO :NEW.norrout_id FROM DUAL; END IF; END;

## Original SQL:
select s.spriden_id EID,
  s.spriden_last_name ||', '||s.spriden_first_name "NAME",
  b.nobtran_transaction_no "TRANS NO.",
  z.nortran_posn "POSN NO",
  b.nobtran_effective_date "QUERY DATE", 
  b.nobtran_acat_code "ACAT CODE",
  n1.nortran_value "CURRENT HIRE DATE",
  n2.nortran_value "BEGIN PERSONNEL DATE",
  n3.nortran_value "SALARY GROUP",
  n4.nortran_value "APPOINTMENT PERCENT",
  n5.nortran_value "ANNUAL SALARY",
  t1.nortern_effective_date "PAY DATA EFFECTIVE DATE",
  t1.nortern_earn_code "PAY DATA EARNINGS",
  t1.nortern_hrs "PAY DATA HOURS",
  t1.nortern_special_rate "PAY DATA SPECIAL RATE",
  n6.nortran_value "END JOB EFFECTIVE DATE",
  n7.nortran_value "END PERSONNEL DATE"
   ,case b.nobtran_trans_status_ind
   when 'A' then 'Approved'
   when 'C' then 'Completed'
   when 'V' then 'Voided' 
   when 'D' then 'Disapproved'
   when 'R' then 'Return for Correction'
   when 'P' then 'Pending'
   when 'W' then 'Waiting'
   when 'T' then 'Partially Completed'
   when 'N' then 'Cancelled'
   when 'U' then 'Superuser Update'
  end trans_status   
  ,case r.norrout_queue_status_ind
   when 'A' then 'Approved by that Approver'
   when 'D' then 'Disapproved'
   when 'F' then 'FYI'
   when 'I' then 'In Queue'
   when 'K' then 'Acknowledged'
   when 'L' then 'Applied by Applier'
   when 'M' then 'More Information'
   when 'O' then 'Overridden'
   when 'P' then 'Pending Action by Approver/Applier '
   when 'Q' then 'Removed from Queue'
   when 'R' then 'Return for Correction'
  end queue_status
  ,r.norrout_level_no
  

  from nobtran b,spriden s, norrout r, pebempl pp, /*nbrjobs nbr,*/
  (select nc.nortran_transaction_no,nc.nortran_apty_code,nc.nortran_aufd_code,nc.nortran_value
  from nortran nc
   where nc.nortran_aufd_code = 'PEBEMPL_CURRENT_HIRE_DATE'
  ) n1, /* Current Hire Date */
  (select nb.nortran_transaction_no,nb.nortran_apty_code,nb.nortran_aufd_code,nb.nortran_value
  from nortran nb
   where nb.nortran_aufd_code = 'NBRJOBS_PERS_CHG_DATE' 
  ) n2,  /*Begin Personnnel Date*/ 
  (select ns.nortran_transaction_no,ns.nortran_apty_code,ns.nortran_aufd_code,ns.nortran_value
  from nortran ns
   where ns.nortran_aufd_code = 'NBRJOBS_SGRP_CODE'
   ) n3, /* Salary Group */
  (select na.nortran_transaction_no,na.nortran_apty_code,na.nortran_aufd_code,na.nortran_value
  from nortran na
   where na.nortran_aufd_code = 'NBRJOBS_APPT_PCT'
  ) n4, /*Appointment Percent*/ 
  (select nu.nortran_transaction_no,nu.nortran_apty_code,nu.nortran_aufd_code,nu.nortran_value
  from nortran nu
   where nu.nortran_aufd_code = 'NBRJOBS_ANN_SALARY'
  ) n5, /*Annual Salary*/
  (select nj.nortran_transaction_no,nj.nortran_apty_code,nj.nortran_aufd_code,nj.nortran_value
  from nortran nj
   where nj.nortran_aufd_code = 'NBRJOBS_EFFECTIVE_DATE'  
  and nj.nortran_apty_code in ('CFOAP','NWHIR','NWTMP','ADCOMP','JBTERM')) n6,  /*End Job Effective Date*/
  (select np.nortran_transaction_no,np.nortran_apty_code,np.nortran_aufd_code,np.nortran_value
  from nortran np
   where np.nortran_aufd_code = 'NBRJOBS_PERS_CHG_DATE'  
  and np.nortran_apty_code in ('CFOAP','NWHIR','NWTMP','ADCOMP','JBTERM')) n7,  /*End Personnel Date*/

  (select t.nortern_transaction_no,t.nortern_effective_date,t.nortern_earn_code,
   t.nortern_hrs, t.nortern_special_rate
  from nortern t) t1 

   ,(select unique zz.nortran_transaction_no,zz.nortran_posn
  from nortran zz
   where zz.nortran_posn is not null
  ) z

 where b.nobtran_acat_code in ('CFOAP','NWHIR','NWTMP','ADCOMP','JBTERM') /*employee*/
  /*waiting,completed,partially completedc,ancelled,supperuser update */
  /* and nobtran_trans_status_ind in ('W','C','T','U') */
   and b.nobtran_pidm = s.spriden_pidm
   and s.spriden_change_ind is null
   
   and b.nobtran_transaction_no = t1.nortern_transaction_no(+) /*Pay Data*/
   
   and b.nobtran_transaction_no = n1.nortran_transaction_no(+) /*Current Hire Date*/
   
   and b.nobtran_transaction_no = n2.nortran_transaction_no(+) /*Begin Personnnel Date*/
   
   and b.nobtran_transaction_no = n3.nortran_transaction_no(+) /*Salary Group*/
   
   and b.nobtran_transaction_no = n4.nortran_transaction_no(+) /*Appointment Percent*/
   
   and b.nobtran_transaction_no = n5.nortran_transaction_no(+) /*Annual Salary*/
   
   and b.nobtran_transaction_no = n6.nortran_transaction_no(+) /*End Job Effective Date*/
   
   and b.nobtran_transaction_no = n7.nortran_transaction_no(+) /*End Personnel Date*/
   
   and nobtran_transaction_no = r.norrout_transaction_no(+)
   --get all queue status
   /*and r.norrout_queue_status_ind = 'A'*/
   and r.norrout_level_no = 90 /* Pending HR approval Queue */
   -- not applied yet
   and b.nobtran_apply_ind = 'N' /*Applied ePAFs will not be listed*/
   --HR does not care about voided ePAFs
   and nobtran_trans_status_ind <> 'V'
   --get posn
   and b.nobtran_transaction_no = z.nortran_transaction_no
   and r.norrout_queue_status_ind <> 'A'
  -- exclude student
   and s.spriden_pidm = pp.pebempl_pidm
   and pp.pebempl_ecls_code not in ('RE','FW','GS','MW')

   order by 3

SPECIAL RATE", n6.nortran_value "END JOB EFFECTIVE DATE", n7.nortran_value "END PERSONNEL DATE", case b.nobtran_trans_status_ind when 'A' then 'Approved' when 'C' then 'Completed' when 'V' then 'Voided' when 'D' then 'Disapproved' when 'R' then 'Return for Correction' when 'P' then 'Pending' when 'W' then 'Waiting' when 'T' then 'Partially Completed' when 'N' then 'Cancelled' when 'U' then 'Superuser Update' end trans_status, case r.norrout_queue_status_ind when 'A' then 'Approved by that Approver' when 'D' then 'Disapproved' when 'F' then 'FYI' when 'I' then 'In Queue' when 'K' then 'Acknowledged' when 'L' then 'Applied by Applier' when 'M' then 'More Information' when 'O' then 'Overridden' when 'P' then 'Pending Action by Approver/Applier ' when 'Q' then 'Removed from Queue' when 'R' then 'Return for Correction' end queue_status, r.norrout_level_no from nobtran b join spriden s on b.nobtran_pidm = s.spriden_pidm and s.spriden_change_ind is null join pebempl pp on r.norrout_queue_status_ind <> 'A' join (select distinct zz.nortran_transaction_no, zz.nortran_posn from nortran zz where zz.nortran_posn is not null) z on b.nobtran_transaction_no = z.nortran_transaction_no left join nortran n1 on b.nobtran_transaction_no = n1.nortran_transaction_no and n1.nortran_aufd_code = 'PEBEMPL_CURRENT_HIRE_DATE' left join nortran n2 on b.nobtran_transaction_no = n2.nortran_transaction_no and n2.nortran_aufd_code = 'NBRJOBS_PERS_CHG_DATE' left join nortran n3 on b.nobtran_transaction_no = n3.nortran_transaction_no and b.nobtran_transaction_no = n5.nortran_transaction_no and n5.nortran_aufd_code = 'NBRJOBS_ANN_SALARY' left join nortran n6 on b.nobtran_transaction_no = n6.nortran_transaction_no and n6.nortran_aufd_code = 'NBRJOBS_EFFECTIVE_DATE' and n6.nortran_apty_code in ('CFOAP','NWHIR','NWTMP','ADCOMP','JBTERM') left join nortran n7 on b.nobtran_transaction_no = n7.nortran_transaction_no and n7.nortran_aufd_code = 'NBRJOBS_PERS_CHG_DATE' and n7.nortran_apty_code in ('CFOAP','NWHIR','NWTMP','ADCOMP','JBTERM') left join nortern t1 on b.nobtran_transaction_no = t1.nortern_transaction_no where b.nobtran_acat_code in ('CFOAP','NWHIR','NWTMP','ADCOMP','JBTERM') and b.nobtran_apply_ind = 'N' and b.nobtran_trans_status_ind <> 'V' order by 3

## Table Definitions:
CREATE TABLE SAPR3.BSIS (MANDT VARCHAR2(3) NOT NULL, BUKRS VARCHAR2(4) NOT NULL, BELNR VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL, GJAHR VARCHAR2(4) NOT NULL, BUZEI VARCHAR2(3) NOT NULL, HKONT VARCHAR2(10), DMBTR NUMBER(15,2), WAERS VARCHAR2(3), MONAT VARCHAR2(2), BLDAT VARCHAR2(8), CONSTRAINT pk_bsis PRIMARY KEY (MANDT, BUKRS, BELNR, GJAHR, BUZEI));
CREATE INDEX idx_bsis_query ON SAPR3.BSIS(GJAHR, BUKRS, HKONT, MANDT, BUZEI, WAERS, MONAT, BLDAT);

CREATE TABLE SAPR3.BKPF (MANDT VARCHAR2(3) NOT NULL, BUKRS VARCHAR2(4) NOT NULL, BELNR VARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL, GJAHR VARCHAR2(4) NOT NULL, BLDAT VARCHAR2(8), CONSTRAINT pk_bkpf PRIMARY KEY (MANDT, BUKRS, BELNR, GJAHR));

## Original SQL:
SELECT
  t.age,
  CASE 
  WHEN t.age BETWEEN 0 AND 3 THEN '0-3 Days'
  WHEN t.age BETWEEN 4 AND 7 THEN '3-7 Days'
  ELSE 'Above 7 Days'
  END AS age_bucket,
  t.amount_local,
  t.hkont AS gl_account,
  t.bukrs AS company_code
FROM (
  SELECT 
  b.BUKRS,
  b.HKONT,
  b.DMBTR AS amount_local,
  (TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TO_DATE(k.BLDAT,'YYYYMMDD')) AS age
  FROM (
  SELECT /*+ FIRST_ROWS(30) */
   BELNR, GJAHR, BUKRS, HKONT, DMBTR
  FROM SAPR3.BSIS
  WHERE GJAHR = '2025'
  AND BUKRS = '0100'
  AND HKONT = '0000895200'
  AND MANDT = '500'
  AND BUZEI = '002'
  AND WAERS = 'INR'
  AND MONAT = '01'
  AND BLDAT = '20240401'
  ) b
  JOIN SAPR3.BKPF k
   ON b.BELNR = k.BELNR
  AND b.GJAHR = k.GJAHR
  AND b.BUKRS = k.BUKRS
) t
ORDER BY t.age;

1. **и°“иҜҚдёӢжҺЁпјҲPredicate Pushdownпјү**пјҡе°Ҷout_dateзҡ„иҝҮж»ӨжқЎд»¶д»ҺжңҖеӨ–еұӮWHEREеӯҗеҸҘз§»еҲ°tmep_ip CTEеҶ…йғЁгҖӮиҝҷж ·еҸҜд»Ҙе°Ҫж—©иҝҮж»Өж•°жҚ®пјҢеҮҸе°‘CTEзү©еҢ–зҡ„ж•°жҚ®йҮҸпјҢиҷҪз„¶еңЁжң¬дҫӢдёӯдјҳеҢ–еҷЁе·Із»Ҹе°ҶиҝҮж»ӨжҺЁеҲ°дәҶParallel Seq Scanйҳ¶ж®өпјҢдҪҶжҳҫејҸдёӢжҺЁдҪҝйҖ»иҫ‘жӣҙжё…жҷ°пјҢдё”еңЁжҹҗдәӣеӨҚжқӮеңәжҷҜдёӢиғҪеё®еҠ©дјҳеҢ–еҷЁжӣҙеҘҪең°з”ҹжҲҗжү§иЎҢи®ЎеҲ’гҖӮ

2. **жҠ•еҪұиЈҒеүӘпјҲColumn Pruningпјү**пјҡеңЁdiagnosis_rankedеӯҗжҹҘиҜўдёӯпјҢз§»йҷӨдәҶдёҚеҶҚйңҖиҰҒзҡ„diagnosis_type_nameеӯ—ж®өгҖӮиҜҘеӯ—ж®өд»…з”ЁдәҺзӘ—еҸЈеҮҪж•°зҡ„жҺ’еәҸпјҢеңЁrn=1зӯӣйҖүеҗҺе°ұжІЎжңүе®һйҷ…ж„Ҹд№үдәҶпјҢеӣ жӯӨеңЁWindowAggд№ӢеҗҺз«ӢеҚіиЈҒеүӘпјҢйҒҝе…Қдј йҖ’еҲ°дёҠеұӮзҡ„GroupAggregateе’ҢMaterializeиҠӮзӮ№гҖӮ

3. **иҒҡеҗҲз»ҙеәҰдјҳеҢ–**пјҡdiagnosis_endзҡ„GROUP BYд»Һ4дёӘеӯ—ж®өеҮҸе°‘еҲ°3дёӘеӯ—ж®өгҖӮеӣ дёәdiagnosis_type_nameеңЁзӘ—еҸЈеҮҪж•°жҺ’еәҸеҗҺе·Іиў«йҡҗеҗ«дҪҝз”ЁпјҲйҖҡиҝҮrn=1дҝқиҜҒдәҶжҜҸз»„еҸӘдҝқз•ҷдјҳе…Ҳзә§жңҖй«ҳзҡ„и®°еҪ•пјүпјҢеңЁжңҖз»ҲиҒҡеҗҲж—¶дёҚйңҖиҰҒеҶҚдҪңдёәеҲҶз»„й”®гҖӮиҝҷеҮҸе°‘дәҶе“ҲеёҢиЎЁзҡ„й”®з©әй—ҙе’ҢжҜ”иҫғејҖй”ҖгҖӮ

4. **йҖ»иҫ‘зӯүд»·жҖ§дҝқиҜҒ**пјҡиҷҪз„¶иҝӣиЎҢдәҶеӨҡеӨ„дјҳеҢ–пјҢдҪҶжҹҘиҜўзҡ„ж ёеҝғйҖ»иҫ‘дҝқжҢҒдёҚеҸҳпјҡ
   - иҜҠж–ӯзұ»еһӢзҡ„дјҳе…Ҳзә§жҺ’еәҸи§„еҲҷе®Ңе…ЁдёҖиҮҙ
   - ROW_NUMBER()зӘ—еҸЈеҮҪж•°зҡ„еҲҶеҢәе’ҢжҺ’еәҸйҖ»иҫ‘зӣёеҗҢ
   - MAXиҒҡеҗҲеҜ№diagnosis_flagеҲҶз»„зҡ„еӨ„зҗҶйҖ»иҫ‘зӣёеҗҢ
   - жңҖз»ҲJOINе…іиҒ”жқЎд»¶е’Ңз»“жһңйӣҶе®Ңе…ЁдёҖиҮҙ", "difficulty_level": "1", "create_table_statements": ["CREATE TABLE his_temp_ip_patient_info (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, register_no VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, inpatient_name VARCHAR(100), age INTEGER, sex VARCHAR(10), in_date TIMESTAMP, out_date TIMESTAMP, times VARCHAR(20), person_type VARCHAR(50), patient_no VARCHAR(50), current_dept_code VARCHAR(50));", "CREATE INDEX idx_his_temp_ip_patient_info_register_no_times ON his_temp_ip_patient_info(register_no, times);", "CREATE INDEX idx_his_temp_ip_patient_info_out_date ON his_temp_ip_patient_info(out_date);", "CREATE TABLE his_temp_ip_settle (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, register_no VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, times VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, total_cost DECIMAL(12,2));", "CREATE INDEX idx_his_temp_ip_settle_register_no_times ON his_temp_ip_settle(register_no, times);", "CREATE TABLE emr_temp_ip_patient_diagnosis (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, inp_no VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, visit_id VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, type VARCHAR(50), diagnosis_type_name VARCHAR(100), diagnosis_flag VARCHAR(1), diagnosis_code VARCHAR(50), diagnosis_name VARCHAR(200), diagnosis_no INTEGER, file_visit_type VARCHAR(10));", "CREATE INDEX idx_emr_temp_ip_patient_diagnosis_file_visit ON emr_temp_ip_patient_diagnosis(file_visit_type, inp_no, visit_id);", "CREATE INDEX idx_emr_temp_ip_patient_diagnosis_group ON emr_temp_ip_patient_diagnosis(inp_no, visit_id, type, diagnosis_type_name, diagnosis_flag);", "CREATE TABLE emr_temp_ip_patient_operation (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, inp_no VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, visit_id VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, operation_code VARCHAR(50), operation_no INTEGER);", "CREATE INDEX idx_emr_temp_ip_patient_operation_inp_visit ON emr_temp_ip_patient_operation(inp_no, visit_id);"], "sql": "with tmep_ip as (
  select 
  a.register_no as patientid, 
  a.inpatient_name as patientname, 
  a.age,
  a.sex as gender, 
  date(a.in_date) as indate, 
  date(a.out_date) as outdate,
  a.times as inhospitaltimes, 
  a.person_type as persontype, 
  a.patient_no as serialno,
  b.total_cost as medicalcost, 
  'doctor' as entrymode, 
  'remind' as defaulttab,
  a.current_dept_code as deptcode, 
  '440100' as citycode 
  from his_temp_ip_patient_info a 
  left join his_temp_ip_settle b on a.register_no = b.register_no and a.times = b.times
),
diagnosis as (
  select 
  inp_no, 
  visit_id as times, 
  type, 
  diagnosis_type_name,
  diagnosis_flag,
  case when diagnosis_flag = '1' then string_agg(diagnosis_code, ',' order by diagnosis_no) end as diagnosis_codes,
  case when diagnosis_flag = '0' then string_agg(diagnosis_code, ',' order by diagnosis_no) end as chinese_diagnosis_codes,
  case when diagnosis_flag = '0' then string_agg(diagnosis_name, ',' order by diagnosis_no) end as chinese_diagnosis_names 
  from emr_temp_ip_patient_diagnosis 
  where file_visit_type = '2'
  group by inp_no, visit_id, type, diagnosis_type_name, diagnosis_flag
),
diagnosis_ranked as (
  select 
  *,
  row_number() over (
   partition by inp_no, times, type 
   order by 
  case 
  when type = 'з—…еҺҶиҜҠж–ӯ' and diagnosis_type_name = 'жңҖеҗҺиҜҠж–ӯ' then 1
  when type = 'з—…еҺҶиҜҠж–ӯ' and diagnosis_type_name = 'еҲқжӯҘиҜҠж–ӯ' then 2
  when type = 'йҰ–йЎөиҜҠж–ӯ' and diagnosis_type_name = 'еҮәйҷўиҜҠж–ӯ' then 1
  when type = 'йҰ–йЎөиҜҠж–ӯ' and diagnosis_type_name = 'й—ЁиҜҠиҜҠж–ӯ' then 2
  else 3
  end
  ) as rn
  from diagnosis
),
diagnosis_end as (
  select 
  inp_no, 
  times, 
  type, 
  diagnosis_type_name,
  max(case when diagnosis_flag = '1' then diagnosis_codes end) as diagnosis_codes,
  max(case when diagnosis_flag = '0' then chinese_diagnosis_codes end) as chinese_diagnosis_codes,
  max(case when diagnosis_flag = '0' then chinese_diagnosis_names end) as chinese_diagnosis_names
  from diagnosis_ranked
  where rn = 1
  group by inp_no, times, type, diagnosis_type_name
),
operations as (
  select 
  inp_no, 
  visit_id as times, 
  string_agg(operation_code, ',' order by operation_no) as operation_codes 
  from emr_temp_ip_patient_operation
  group by inp_no, visit_id 
)
select 
  t.patientid, 
  t.patientname, 
  t.age,
  t.gender, 
  t.indate, 
  t.outdate, 
  t.inhospitaltimes, 
  d.type,
  d.diagnosis_codes as diagnosiscode,
  o.operation_codes as operationcode,
  t.medicalcost, 
  t.persontype, 
  t.entrymode, 
  t.serialno, 
  t.defaulttab,
  d.chinese_diagnosis_codes as chinesediagnosiscode,
  d.chinese_diagnosis_names as chinesediagnosename,
  t.deptcode, 
  t.citycode 
from tmep_ip t 
left join diagnosis_end d on t.patientid = d.inp_no and t.inhospitaltimes::varchar = d.times
left join operations o on t.patientid = o.inp_no and t.inhospitaltimes::varchar = o.times
where t.outdate > '2025-01-01'
order by t.outdate desc", "explain": "QUERY PLAN

## Original SQL:
with tmep_ip as (
  select 
  a.register_no as patientid, 
  a.inpatient_name as patientname, 
  a.age,
  a.sex as gender, 
  date(a.in_date) as indate, 
  date(a.out_date) as outdate,
  a.times as inhospitaltimes, 
  a.person_type as persontype, 
  a.patient_no as serialno,
  b.total_cost as medicalcost, 
  'doctor' as entrymode, 
  'remind' as defaulttab,
  a.current_dept_code as deptcode, 
  '440100' as citycode 
  from his_temp_ip_patient_info a 
  left join his_temp_ip_settle b on a.register_no = b.register_no and a.times = b.times
),
diagnosis as (
  select 
  inp_no, 
  visit_id as times, 
  type, 
  diagnosis_type_name,
  diagnosis_flag,
  case when diagnosis_flag = '1' then string_agg(diagnosis_code, ',' order by diagnosis_no) end as diagnosis_codes,
  case when diagnosis_flag = '0' then string_agg(diagnosis_code, ',' order by diagnosis_no) end as chinese_diagnosis_codes,
  case when diagnosis_flag = '0' then string_agg(diagnosis_name, ',' order by diagnosis_no) end as chinese_diagnosis_names 
  from emr_temp_ip_patient_diagnosis 
  where file_visit_type = '2'
  group by inp_no, visit_id, type, diagnosis_type_name, diagnosis_flag
),
diagnosis_ranked as (
  select 
  *,
  row_number() over (
   partition by inp_no, times, type 
   order by 
  case 
  when type = 'з—…еҺҶиҜҠж–ӯ' and diagnosis_type_name = 'жңҖеҗҺиҜҠж–ӯ' then 1
  when type = 'з—…еҺҶиҜҠж–ӯ' and diagnosis_type_name = 'еҲқжӯҘиҜҠж–ӯ' then 2
  when type = 'йҰ–йЎөиҜҠж–ӯ' and diagnosis_type_name = 'еҮәйҷўиҜҠж–ӯ' then 1
  when type = 'йҰ–йЎөиҜҠж–ӯ' and diagnosis_type_name = 'й—ЁиҜҠиҜҠж–ӯ' then 2
  else 3
  end
  ) as rn
  from diagnosis
),
diagnosis_end as (
  select 
  inp_no, 
  times, 
  type, 
  diagnosis_type_name,
  max(case when diagnosis_flag = '1' then diagnosis_codes end) as diagnosis_codes,
  max(case when diagnosis_flag = '0' then chinese_diagnosis_codes end) as chinese_diagnosis_codes,
  max(case when diagnosis_flag = '0' then chinese_diagnosis_names end) as chinese_diagnosis_names
  from diagnosis_ranked
  where rn = 1
  group by inp_no, times, type, diagnosis_type_name
),
operations as (
  select 
  inp_no, 
  visit_id as times, 
  string_agg(operation_code, ',' order by operation_no) as operation_codes 
  from emr_temp_ip_patient_operation
  group by inp_no, visit_id 
)
select 
  t.patientid, 
  t.patientname, 
  t.age,
  t.gender, 
  t.indate, 
  t.outdate, 
  t.inhospitaltimes, 
  d.type,
  d.diagnosis_codes as diagnosiscode,
  o.operation_codes as operationcode,
  t.medicalcost, 
  t.persontype, 
  t.entrymode, 
  t.serialno, 
  t.defaulttab,
  d.chinese_diagnosis_codes as chinesediagnosiscode,
  d.chinese_diagnosis_names as chinesediagnosename,
  t.deptcode, 
  t.citycode 
from tmep_ip t 
left join diagnosis_end d on t.patientid = d.inp_no and t.inhospitaltimes::varchar = d.times
left join operations o on t.patientid = o.inp_no and t.inhospitaltimes::varchar = o.times
where t.outdate > '2025-01-01'
order by t.outdate desc

model_answers.model_answer: with filtered_ip as (select a.register_no as patientid, a.inpatient_name as patientname, a.age, a.sex as gender, date(a.in_date) as indate, date(a.out_date) as outdate, a.times as inhospitaltimes, a.person_type as persontype, a.patient_no as serialno, b.total_cost as medicalcost, 'doctor' as entrymode, 'remind' as defaulttab, a.current_dept_code as deptcode, '440100' as citycode from his_temp_ip_patient_info a left join his_temp_ip_settle b on a.register_no = b.register_no and a.times = b.times where a.out_date >= '2025-01-02'::date), diagnosis as (select inp_no, visit_id as times, type, diagnosis_type_name, diagnosis_flag, case when diagnosis_flag = '1' then string_agg(diagnosis_code, ',' order by diagnosis_no) end as diagnosis_codes, case when diagnosis_flag = '0' then string_agg(diagnosis_code, ',' order by diagnosis_no) end as chinese_diagnosis_codes, case when diagnosis_flag = '0' then string_agg(diagnosis_name, ',' order by diagnosis_no) end as chinese_diagnosis_names from emr_temp_ip_patient_diagnosis d where file_visit_type = '2' and exists (select 1 from filtered_ip f where f.patientid = d.inp_no and f.inhospitaltimes::varchar = d.visit_id) group by inp_no, visit_id, type, diagnosis_type_name, diagnosis_flag), diagnosis_ranked as (select *, row_number() over (partition by inp_no, times, type order by case when type = 'з—…еҺҶиҜҠж–ӯ' and diagnosis_type_name = 'жңҖеҗҺиҜҠж–ӯ' then 1 when type = 'з—…еҺҶиҜҠж–ӯ' and diagnosis_type_name = 'еҲқжӯҘиҜҠж–ӯ' then 2 when type = 'йҰ–йЎөиҜҠж–ӯ' and diagnosis_type_name = 'еҮәйҷўиҜҠж–ӯ' then 1 when type = 'йҰ–йЎөиҜҠж–ӯ' and diagnosis_type_name = 'й—ЁиҜҠиҜҠж–ӯ' then 2 else 3 end) as rn from diagnosis), diagnosis_end as (select inp_no, times, type, diagnosis_type_name, max(case when diagnosis_flag = '1' then diagnosis_codes end) as diagnosis_codes, max(case when diagnosis_flag = '0' then chinese_diagnosis_codes end) as chinese_diagnosis_codes, max(case when diagnosis_flag = '0' then chinese_diagnosis_names end) as chinese_diagnosis_names from diagnosis_ranked where rn = 1 group by inp_no, times, type, diagnosis_type_name), operations as (select inp_no, visit_id as times, string_agg(operation_code, ',' order by operation_no) as operation_codes from emr_temp_ip_patient_operation o where exists (select 1 from filtered_ip f where f.patientid = o.inp_no and f.inhospitaltimes::varchar = o.visit_id) group by inp_no, visit_id) select t.patientid, t.patientname, t.age, t.gender, t.indate, t.outdate, t.inhospitaltimes, d.type, d.diagnosis_codes as diagnosiscode, o.operation_codes as operationcode, t.medicalcost, t.persontype, t.entrymode, t.serialno, t.defaulttab, d.chinese_diagnosis_codes as chinesediagnosiscode, d.chinese_diagnosis_names as chinesediagnosename, t.deptcode, t.citycode from filtered_ip t left join diagnosis_end d on t.patientid = d.inp_no and t.inhospitaltimes::varchar = d.times left join operations o on t.patientid = o.inp_no and t.inhospitaltimes::varchar = o.times order by t.outdate desc;

## Original SQL:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) 
FROM 
  (
  SELECT 
   id, 
   apply_id, 
   brand_code, 
   brand_name, 
   hotel_code, 
   hotel_name, 
   currency, 
   category, 
   rate_code, 
   rate_name, 
   price_array_type, 
   price_array_code, 
   price_array_sequence, 
   price_array, 
   price_array2, 
   date_segment, 
   weeks, 
   brand_maximum_price, 
   brand_minimum_price, 
   room_code, 
   room_name, 
   room_standard_price, 
   pre_adjustment_price, 
   adjusted_price, 
   price_adjustment_range, 
   occupancy, 
   status, 
   reason, 
   approve_status, 
   approve_reason, 
   operator, 
   create_time, 
   update_time, 
   CREATE_USER_ID, 
   (
   SELECT 
   count(paaj.id) 
   FROM 
   price_adjustment_audit_job paaj 
   WHERE 
   paaj.apply_id = pa1.apply_id 
   AND paaj.job_id = '4_004'
   ) AS auditJobIdcounts 
  FROM 
   hotel_price_adjustment pa1 
  WHERE 
   (
   HOTEL_CODE IN ('6199', 'JJXRSEH802967') 
   OR CREATE_USER_ID = 289865
   )
  ) TOTAL;

{"case_id": "37", "db_type": "oracle", "description": "й—®йўҳжҰӮиҝ°пјҡжҹҘиҜўйҖҡиҝҮ CTE a1 еҜ№ FEE_LIST_D еҒҡдәҶеӨ§йҮҸзҡ„иҒҡеҗҲпјҲеӨҡдёӘ LISTAGGгҖҒSUMгҖҒMIN зӯүпјүпјҢе№¶еңЁ a2 дёӯдҪҝз”Ё `a1.*` еҶҚеҒҡи®Ўз®—е’ҢиҝҮж»ӨеҗҺдёҺ SETL_D_MERGED иҝһжҺҘгҖӮе®һйҷ…жңҖз»Ҳ SELECT еҸӘдҪҝз”ЁдәҶ a1 дёӯзҡ„дёҖйғЁеҲҶеҲ—пјҲдҫӢеҰӮ b_feeгҖҒmin_amt зӯүеҲ—е№¶жңӘиў«еӨ–еұӮжҹҘиҜўеј•з”ЁпјүпјҢдҪҶз”ұдәҺдҪҝз”ЁдәҶ `a1.*` еҜјиҮҙиҝҷдәӣдёҚеҝ…иҰҒзҡ„еҲ—еңЁиҒҡеҗҲйҳ¶ж®өе°ұиў«и®Ўз®—/дј йҖ’пјҢеўһеҠ дәҶ CPUгҖҒеҶ…еӯҳдёҺ I/O ејҖй”ҖпјҢеҗҢж—¶йҳ»жӯўдәҶжҠ•еҪұдёӢжҺЁдјҳеҢ–гҖӮе»әи®®йҖҡиҝҮжҠ•еҪұдёӢжҺЁпјҲеңЁ a1 дёӯд»…иҫ“еҮәеӨ–еұӮе®һйҷ…йңҖиҰҒзҡ„еҲ—пјҢйҒҝе…Қ a1.*пјүжқҘеҮҸе°‘дёӯй—ҙж•°жҚ®йҮҸдёҺиҒҡеҗҲжҲҗжң¬пјӣеҗҢж—¶еҸҜиҖғиҷ‘еңЁ a1 дёӯдёӢжҺЁиҝҮж»Өи°“иҜҚе№¶дёәиҝһжҺҘеҲ—е»әзҙўеј•д»ҘиҝӣдёҖжӯҘйҷҚдҪҺжҲҗжң¬гҖӮ", "difficulty_level": "1", "create_table_statements": ["CREATE TABLE FEE_LIST_D (setl_id VARCHAR2(50), MEDINS_LIST_CODG VARCHAR2(100), medins_list_name VARCHAR2(200), hilist_code VARCHAR2(100), hilist_name VARCHAR2(200), MED_CHRGITM_TYPE_NAME VARCHAR2(100), CHRGITM_LV_NAME VARCHAR2(50), BILG_DEPT_NAME VARCHAR2(200), BILG_DR_NAME VARCHAR2(200), ACORD_DEPT_NAME VARCHAR2(200), ACORD_DR_NAME VARCHAR2(200), cnt NUMBER, det_item_fee_sumamt NUMBER(18,2), pric NUMBER(18,4), inscp_amt NUMBER(18,2));", "CREATE INDEX idx_fee_list_d_setl_id ON FEE_LIST_D(setl_id);", "CREATE INDEX idx_fee_list_d_cnt ON FEE_LIST_D(cnt);", "CREATE TABLE SETL_D_MERGED (setl_id VARCHAR2(50) PRIMARY KEY, fixmedins_code VARCHAR2(50), fixmedins_name VARCHAR2(200), HOSP_LV_NAME VARCHAR2(50), mdtrt_id VARCHAR2(50), ipt_otp_no VARCHAR2(50), psn_no VARCHAR2(50), psn_name VARCHAR2(200), certno VARCHAR2(30), GEND_NAME VARCHAR2(20), brdy DATE, age NUMBER, insu_admdvs VARCHAR2(50), INSUTYPE_NAME VARCHAR2(100), PSN_TYPE_NAME VARCHAR2(100), SP_PSN_TYPE_NAME VARCHAR2(100), med_type_name VARCHAR2(100), PAY_LOC_NAME VARCHAR2(100), setl_time DATE, adm_dept_name VARCHAR2(200), dscg_dept_name VARCHAR2(200), begntime DATE, endtime DATE, IPT_DAYS NUMBER, chfpdr_name VARCHAR2(200), adm_diag_dscr VARCHAR2(4000), dscg_maindiag_name VARCHAR2(4000), DIAG_NAME VARCHAR2(4000), dise_no VARCHAR2(50), dise_name VARCHAR2(200), OPRN_NAME VARCHAR2(4000), medfee_sumamt NUMBER(18,2), pool_prop_selfpay NUMBER, hifp_pay NUMBER, hifmi_pay NUMBER, maf_pay NUMBER, cvlserv_pay NUMBER, othfund_pay NUMBER, acct_pay NUMBER, cash_payamt NUMBER, fund_pay_sumamt NUMBER, insutype VARCHAR2(50));", "CREATE INDEX idx_setl_d_merged_setl_id ON SETL_D_MERGED(setl_id);", "CREATE INDEX idx_setl_d_fund_pay ON SETL_D_MERGED(FUND_PAY_SUMAMT)"], "sql": "with
a1 as (
  select
  setl_id,
  -- иҒҡеҗҲйЎ№зӣ®дҝЎжҒҜ
  listagg(distinct MEDINS_LIST_CODG, ',') within group (order by MEDINS_LIST_CODG) b_medins_list_codg,
  listagg(distinct medins_list_name, ',') within group (order by medins_list_name) b_medins_list_name,
  listagg(distinct f.hilist_code, ',') within group (order by f.hilist_code) b_hilist_code,
  listagg(distinct hilist_name, ',') within group (order by hilist_name) b_hilist_name,
  listagg(distinct MED_CHRGITM_TYPE_NAME, ',') within group (order by MED_CHRGITM_TYPE_NAME) MED_CHRGITM_TYPE,
  listagg(distinct CHRGITM_LV_NAME, ',') within group (order by CHRGITM_LV_NAME) CHRGITM_LV,
  listagg(distinct BILG_DEPT_NAME, ',') within group (order by BILG_DEPT_NAME) BILG_DEPT_NAME,
  listagg(distinct BILG_DR_NAME, ',') within group (order by BILG_DR_NAME) BILG_DR_NAME,
  listagg(distinct ACORD_DEPT_NAME, ',') within group (order by ACORD_DEPT_NAME) ACORD_DEPT_NAME,
  listagg(distinct ACORD_DR_NAME, ',') within group (order by ACORD_DR_NAME) ACORD_DR_NAME,
  -- з»ҹдёҖиҪ¬жҚўдёәвҖңж—ҘвҖқеҚ•дҪҚеҗҺзҡ„жҖ»ж•°йҮҸ
  sum(f.cnt ) as b_cnt,
  -- жҖ»иҙ№з”Ё
  sum(f.det_item_fee_sumamt) as b_fee,
  -- иҪ¬жҚўдёәвҖңж—ҘвҖқеҚ•дҪҚеҗҺзҡ„жңҖе°ҸеҚ•д»·
  min(f.pric ) as min_pric,
  -- иҪ¬жҚўдёәвҖңж—ҘвҖқеҚ•дҪҚеҗҺзҡ„жңҖе°ҸйҮ‘йўқ
  min(abs(f.inscp_amt / f.cnt) ) as min_amt
  from FEE_LIST_D f
  -- е…іиҒ”еҚ•дҪҚиҪ¬жҚўзі»ж•°иЎЁ
   where f.cnt <> 0
   and f.CHRGITM_LV_NAME in ('з”Ізұ»','д№ҷзұ»')
  -- жҢүз»“з®—жөҒж°ҙеҸ·еҲҶз»„
  group by f.setl_id
),
a2 as (
  select a1.*,
  -- иҝқи§„ж•°йҮҸ
  case
   when a1.b_cnt > (s.ipt_days *12+24) then a1.b_cnt - (s.ipt_days *12+24)
   else 0
  end as break_cnt,
  -- иҝқи§„йҮ‘йўқ
  case
   when a1.b_cnt > (s.ipt_days *12+24) then (a1.b_cnt - (s.ipt_days *12+24)) * (a1.min_pric * 1)
   else 0
  end as break_fee,
  -- иҝқи§„иҢғеӣҙеҶ…йҮ‘йўқ
  case
   when a1.b_cnt > (s.ipt_days *12+24) then (a1.b_cnt - (s.ipt_days *12+24)) * (a1.min_amt * 1)
   else 0
  end as break_amt
  from a1
  -- е…іиҒ”з»“з®—иЎЁиҺ·еҸ–дҪҸйҷўеӨ©ж•°
  inner join SETL_D_MERGED s on a1.setl_id = s.setl_id
  -- иҝҮж»Өиҝқи§„ж•°жҚ®
  where a1.b_cnt > (s.ipt_days *12+24)
   and s.FUND_PAY_SUMAMT <> 0
)
select
  s.fixmedins_code еҢ»йҷўд»Јз Ғ,
  s.fixmedins_name еҢ»йҷўеҗҚз§°,
  s.HOSP_LV_NAME еҢ»йҷўзә§еҲ«,
  s.setl_id з»“з®—еҚ•жҚ®еҸ·,
  s.mdtrt_id е°ұиҜҠID,
  s.ipt_otp_no дҪҸйҷўеҸ·,
  s.psn_no дёӘдәәзј–еҸ·,
  s.psn_name е§“еҗҚ,
  s.certno иә«д»ҪиҜҒеҸ·,
  s.GEND_NAME жҖ§еҲ«,
  s.brdy еҮәз”ҹж—Ҙжңҹ,
  s.age е№ҙйҫ„,
  s.insu_admdvs з»ҹзӯ№еҢә,
  s.INSUTYPE_NAME йҷ©з§Қзұ»еһӢ,
  s.PSN_TYPE_NAME еҢ»з–—дәәе‘ҳзұ»еҲ«,
  s.SP_PSN_TYPE_NAME зү№ж®Ҡдәәе‘ҳиә«д»Ҫзұ»еҲ«,
  s.med_type_name е°ұеҢ»зұ»еһӢ,
  s.PAY_LOC_NAME ж”Ҝд»ҳең°зӮ№зұ»еҲ«,
  s.setl_time з»“з®—ж—Ҙжңҹ,
  s.adm_dept_name е…Ҙйҷўз§‘е®Ө,
  s.dscg_dept_name еҮәйҷўз§‘е®Ө,
  s.begntime е…Ҙйҷўж—Ҙжңҹ,
  s.endtime еҮәйҷўж—Ҙжңҹ,
  s.IPT_DAYS еӨ©ж•°,
  s.chfpdr_name дё»жІ»еҢ»з”ҹ,
  s.adm_diag_dscr е…ҘйҷўиҜҠж–ӯ,
  s.dscg_maindiag_name еҮәйҷўиҜҠж–ӯ,
  s.DIAG_NAME е…¶д»–иҜҠж–ӯ,
  s.dise_no з—…з§Қзј–з Ғ,
  s.dise_name з—…з§ҚеҗҚз§°,
  s.OPRN_NAME жүӢжңҜеҸҠж“ҚдҪңеҗҚз§°,
  s.medfee_sumamt жҖ»йҮ‘йўқ,
  concat(to_char(s.pool_prop_selfpay * 100), '%') еҹәжң¬еҢ»з–—з»ҹзӯ№ж”Ҝд»ҳжҜ”дҫӢ,
  s.hifp_pay еҹәжң¬еҢ»дҝқж”Ҝд»ҳ,
  s.hifmi_pay еӨ§з—…жҠҘй”Җ,
  s.maf_pay еҢ»з–—ж•‘еҠ©,
  s.cvlserv_pay е…¬еҠЎе‘ҳиЎҘе……,
  s.othfund_pay е…¶д»–ж”Ҝд»ҳ,
  s.acct_pay дёӘдәәеёҗжҲ·ж”Ҝд»ҳ,
  s.cash_payamt дёӘдәәзҺ°йҮ‘ж”Ҝд»ҳ,
  s.fund_pay_sumamt еҹәйҮ‘ж”Ҝд»ҳжҖ»йўқ,
  fl.MED_CHRGITM_TYPE иҙ№з”Ёзұ»еҲ«,
  fl.BILG_DEPT_NAME ејҖеҚ•з§‘е®ӨеҗҚз§°,
  fl.BILG_DR_NAME ејҖеҚ•еҢ»з”ҹе§“еҗҚ,
  fl.ACORD_DEPT_NAME еҸ—еҚ•з§‘е®ӨеҗҚз§°,

You are a database expert in SQL performance optimization.
Given the table definitions, explain output and the original SQL, apply appropriate optimizations.
Output only the optimized SQL as a single-line statement with no markdown or extra text.

## Table Definitions:
CREATE TABLE FEE_LIST_D (setl_id VARCHAR2(50), MEDINS_LIST_CODG VARCHAR2(100), medins_list_name VARCHAR2(200), hilist_code VARCHAR2(100), hilist_name VARCHAR2(200), MED_CHRGITM_TYPE_NAME VARCHAR2(100), CHRGITM_LV_NAME VARCHAR2(50), BILG_DEPT_NAME VARCHAR2(200), BILG_DR_NAME VARCHAR2(200), ACORD_DEPT_NAME VARCHAR2(200), ACORD_DR_NAME VARCHAR2(200), cnt NUMBER, det_item_fee_sumamt NUMBER(18,2), pric NUMBER(18,4), inscp_amt NUMBER(18,2));
CREATE INDEX idx_fee_list_d_setl_id ON FEE_LIST_D(setl_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_fee_list_d_cnt ON FEE_LIST_D(cnt);
CREATE TABLE SETL_D_MERGED (setl_id VARCHAR2(50) PRIMARY KEY, fixmedins_code VARCHAR2(50), fixmedins_name VARCHAR2(200), HOSP_LV_NAME VARCHAR2(50), mdtrt_id VARCHAR2(50), ipt_otp_no VARCHAR2(50), psn_no VARCHAR2(50), psn_name VARCHAR2(200), certno VARCHAR2(30), GEND_NAME VARCHAR2(20), brdy DATE, age NUMBER, insu_admdvs VARCHAR2(50), INSUTYPE_NAME VARCHAR2(100), PSN_TYPE_NAME VARCHAR2(100), SP_PSN_TYPE_NAME VARCHAR2(100), med_type_name VARCHAR2(100), PAY_LOC_NAME VARCHAR2(100), setl_time DATE, adm_dept_name VARCHAR2(200), dscg_dept_name VARCHAR2(200), begntime DATE, endtime DATE, IPT_DAYS NUMBER, chfpdr_name VARCHAR2(200), adm_diag_dscr VARCHAR2(4000), dscg_maindiag_name VARCHAR2(4000), DIAG_NAME VARCHAR2(4000), dise_no VARCHAR2(50), dise_name VARCHAR2(200), OPRN_NAME VARCHAR2(4000), medfee_sumamt NUMBER(18,2), pool_prop_selfpay NUMBER, hifp_pay NUMBER, hifmi_pay NUMBER, maf_pay NUMBER, cvlserv_pay NUMBER, othfund_pay NUMBER, acct_pay NUMBER, cash_payamt NUMBER, fund_pay_sumamt NUMBER, insutype VARCHAR2(50));
CREATE INDEX idx_setl_d_merged_setl_id ON SETL_D_MERGED(setl_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_setl_d_fund_pay ON SETL_D_MERGED(FUND_PAY_SUMAMT)

## Original SQL:
with
a1 as (
  select
  setl_id,
  -- иҒҡеҗҲйЎ№зӣ®дҝЎжҒҜ
  listagg(distinct MEDINS_LIST_CODG, ',') within group (order by MEDINS_LIST_CODG) b_medins_list_codg,
  listagg(distinct medins_list_name, ',') within group (order by medins_list_name) b_medins_list_name,
  listagg(distinct f.hilist_code, ',') within group (order by f.hilist_code) b_hilist_code,
  listagg(distinct hilist_name, ',') within group (order by hilist_name) b_hilist_name,
  listagg(distinct MED_CHRGITM_TYPE_NAME, ',') within group (order by MED_CHRGITM_TYPE_NAME) MED_CHRGITM_TYPE,
  listagg(distinct CHRGITM_LV_NAME, ',') within group (order by CHRGITM_LV_NAME) CHRGITM_LV,
  listagg(distinct BILG_DEPT_NAME, ',') within group (order by BILG_DEPT_NAME) BILG_DEPT_NAME,
  listagg(distinct BILG_DR_NAME, ',') within group (order by BILG_DR_NAME) BILG_DR_NAME,
  listagg(distinct ACORD_DEPT_NAME, ',') within group (order by ACORD_DEPT_NAME) ACORD_DEPT_NAME,
  listagg(distinct ACORD_DR_NAME, ',') within group (order by ACORD_DR_NAME) ACORD_DR_NAME,
  -- з»ҹдёҖиҪ¬жҚўдёәвҖңж—ҘвҖқеҚ•дҪҚеҗҺзҡ„жҖ»ж•°йҮҸ
  sum(f.cnt ) as b_cnt,
  -- жҖ»иҙ№з”Ё
  sum(f.det_item_fee_sumamt) as b_fee,
  -- иҪ¬жҚўдёәвҖңж—ҘвҖқеҚ•дҪҚеҗҺзҡ„жңҖе°ҸеҚ•д»·
  min(f.pric ) as min_pric,
  -- иҪ¬жҚўдёәвҖңж—ҘвҖқеҚ•дҪҚеҗҺзҡ„жңҖе°ҸйҮ‘йўқ
  min(abs(f.inscp_amt / f.cnt) ) as min_amt
  from FEE_LIST_D f
  -- е…іиҒ”еҚ•дҪҚиҪ¬жҚўзі»ж•°иЎЁ
   where f.cnt <> 0
   and f.CHRGITM_LV_NAME in ('з”Ізұ»','д№ҷзұ»')
  -- жҢүз»“з®—жөҒж°ҙеҸ·еҲҶз»„
  group by f.setl_id
),
a2 as (
  select a1.*,
  -- иҝқи§„ж•°йҮҸ
  case
   when a1.b_cnt > (s.ipt_days *12+24) then a1.b_cnt - (s.ipt_days *12+24)
   else 0
  end as break_cnt,
  -- иҝқи§„йҮ‘йўқ
  case
   when a1.b_cnt > (s.ipt_days *12+24) then (a1.b_cnt - (s.ipt_days *12+24)) * (a1.min_pric * 1)
   else 0
  end as break_fee,
  -- иҝқи§„иҢғеӣҙеҶ…йҮ‘йўқ
  case
   when a1.b_cnt > (s.ipt_days *12+24) then (a1.b_cnt - (s.ipt_days *12+24)) * (a1.min_amt * 1)
   else 0
  end as break_amt
  from a1
  -- е…іиҒ”з»“з®—иЎЁиҺ·еҸ–дҪҸйҷўеӨ©ж•°
  inner join SETL_D_MERGED s on a1.setl_id = s.setl_id
  -- иҝҮж»Өиҝқи§„ж•°жҚ®
  where a1.b_cnt > (s.ipt_days *12+24)
   and s.FUND_PAY_SUMAMT <> 0
)
select

  s.certno иә«д»ҪиҜҒеҸ·,
  s.GEND_NAME жҖ§еҲ«,

  s.age е№ҙйҫ„,

  s.SP_PSN_TYPE_NAME зү№ж®Ҡдәәе‘ҳиә«д»Ҫзұ»еҲ«,

  s.PAY_LOC_NAME ж”Ҝд»ҳең°зӮ№зұ»еҲ«,
  s.setl_time з»“з®—ж—Ҙжңҹ,
  s.adm_dept_name е…Ҙйҷўз§‘е®Ө,
  s.dscg_dept_name еҮәйҷўз§‘е®Ө,
  s.begntime е…Ҙйҷўж—Ҙжңҹ,
  s.endtime еҮәйҷўж—Ҙжңҹ,
  s.IPT_DAYS еӨ©ж•°,
  s.chfpdr_name дё»жІ»еҢ»з”ҹ,
  s.adm_diag_dscr е…ҘйҷўиҜҠж–ӯ,
  s.dscg_maindiag_name еҮәйҷўиҜҠж–ӯ,
  s.DIAG_NAME е…¶д»–иҜҠж–ӯ,
  s.dise_no з—…з§Қзј–з Ғ,
  s.dise_name з—…з§ҚеҗҚз§°,
  s.OPRN_NAME жүӢжңҜеҸҠж“ҚдҪңеҗҚз§°,
  s.medfee_sumamt жҖ»йҮ‘йўқ,
  concat(to_char(s.pool_prop_selfpay * 100), '%') еҹәжң¬еҢ»з–—з»ҹзӯ№ж”Ҝд»ҳжҜ”дҫӢ,
  s.hifp_pay еҹәжң¬еҢ»дҝқж”Ҝд»ҳ,
  s.hifmi_pay еӨ§з—…жҠҘй”Җ,
  s.maf_pay еҢ»з–—ж•‘еҠ©,
  s.cvlserv_pay е…¬еҠЎе‘ҳиЎҘе……,
  s.othfund_pay е…¶д»–ж”Ҝд»ҳ,
  s.acct_pay дёӘдәәеёҗжҲ·ж”Ҝд»ҳ,
  s.cash_payamt дёӘдәәзҺ°йҮ‘ж”Ҝд»ҳ,
  s.fund_pay_sumamt еҹәйҮ‘ж”Ҝд»ҳжҖ»йўқ,
  fl.MED_CHRGITM_TYPE иҙ№з”Ёзұ»еҲ«,
  fl.BILG_DEPT_NAME ејҖеҚ•з§‘е®ӨеҗҚз§°,

  fl.ACORD_DEPT_NAME еҸ—еҚ•з§‘е®ӨеҗҚз§°,
  fl.ACORD_DR_NAME еҸ—еҚ•еҢ»з”ҹе§“еҗҚ,
  null ж”¶иҙ№ж—Ҙжңҹ,
  fl.b_medins_list_codg иҝқи§„еҢ»йҷўйЎ№зӣ®д»Јз Ғ,

  null жӯЈеёёеҢ»дҝқйЎ№зӣ®еҗҚз§°,

жүӢжңҜеҸҠж“ҚдҪңеҗҚз§°, s.medfee_sumamt жҖ»йҮ‘йўқ, concat(to_char(s.pool_prop_selfpay * 100), '%') еҹәжң¬еҢ»з–—з»ҹзӯ№ж”Ҝд»ҳжҜ”дҫӢ, s.hifp_pay еҹәжң¬еҢ»дҝқж”Ҝд»ҳ, s.hifmi_pay еӨ§з—…жҠҘй”Җ, s.maf_pay еҢ»з–—ж•‘еҠ©, s.cvlserv_pay е…¬еҠЎе‘ҳиЎҘе……, s.othfund_pay е…¶д»–ж”Ҝд»ҳ, s.acct_pay дёӘдәәеёҗжҲ·ж”Ҝд»ҳ, s.cash_payamt дёӘдәәзҺ°йҮ‘ж”Ҝд»ҳ, s.fund_pay_sumamt еҹәйҮ‘ж”Ҝд»ҳжҖ»йўқ, fl.MED_CHRGITM_TYPE иҙ№з”Ёзұ»еҲ«, fl.BILG_DEPT_NAME ејҖеҚ•з§‘е®ӨеҗҚз§°, fl.BILG_DR_NAME ејҖеҚ•еҢ»з”ҹе§“еҗҚ, fl.ACORD_DEPT_NAME еҸ—еҚ•з§‘е®ӨеҗҚз§°, fl.ACORD_DR_NAME еҸ—еҚ•еҢ»з”ҹе§“еҗҚ, null ж”¶иҙ№ж—Ҙжңҹ, fl.b_medins_list_codg иҝқи§„еҢ»йҷўйЎ№зӣ®д»Јз Ғ, fl.b_medins_list_name иҝқи§„еҢ»йҷўйЎ№зӣ®еҗҚз§°, fl.b_hilist_code иҝқи§„еҢ»дҝқйЎ№зӣ®д»Јз Ғ, fl.b_hilist_name иҝқи§„еҢ»дҝқйЎ№зӣ®еҗҚз§°, null жӯЈеёёеҢ»йҷўйЎ№зӣ®д»Јз Ғ, null жӯЈеёёеҢ»йҷўйЎ№зӣ®еҗҚз§°, null жӯЈеёёеҢ»дҝқйЎ№зӣ®д»Јз Ғ, null жӯЈеёёеҢ»дҝқйЎ№зӣ®еҗҚз§°, null жӯЈеёёйЎ№зӣ®ж•°йҮҸ, null жӯЈеёёйЎ№зӣ®йҮ‘йўқ, fl.b_cnt иҝқи§„йЎ№зӣ®ж”¶иҙ№ж•°йҮҸ, fl.min_pric иҝқи§„йЎ№зӣ®еҚ•д»·, (fl.b_cnt - (s.ipt_days*12+24)) иҝқи§„йЎ№зӣ®ж•°йҮҸ, fl.CHRGITM_LV иҝқи§„йЎ№зӣ®ж”Ҝд»ҳзұ»еҲ«, (fl.b_cnt - (s.ipt_days*12+24)) * fl.min_pric иҝқи§„йЎ№зӣ®йҮ‘йўқ, (fl.b_cnt - (s.ipt_days*12+24)) * fl.min_amt иҝқи§„йЎ№зӣ®иҢғеӣҙеҶ…йҮ‘йўқ, gettcamount((fl.b_cnt - (s.ipt_days*12+24)) * fl.min_amt, s.pool_prop_selfpay, s.hifp_pay, s.fund_pay_sumamt) еҹәжң¬з»ҹзӯ№иҝқи§„йҮ‘йўқ, getdbamount((fl.b_cnt - (s.ipt_days*12+24)) * fl.min_amt, s.insutype, s.hifmi_pay, s.fund_pay_sumamt) еӨ§з—…з»ҹзӯ№иҝқи§„йҮ‘йўқ, GETMAFAMOUNT((fl.b_cnt - (s.ipt_days*12+24)) * fl.min_amt, s.maf_pay, s.fund_pay_sumamt) еҢ»з–—ж•‘еҠ©иҝқи§„йҮ‘йўқ, case when substr(s.INSU_ADMDVS,1,4) != '{pool_no}' then 'жҳҜ' else 'еҗҰ' end жҳҜеҗҰејӮең°, 'CB_0020' иҝқи§„и§„еҲҷд»Јз Ғ, 'и¶…ж ҮеҮҶж”¶иҙ№' иҝқи§„зұ»еһӢ, 'жҢүе°Ҹж—¶ж”¶иҙ№зҡ„иЎҖж¶ІеҮҖеҢ–зұ»иҜҠз–—йЎ№зӣ®пјҲеҰӮиҮӘеҠЁи…№иҶңйҖҸжһҗгҖҒиҝһз»ӯжҖ§иЎҖж¶ІеҮҖеҢ–зӯүпјүпјҢж”¶иҙ№ж•°йҮҸи¶…иҝҮе®һйҷ…жҸҗдҫӣзҡ„иҜҠз–—жңҚеҠЎж•°йҮҸгҖӮ' иҝқи§„дәӢйЎ№, 'гҖҠжұҹиҘҝзңҒеҢ»з–—жңҚеҠЎд»·ж јйЎ№зӣ®зӣ®еҪ•пјҲ2023е№ҙдҝ®и®ўзүҲпјүгҖӢдёӯиЎҖж¶ІеҮҖеҢ–зұ»иҜҠз–—йЎ№зӣ®ж”¶иҙ№зҡ„зңҹе®һжҖ§гҖӮ' иҝқи§„дҫқжҚ® from SETL_D_MERGED s inner join a1 fl on s.setl_id = fl.setl_id where s.FUND_PAY_SUMAMT <> 0 and fl.b_cnt > (s.ipt_days*12+24)

{"case_id": "38", "db_type": "oracle", "description": "й—®йўҳжҰӮиҝ°пјҡиҜҘжҹҘиҜўеңЁ HRM_FLOOR.C_BASE_STATION_T(B) дёҠжңүеӨҡйҮҚзӯүеҖјиҝҮж»ӨпјҲBU_IDгҖҒHAC_IDгҖҒKEY_STATION_ID еҲ—е’Ң MFG_PROCESS_IDгҖҒDEL_FLAGпјүпјҢе№¶дё”еңЁдё»иЎЁ P дёҠжҢү WORK_DATE дёҺ DEL_FLAG иҝӣиЎҢзӯӣйҖүпјҢеҗҢж—¶еҢ…еҗ«дёҖдёӘе…іиҒ”зҡ„ EXISTS еӯҗжҹҘиҜўжқҘзЎ®и®Өе‘ҳе·ҘеңЁеҜ№еә”з«ҷзӮ№зҡ„жңүж•Ҳжү§з…§и®°еҪ•гҖӮжҪңеңЁжҖ§иғҪй—®йўҳеҢ…жӢ¬пјҡ1) еҰӮжһңз”ЁдәҺжҜ”иҫғзҡ„еҲ—дёҺеӯ—йқўйҮҸзұ»еһӢдёҚеҢ№й…ҚпјҲдҫӢеҰӮ WORK_DATE еӯ—ж®өиӢҘдёә VARCHAR еҲҷдёҺ DATE еёёйҮҸжҜ”иҫғдјҡеҸ‘з”ҹйҡҗејҸзұ»еһӢиҪ¬жҚўпјүпјҢдјҡеҜјиҮҙзҙўеј•еӨұж•Ҳпјӣ2) зјәе°‘иҰҶзӣ–иҝҷдәӣи°“иҜҚе’Ңе…іиҒ”еҲ—зҡ„еӨҚеҗҲзҙўеј•пјҢдјҡдҪҝеҫ—дјҳеҢ–еҷЁйҮҮз”Ёе…ЁиЎЁжү«жҸҸжҲ–еӨ§йҮҸеӣһиЎЁпјҢеўһеҠ  I/Oпјӣ3) EXISTS еӯҗжҹҘиҜўдҪҝз”ЁйҖ—еҸ·еҲҶйҡ”зҡ„иҖҒејҸиҝһжҺҘеҶҷжі•пјҲF, Hпјүдё”дёәзӣёе…іеӯҗжҹҘиҜўпјҢдјҡеҜјиҮҙеҜ№жҜҸдёҖиЎҢжү§иЎҢзҙўеј•жҹҘжүҫ/иҢғеӣҙжү«жҸҸпјҢиӢҘ H/F жІЎжңүеңЁ (EMP_NO, LICENSE_ID) дёҺ (LICENSE_ID, STATION_ID) дёҠе»әз«ӢеҗҲйҖӮзҙўеј•пјҢдјҡдә§з”ҹеӨ§йҮҸйҡҸжңә I/OгҖӮе»әи®®пјҡзЎ®и®Ө WORK_DATE/зӣёе…іеҲ—ж•°жҚ®зұ»еһӢдёҺи°“иҜҚеҢ№й…Қд»ҘйҒҝе…ҚйҡҗејҸиҪ¬жҚўпјӣдёә B иЎЁе»әз«ӢеӨҚеҗҲзҙўеј•иҰҶзӣ– (BU_ID, HAC_ID, KEY_STATION_ID, MFG_PROCESS_ID, DEL_FLAG) жҲ–жӢҶеҲҶдёәеӨҡдёӘйҖүжӢ©жҖ§зҙўеј•пјӣдёә P иЎЁе»әз«Ӣ (WORK_DATE, DEL_FLAG, STATION_ID, EMP_NO) зҙўеј•д»Ҙж”ҜжҢҒдё»и°“иҜҚе’ҢеҗҺз»ӯе…іиҒ”пјӣдёә R_KEY_STATION_MAN_T дёҺ R_KEY_STATION_LICENSE_T еҲҶеҲ«е»әз«Ӣй’ҲеҜ№ (EMP_NO, LICENSE_ID, LOSE_FLAG, DEL_FLAG) дёҺ (LICENSE_ID, STATION_ID, DEL_FLAG) зҡ„зҙўеј•пјӣе°Ҷ EXISTS еӯҗжҹҘиҜўж”№еҶҷдёәжҳҫејҸ JOIN жҲ–иҮіе°‘дҪҝз”Ёе…іиҒ”зҙўеј•д»ҘеҮҸе°‘еҜ№жҜҸиЎҢзҡ„йҮҚеӨҚжҹҘжүҫгҖӮеҗҢж—¶е»әи®®е°Ҷй«ҳйҖүжӢ©жҖ§и°“иҜҚпјҲеҰӮ P.DEL_FLAG=0гҖҒB.DEL_FLAG=0гҖҒB.BU_ID зӯүпјүе°ҪйҮҸдҪңдёәжңҖе…ҲиҜ„дј°зҡ„иҝҮж»ӨжқЎд»¶пјҢйҷҚдҪҺеҗҺз»ӯе…іиҒ”ж•°жҚ®йҮҸгҖӮ", "difficulty_level": "2", "create_table_statements": ["CREATE TABLE HRM_FLOOR.C_BASE_STATION_T (ID NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, STATION_NAME_ENG VARCHAR2(200), BU_ID NUMBER, HAC_ID NUMBER, KEY_STATION_ID NUMBER, MFG_PROCESS_ID NUMBER, DEL_FLAG NUMBER);", "CREATE INDEX IDX_C_BASE_STATION_BU_HAC_KEY_PROC_DEL ON HRM_FLOOR.C_BASE_STATION_T(BU_ID, HAC_ID, KEY_STATION_ID, MFG_PROCESS_ID, DEL_FLAG);", "CREATE TABLE HRM_FLOOR.R_EMP_STATION_PLAN_T (ID NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, WORK_DATE DATE, DEL_FLAG NUMBER, HWT_TYPE_ID NUMBER, LINE_ID NUMBER, STATION_ID NUMBER, EMP_NO VARCHAR2(50));", "CREATE INDEX IDX_R_EMP_STATION_PLAN_WORKDATE ON HRM_FLOOR.R_EMP_STATION_PLAN_T(WORK_DATE, DEL_FLAG, STATION_ID, EMP_NO);", "CREATE TABLE HRM_FLOOR.R_KEY_STATION_MAN_T (ID NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, LICENSE_ID NUMBER, EMP_NO VARCHAR2(50), LOSE_FLAG NUMBER, DEL_FLAG NUMBER);", "CREATE INDEX IDX_R_KEY_STATION_MAN_EMP_LICENSE ON HRM_FLOOR.R_KEY_STATION_MAN_T(EMP_NO, LICENSE_ID, LOSE_FLAG, DEL_FLAG);", "CREATE TABLE HRM_FLOOR.R_KEY_STATION_LICENSE_T (LICENSE_ID NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, STATION_ID NUMBER, DEL_FLAG NUMBER);", "CREATE INDEX IDX_R_KEY_STATION_LICENSE_STATION ON HRM_FLOOR.R_KEY_STATION_LICENSE_T(LICENSE_ID, STATION_ID, DEL_FLAG);"], "sql": "SELECT P.HWT_TYPE_ID,   --зҸӯеҲҘID
  HRM_EMP.GET_ID_TO_DESC (P.HWT_TYPE_ID) SHIFT,   --зҸӯеҲҘ
  B.FAMILY_ID AS MODEL_ID,   --ж©ҹзЁ®ID
  HRM_EMP.GET_ID_TO_DESC (B.FAMILY_ID) AS MODEL_NAME,  --ж©ҹзЁ®еҗҚзЁұ
  P.LINE_ID,  --з·ҡй«”ID
  GET_LOCATION_INFO (P.LINE_ID, '1') AS LINE_NAME,  --з·ҡй«”еҗҚзЁұ
  P.STATION_ID,  --е·Ҙз«ҷID
  B.STATION_NAME_ENG,   --е·Ҙз«ҷеҗҚзЁұ
  HRM_EMP.GET_ID_TO_DESC (B.KEY_STATION_ID) KEY_STATION_TYPE,  --е·Ҙз«ҷйЎһеһӢ
  P.EMP_NO
  --,P.CONFIRM_FLAG, --зўәиӘҚзӢҖж…Ӣ
  FROM HRM_FLOOR.R_EMP_STATION_PLAN_T P
  -- дҪҝз”ЁINNER,д»ҘдҫҝеҸӘиҰҒ еҗҢжҷӮз¬ҰеҗҲй җжҺ’й…Қе’Ңе·Ҙз«ҷеҹәзӨҺиіҮиЁҠзҡ„
  INNER JOIN HRM_FLOOR.C_BASE_STATION_T B
  ON  P.STATION_ID = B.ID
  AND B.DEL_FLAG = 0
  AND B.BU_ID = 245346  --iPad
  AND B.HAC_ID = 7137  --CD
  AND B.KEY_STATION_ID IN (4976, 8877, 38131)   --K/K+/K++
  AND B.MFG_PROCESS_ID = 140185  --иЈҪзЁӢзӮәMainline
   WHERE  P.WORK_DATE = DATE '2025-08-04'
  AND P.DEL_FLAG = 0
  -- зўәиӘҚи©Іе“Ўе·Ҙжңүе°ҚжҮүзҡ„гҖҢжңүж•Ҳеҹ·з…§+еңЁиҒ·гҖҚй‘°еҢҷз«ҷиЁҳйҢ„пјҲд»ҚйңҖз«ҷй»һдёҖиҮҙпјү
  AND EXISTS
   (SELECT 1
  FROM HRM_FLOOR.R_KEY_STATION_LICENSE_T F,
  HRM_FLOOR.R_KEY_STATION_MAN_T H
   WHERE  H.LICENSE_ID = F.LICENSE_ID
  AND H.EMP_NO = P.EMP_NO
  AND H.LOSE_FLAG = 10078
  AND H.DEL_FLAG = 0
  AND F.DEL_FLAG = 0
  AND F.STATION_ID = P.STATION_ID)", "explain": "ID	PLAN_STEP	COST	CARDINALITY	BYTES	CPU_COST	IO_COST
0	SELECT STATEMENT	120	200	16000	8000	40
1	  NESTED LOOPS	120	200	16000	8000	40
2	   INDEX RANGE SCAN IDX_C_BASE_STATION_BU_HAC_KEY_PROC_DEL	10	200	8000	1000	5
3	  TABLE ACCESS BY INDEX ROWID C_BASE_STATION_T	30	200	8000	2000	10
4	   INDEX RANGE SCAN IDX_R_EMP_STATION_PLAN_WORKDATE	20	200	2000	1000	5
5	  TABLE ACCESS BY INDEX ROWID R_EMP_STATION_PLAN_T	70	200	8000	5000	20
6	   FILTER (P.WORK_DATE = DATE '2025-08-04' AND P.DEL_FLAG = 0)	---	---	---	---	---
7	   NESTED LOOPS (correlated) -- EXISTS subquery	20	200	4000	2000	5
8	  INDEX RANGE SCAN IDX_R_KEY_STATION_MAN_EMP_LICENSE (H)	2	1	40	10	1
9	   TABLE ACCESS BY INDEX ROWID R_KEY_STATION_MAN_T	5	1	40	20	1
10	  INDEX RANGE SCAN IDX_R_KEY_STATION_LICENSE_STATION (F)	5	2	80	20	1
11	   TABLE ACCESS BY INDEX ROWID R_KEY_STATION_LICENSE_T	8	2	80	30	1
12	  FILTER (EXISTS-subquery conditions applied per outer row)	---	---	---	---	---"}
case_datas.mode_question:
You are a database expert in SQL performance optimization.
Given the table definitions, explain output and the original SQL, apply appropriate optimizations.
Output only the optimized SQL as a single-line statement with no markdown or extra text.

## Table Definitions:
CREATE TABLE HRM_FLOOR.C_BASE_STATION_T (ID NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, STATION_NAME_ENG VARCHAR2(200), BU_ID NUMBER, HAC_ID NUMBER, KEY_STATION_ID NUMBER, MFG_PROCESS_ID NUMBER, DEL_FLAG NUMBER);
CREATE INDEX IDX_C_BASE_STATION_BU_HAC_KEY_PROC_DEL ON HRM_FLOOR.C_BASE_STATION_T(BU_ID, HAC_ID, KEY_STATION_ID, MFG_PROCESS_ID, DEL_FLAG);
CREATE TABLE HRM_FLOOR.R_EMP_STATION_PLAN_T (ID NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, WORK_DATE DATE, DEL_FLAG NUMBER, HWT_TYPE_ID NUMBER, LINE_ID NUMBER, STATION_ID NUMBER, EMP_NO VARCHAR2(50));
CREATE INDEX IDX_R_EMP_STATION_PLAN_WORKDATE ON HRM_FLOOR.R_EMP_STATION_PLAN_T(WORK_DATE, DEL_FLAG, STATION_ID, EMP_NO);
CREATE TABLE HRM_FLOOR.R_KEY_STATION_MAN_T (ID NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, LICENSE_ID NUMBER, EMP_NO VARCHAR2(50), LOSE_FLAG NUMBER, DEL_FLAG NUMBER);
CREATE INDEX IDX_R_KEY_STATION_MAN_EMP_LICENSE ON HRM_FLOOR.R_KEY_STATION_MAN_T(EMP_NO, LICENSE_ID, LOSE_FLAG, DEL_FLAG);
CREATE TABLE HRM_FLOOR.R_KEY_STATION_LICENSE_T (LICENSE_ID NUMBER PRIMARY KEY, STATION_ID NUMBER, DEL_FLAG NUMBER);
CREATE INDEX IDX_R_KEY_STATION_LICENSE_STATION ON HRM_FLOOR.R_KEY_STATION_LICENSE_T(LICENSE_ID, STATION_ID, DEL_FLAG);
В·В·

4	   INDEX RANGE SCAN IDX_R_EMP_STATION_PLAN_WORKDATE	20	200	2000	1000	5

## Original SQL:
SELECT P.HWT_TYPE_ID,   --зҸӯеҲҘID
  HRM_EMP.GET_ID_TO_DESC (P.HWT_TYPE_ID) SHIFT,   --зҸӯеҲҘ
  B.FAMILY_ID AS MODEL_ID,   --ж©ҹзЁ®ID
  HRM_EMP.GET_ID_TO_DESC (B.FAMILY_ID) AS MODEL_NAME,  --ж©ҹзЁ®еҗҚзЁұ
  P.LINE_ID,  --з·ҡй«”ID
  GET_LOCATION_INFO (P.LINE_ID, '1') AS LINE_NAME,  --з·ҡй«”еҗҚзЁұ
  P.STATION_ID,  --е·Ҙз«ҷID
  B.STATION_NAME_ENG,   --е·Ҙз«ҷеҗҚзЁұ
  HRM_EMP.GET_ID_TO_DESC (B.KEY_STATION_ID) KEY_STATION_TYPE,  --е·Ҙз«ҷйЎһеһӢ
  P.EMP_NO
  --,P.CONFIRM_FLAG, --зўәиӘҚзӢҖж…Ӣ
  FROM HRM_FLOOR.R_EMP_STATION_PLAN_T P
  -- дҪҝз”ЁINNER,д»ҘдҫҝеҸӘиҰҒ еҗҢжҷӮз¬ҰеҗҲй җжҺ’й…Қе’Ңе·Ҙз«ҷеҹәзӨҺиіҮиЁҠзҡ„
  INNER JOIN HRM_FLOOR.C_BASE_STATION_T B
  ON  P.STATION_ID = B.ID
  AND B.DEL_FLAG = 0
  AND B.BU_ID = 245346  --iPad
  AND B.HAC_ID = 7137  --CD
  AND B.KEY_STATION_ID IN (4976, 8877, 38131)   --K/K+/K++
  AND B.MFG_PROCESS_ID = 140185  --иЈҪзЁӢзӮәMainline
   WHERE  P.WORK_DATE = DATE '2025-08-04'
  AND P.DEL_FLAG = 0
  -- зўәиӘҚи©Іе“Ўе·Ҙжңүе°ҚжҮүзҡ„гҖҢжңүж•Ҳеҹ·з…§+еңЁиҒ·гҖҚй‘°еҢҷз«ҷиЁҳйҢ„пјҲд»ҚйңҖз«ҷй»һдёҖиҮҙпјү
  AND EXISTS
   (SELECT 1
  FROM HRM_FLOOR.R_KEY_STATION_LICENSE_T F,
  HRM_FLOOR.R_KEY_STATION_MAN_T H
   WHERE  H.LICENSE_ID = F.LICENSE_ID
  AND H.EMP_NO = P.EMP_NO
  AND H.LOSE_FLAG = 10078
  AND H.DEL_FLAG = 0
  AND F.DEL_FLAG = 0
  AND F.STATION_ID = P.STATION_ID)

## Optimized SQL:

model_answers.model_answer: SELECT /*+ LEADING(B P) USE_NL(P) INDEX(B IDX_C_BASE_STATION_BU_HAC_KEY_PROC_DEL) INDEX(P IDX_R_EMP_STATION_PLAN_WORKDATE) */ P.HWT_TYPE_ID, HRM_EMP.GET_ID_TO_DESC(P.HWT_TYPE_ID) SHIFT, B.FAMILY_ID AS MODEL_ID, HRM_EMP.GET_ID_TO_DESC(B.FAMILY_ID) AS MODEL_NAME, P.LINE_ID, GET_LOCATION_INFO(P.LINE_ID, '1') AS LINE_NAME, P.STATION_ID, B.STATION_NAME_ENG, HRM_EMP.GET_ID_TO_DESC(B.KEY_STATION_ID) KEY_STATION_TYPE, P.EMP_NO FROM HRM_FLOOR.C_BASE_STATION_T B INNER JOIN HRM_FLOOR.R_EMP_STATION_PLAN_T P ON P.STATION_ID = B.ID AND P.WORK_DATE = DATE '2025-08-04' AND P.DEL_FLAG = 0 WHERE B.DEL_FLAG = 0 AND B.BU_ID = 245346 AND B.HAC_ID = 7137 AND B.MFG_PROCESS_ID = 140185 AND B.KEY_STATION_ID IN (4976, 8877, 38131) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM HRM_FLOOR.R_KEY_STATION_MAN_T H, HRM_FLOOR.R_KEY_STATION_LICENSE_T F WHERE H.EMP_NO = P.EMP_NO AND H.LOSE_FLAG = 10078 AND H.DEL_FLAG = 0 AND F.LICENSE_ID = H.LICENSE_ID AND F.DEL_FLAG = 0 AND F.STATION_ID = P.STATION_ID);

{"case_id": "39", "db_type": "sqlserver", "description": "й—®йўҳжҰӮиҝ°пјҡеҺҹе§ӢжҹҘиҜўеҢ…еҗ«дёҖдёӘе…ЁиЎЁиҒҡеҗҲ + зӘ—еҸЈеҮҪж•°зҡ„ CTEпјҲrank_generalпјүпјҢеӨҡдёӘ LEFT JOIN дёҺдёҖдёӘ CROSS JOIN(me еӯҗжҹҘиҜў)пјҢд»ҘеҸҠеҜ№ otr.otr_consulta зҡ„иЎҢзә§еұ•ејҖ (CROSS APPLY (VALUES ...)) еҶҚеҒҡ GROUP BYгҖӮжҖ§иғҪз“¶йўҲеҸҜиғҪжқҘиҮӘеҮ еӨ„пјҡ
1) rank_general йңҖиҰҒеҜ№ flashdeventas.vetas_y_formas_de_pago еҒҡ GROUP BY е№¶жҢү SUM жҺ’еәҸеҶҚи®Ўз®— ROW_NUMBERпјҢиӢҘж— еҗҲйҖӮзҙўеј•/йў„иҒҡеҗҲдјҡеҜјиҮҙе…ЁиЎЁжү«жҸҸдёҺжҳӮиҙөзҡ„жҺ’еәҸпјӣ
2) me дҪҝз”ЁеёёйҮҸзӯӣйҖүдҪҶиў« CROSS JOIN еҲ°дё»жҹҘпјҢиӢҘ me иҝ”еӣһеӨҡиЎҢдјҡд№ҳжү©еӨ§еӨ–еұӮиЎҢж•°пјӣеҚідҪҝ me д»…иҝ”еӣһдёҖиЎҢпјҢдҝқз•ҷжңӘиў«еӨ–еұӮдҪҝз”Ёзҡ„еҲ—дјҡйҖ жҲҗдёҚеҝ…иҰҒзҡ„ж•°жҚ®дј йҖ’пјҲеҸҜз”ЁжҠ•еҪұдёӢжҺЁз§»йҷӨ proveedor дёҺ estiloпјүпјӣ
3) otr еӯҗжҹҘиҜўеҜ№ otr.otr_consulta еҒҡдәҶ VALUES еұ•ејҖеҗҺ GROUP BYпјҢиӢҘдёҚжҠҠй«ҳйҖүжӢ©жҖ§и°“иҜҚпјҲc.tienda = 3064пјүдёӢжҺЁпјҢдјҡжү«жҸҸеӨ§йҮҸж— е…іиЎҢе№¶дә§з”ҹеӨ§и§„жЁЎиҒҡеҗҲдёӯй—ҙз»“жһңпјӣ
4) еӨҡдёӘ LEFT JOINпјҲдҫӢеҰӮ ranking_tda_jerarquiaгҖҒcontrol_asignacion_matricesпјүиӢҘзјәд№ҸиҰҶзӣ–зҙўеј•пјҢдјҡеј•еҸ‘еӨ§йҮҸеӣһиЎЁе’ҢйҡҸжңә I/OгҖӮ

е»әи®®пјҲдёҺе®һд№ з”ҹз»ҷеҮәзҡ„и§„еҲҷдёҖиҮҙпјүпјҡ
- иҝӣиЎҢжҠ•еҪұдёӢжҺЁпјҡеңЁ me еӯҗжҹҘиҜўдёӯз§»йҷӨжңӘиў«еӨ–еұӮз”ЁеҲ°зҡ„еҲ—пјҲеҰӮ proveedorгҖҒestiloпјүпјҢеҮҸе°‘дёӯй—ҙз»“жһңе®ҪеәҰпјӣ
- иҝӣиЎҢи°“иҜҚдёӢжҺЁпјҡжҠҠй«ҳйҖүжӢ©жҖ§жқЎд»¶ c.tienda = 3064 дёӢжҺЁиҮі otr зҡ„жү«жҸҸ/иҒҡеҗҲеӯҗжҹҘиҜўпјҲеҚі WHERE oc.id_tienda = 3064пјүпјҢжҳҫи‘—йҷҚдҪҺ otr иҒҡеҗҲйҮҸпјӣ
- жЈҖжҹҘе№¶е»әз«Ӣеҝ…иҰҒзҙўеј•пјҡдҫӢеҰӮ otr.otr_consulta дёҠеә”жңү (id_tienda, id_departamento, id_subdepartamento, id_clase, id_subclase, tipo_articulo) зҡ„еӨҚеҗҲзҙўеј•жҲ–иҮіе°‘ id_tienda зҡ„зҙўеј•пјӣcatalogos.maestro_estilos еҸҜеңЁ (proveedor, estilo) е»әзҙўеј•пјӣcatalogos.ranking_tda_jerarquia еңЁ (id_tienda, departamento, subdepartamento, clase, subclase) дёҠе»әзҙўеј•пјӣclusters.tienda_atributos еңЁ (centro_comercial, clima, tienda) е»әеӨҚеҗҲ/еүҚзјҖзҙўеј•пјӣcatalogos.tiendas еңЁ TIENDA еҲ—е»әдё»й”®/зҙўеј•гҖӮ 
- еҜ№ rank_general зҡ„е…ЁиЎЁжҺ’еәҸејҖй”Җж•Ҹж„ҹж—¶пјҢиҖғиҷ‘зҰ»зәҝзү©еҢ–/е‘Ёжңҹз»ҙжҠӨжҺ’еҗҚиЎЁжҲ–йҷҗеҲ¶и®Ўз®—иҢғеӣҙпјҲиӢҘдёҡеҠЎе…Ғи®ёпјүгҖӮ

еңЁж»Ўи¶іиҜӯд№үеүҚжҸҗдёӢпјҲзЎ®дҝқз§»йҷӨзҡ„еҲ—зЎ®е®һдёҚиў«еӨ–еұӮеј•з”ЁпјҢдё” c.tienda дёәејәйҖүжӢ©жҖ§иҝҮж»ӨпјүпјҢж–№ејҸ1 зҡ„жҠ•еҪұдёҺи°“иҜҚдёӢжҺЁжҳҜдҪҺйЈҺйҷ©дё”з«ӢеҚіи§Ғж•Ҳзҡ„ж”№иҝӣпјӣж–№ејҸ2пјҲжӣҙжҝҖиҝӣзҡ„жҸҗеүҚиҝҮж»Ө/LEFTвҶ’INNER зӯүпјүиӢҘиҰҒйҮҮз”ЁйңҖдёҘж јйӘҢиҜҒдёҚдјҡж”№еҸҳз»“жһңгҖӮ", "difficulty_level": "1", "create_table_statements": ["CREATE TABLE catalogos.tiendas (TIENDA INT PRIMARY KEY, nombre NVARCHAR(200), tipo CHAR(1), estatus CHAR(1), marca INT, ciudad NVARCHAR(100), estado NVARCHAR(100), m2 DECIMAL(10,2));", "CREATE INDEX IDX_TIENDA_TIPO_MARCA ON catalogos.tiendas(tipo, estatus, marca);", "CREATE TABLE flashdeventas.vetas_y_formas_de_pago (ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY, TIENDA INT, MERCANCIASINIVA DECIMAL(18,4), FECHA DATETIME);", "CREATE INDEX IDX_VETAS_TIENDA ON flashdeventas.vetas_y_formas_de_pago(TIENDA);", "CREATE TABLE clusters.tienda_atributos (tienda INT PRIMARY KEY, centro_comercial INT, clima NVARCHAR(200));", "CREATE INDEX IDX_TIENDA_ATR_CENTRO_CLIMA ON clusters.tienda_atributos(centro_comercial, clima, tienda);", "CREATE TABLE catalogos.maestro_estilos (departamento INT, subdepartamento INT, clase INT, subclase INT, proveedor INT, estilo NVARCHAR(100), tipo_articulo INT);", "CREATE INDEX IDX_MAESTRO_ESTILOS_PROV_ESTILO ON catalogos.maestro_estilos(proveedor, estilo);", "CREATE TABLE catalogos.ranking_tda_jerarquia (id_tienda INT, departamento INT, subdepartamento INT, clase INT, subclase INT, ranking INT);", "CREATE INDEX IDX_RJ_IDTIENDA_DEPT ON catalogos.ranking_tda_jerarquia(id_tienda, departamento, subdepartamento, clase, subclase);", "CREATE TABLE catalogos.control_asignacion_matrices (clasificacion INT, matrices_min INT);", "CREATE INDEX IDX_CAM_CLASIFICACION ON catalogos.control_asignacion_matrices(clasificacion);", "CREATE TABLE otr.otr_consulta (id_tienda INT, id_departamento INT, id_subdepartamento INT, id_clase INT, id_subclase INT, tipo_articulo INT, mes1_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes2_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes3_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes4_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes5_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes6_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes7_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes8_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes9_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes10_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes11_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes12_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4));", "CREATE INDEX IDX_OTR_ID_TIENDA_FULL ON otr.otr_consulta(id_tienda, id_departamento, id_subdepartamento, id_clase, id_subclase, tipo_articulo);", "CREATE VIEW catalogos.vw_supervisores AS SELECT tienda, nombre FROM catalogos.tiendas; -- з®ҖеҢ–зӨәдҫӢ", "CREATE VIEW catalogos.vw_regionales AS SELECT tienda, nombre FROM catalogos.tiendas; -- з®ҖеҢ–зӨәдҫӢ"], "sql": ";WITH rank_general AS (
  SELECT 
  ta.TIENDA AS id,
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
  ORDER BY SUM(v.MERCANCIASINIVA) DESC
  ) AS actual_rank_global
  FROM catalogos.tiendas ta
  LEFT JOIN flashdeventas.vetas_y_formas_de_pago v ON v.TIENDA = ta.TIENDA
  WHERE ta.tipo = 'S' AND estatus = 'A' AND ta.marca = 30
  GROUP BY ta.TIENDA
) 
SELECT 
  rg.actual_rank_global   
  ,t.nombre
  ,vw_r.nombre as regional
  ,vw_s.nombre as supervisor
  ,t.estado
  ,'RUTA' as ruta  ----
  ,t.m2 as tienda_m2
  ,'TAMAГ‘O' as tamanio   ----
  ,rj.ranking as rank_jerarquia_n4
  ,t.ciudad
  ,cam.matrices_min as propuesta
  ,otr.abierto_otr as abierto_otr
  ,c.* 
FROM clusters.tienda_atributos c
LEFT JOIN catalogos.tiendas t ON c.tienda = t.tienda
LEFT JOIN catalogos.vw_supervisores vw_s ON c.tienda = vw_s.tienda
LEFT JOIN catalogos.vw_regionales vw_r ON c.tienda = vw_r.tienda
LEFT JOIN rank_general rg ON c.tienda = rg.id
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT departamento, subdepartamento, clase, subclase, proveedor, estilo, tipo_articulo
  FROM catalogos.maestro_estilos me
  WHERE me.proveedor = 1162 AND me.estilo = 'C21031101'
) me
LEFT JOIN catalogos.ranking_tda_jerarquia rj 
  ON c.tienda = rj.id_tienda
  AND rj.departamento = me.departamento
  AND rj.subdepartamento = me.subdepartamento
  AND rj.clase = me.clase
  AND rj.subclase = me.subclase
LEFT JOIN catalogos.control_asignacion_matrices cam
  ON rj.ranking = cam.clasificacion
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT
  oc.id_tienda,
  oc.id_departamento,
  oc.id_subdepartamento,
  oc.id_clase,
  oc.id_subclase,
  oc.tipo_articulo,
  SUM(CASE WHEN n >= MONTH(GETDATE()) THEN ISNULL(val, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS abierto_otr
  FROM otr.otr_consulta oc
  CROSS APPLY (VALUES
  (1,  oc.mes1_compra_adicional),
  (2,  oc.mes2_compra_adicional),
  (3,  oc.mes3_compra_adicional),
  (4,  oc.mes4_compra_adicional),
  (5,  oc.mes5_compra_adicional),
  (6,  oc.mes6_compra_adicional),
  (7,  oc.mes7_compra_adicional),
  (8,  oc.mes8_compra_adicional),
  (9,  oc.mes9_compra_adicional),
  (10, oc.mes10_compra_adicional),
  (11, oc.mes11_compra_adicional),
  (12, oc.mes12_compra_adicional)
  ) m(n, val)
  GROUP BY
  oc.id_tienda,
  oc.id_departamento,
  oc.id_subdepartamento,
  oc.id_clase,
  oc.id_subclase,
  oc.tipo_articulo
) otr
  ON  otr.id_tienda = c.tienda
  AND otr.id_departamento = me.departamento
  AND otr.id_subdepartamento = me.subdepartamento
  AND otr.id_clase = me.clase
  AND otr.id_subclase = me.subclase
  AND otr.tipo_articulo = me.tipo_articulo
WHERE 1=1  AND c.centro_comercial = 1 AND c.clima LIKE '%calor todo el tiempo%' AND c.tienda = 3064", "explain": "ID	PLAN_STEP	COST	CARDINALITY	BYTES	CPU_COST	IO_COST
0	SELECT STATEMENT	15200	10000	1200000	452000	14800
1	  MERGE JOIN	15200	10000	1200000	452000	14800
2	   HASH AGGREGATE (rank_general: SUM + SORT for ROW_NUMBER)	9200	10000	600000	300000	9000
3	  TABLE SCAN flashdeventas.vetas_y_formas_de_pago	4800	10000	480000	240000	4800
4	   INDEX SEEK catalogos.tiendas (type/estatus/marca filter)	200	5000	80000	20000	200
5	   SORT	3000	10000	200000	80000	3000
6	   HASH MATCH (left outer join rj/cam/others)	2400	5000	300000	100000	2400
7	  VIEW (me CROSS JOIN) -- expands outer rows when me has >1 row	50	10	800	500	50
8	  HASH AGGREGATE (otr subquery grouping)	6800	8000	400000	160000	6800
9	   TABLE SCAN otr.otr_consulta	6600	8000	380000	150000	6600
10	  CROSS APPLY (VALUES ...) expansion per row	---	---	---	---	---
11	   NESTED LOOPS (apply joins to clusters.tienda_atributos filtered by centro_comercial/clima/tiena)	1200	1	160	600	120
12	  INDEX SEEK IDX_TIENDA_ATR_CENTRO_CLIMA ON clusters.tienda_atributos (centro_comercial,clima,tienda)	10	1	80	20	5
13	  TABLE ACCESS BY INDEX ROWID catalogos.tiendas / vw_supervisores / vw_regionales	300	1	320	100	30
14	  FILTER (c.centro_comercial = 1 AND c.clima LIKE '%calor todo el tiempo%' AND c.tienda = 3064)	---	---	---	---	---"}
case_datas.mode_question:
You are a database expert in SQL performance optimization.
Given the table definitions, explain output and the original SQL, apply appropriate optimizations.
Output only the optimized SQL as a single-line statement with no markdown or extra text.

## Table Definitions:
CREATE TABLE catalogos.tiendas (TIENDA INT PRIMARY KEY, nombre NVARCHAR(200), tipo CHAR(1), estatus CHAR(1), marca INT, ciudad NVARCHAR(100), estado NVARCHAR(100), m2 DECIMAL(10,2));
CREATE INDEX IDX_TIENDA_TIPO_MARCA ON catalogos.tiendas(tipo, estatus, marca);
CREATE TABLE flashdeventas.vetas_y_formas_de_pago (ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY, TIENDA INT, MERCANCIASINIVA DECIMAL(18,4), FECHA DATETIME);
CREATE INDEX IDX_VETAS_TIENDA ON flashdeventas.vetas_y_formas_de_pago(TIENDA);
CREATE TABLE clusters.tienda_atributos (tienda INT PRIMARY KEY, centro_comercial INT, clima NVARCHAR(200));
CREATE INDEX IDX_TIENDA_ATR_CENTRO_CLIMA ON clusters.tienda_atributos(centro_comercial, clima, tienda);
CREATE TABLE catalogos.maestro_estilos (departamento INT, subdepartamento INT, clase INT, subclase INT, proveedor INT, estilo NVARCHAR(100), tipo_articulo INT);
CREATE INDEX IDX_MAESTRO_ESTILOS_PROV_ESTILO ON catalogos.maestro_estilos(proveedor, estilo);
CREATE TABLE catalogos.ranking_tda_jerarquia (id_tienda INT, departamento INT, subdepartamento INT, clase INT, subclase INT, ranking INT);
CREATE INDEX IDX_RJ_IDTIENDA_DEPT ON catalogos.ranking_tda_jerarquia(id_tienda, departamento, subdepartamento, clase, subclase);
CREATE TABLE catalogos.control_asignacion_matrices (clasificacion INT, matrices_min INT);
CREATE INDEX IDX_CAM_CLASIFICACION ON catalogos.control_asignacion_matrices(clasificacion);
CREATE TABLE otr.otr_consulta (id_tienda INT, id_departamento INT, id_subdepartamento INT, id_clase INT, id_subclase INT, tipo_articulo INT, mes1_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes2_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes3_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes4_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes5_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes6_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes7_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes8_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes9_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes10_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes11_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4), mes12_compra_adicional DECIMAL(18,4));
CREATE INDEX IDX_OTR_ID_TIENDA_FULL ON otr.otr_consulta(id_tienda, id_departamento, id_subdepartamento, id_clase, id_subclase, tipo_articulo);
CREATE VIEW catalogos.vw_supervisores AS SELECT tienda, nombre FROM catalogos.tiendas; -- з®ҖеҢ–зӨәдҫӢ
CREATE VIEW catalogos.vw_regionales AS SELECT tienda, nombre FROM catalogos.tiendas; -- з®ҖеҢ–зӨәдҫӢ
В·В·

## Original SQL:
;WITH rank_general AS (
  SELECT 
  ta.TIENDA AS id,
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
  ORDER BY SUM(v.MERCANCIASINIVA) DESC
  ) AS actual_rank_global
  FROM catalogos.tiendas ta
  LEFT JOIN flashdeventas.vetas_y_formas_de_pago v ON v.TIENDA = ta.TIENDA
  WHERE ta.tipo = 'S' AND estatus = 'A' AND ta.marca = 30
  GROUP BY ta.TIENDA
) 
SELECT 
  rg.actual_rank_global   
  ,t.nombre
  ,vw_r.nombre as regional
  ,vw_s.nombre as supervisor
  ,t.estado
  ,'RUTA' as ruta  ----
  ,t.m2 as tienda_m2
  ,'TAMAГ‘O' as tamanio   ----
  ,rj.ranking as rank_jerarquia_n4
  ,t.ciudad
  ,cam.matrices_min as propuesta
  ,otr.abierto_otr as abierto_otr
  ,c.* 
FROM clusters.tienda_atributos c
LEFT JOIN catalogos.tiendas t ON c.tienda = t.tienda
LEFT JOIN catalogos.vw_supervisores vw_s ON c.tienda = vw_s.tienda
LEFT JOIN catalogos.vw_regionales vw_r ON c.tienda = vw_r.tienda
LEFT JOIN rank_general rg ON c.tienda = rg.id
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT departamento, subdepartamento, clase, subclase, proveedor, estilo, tipo_articulo
  FROM catalogos.maestro_estilos me
  WHERE me.proveedor = 1162 AND me.estilo = 'C21031101'
) me
LEFT JOIN catalogos.ranking_tda_jerarquia rj 
  ON c.tienda = rj.id_tienda
  AND rj.departamento = me.departamento
  AND rj.subdepartamento = me.subdepartamento
  AND rj.clase = me.clase
  AND rj.subclase = me.subclase
LEFT JOIN catalogos.control_asignacion_matrices cam
  ON rj.ranking = cam.clasificacion
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT
  oc.id_tienda,
  oc.id_departamento,
  oc.id_subdepartamento,
  oc.id_clase,
  oc.id_subclase,
  oc.tipo_articulo,
  SUM(CASE WHEN n >= MONTH(GETDATE()) THEN ISNULL(val, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS abierto_otr
  FROM otr.otr_consulta oc
  CROSS APPLY (VALUES
  (1,  oc.mes1_compra_adicional),
  (2,  oc.mes2_compra_adicional),
  (3,  oc.mes3_compra_adicional),
  (4,  oc.mes4_compra_adicional),
  (5,  oc.mes5_compra_adicional),
  (6,  oc.mes6_compra_adicional),
  (7,  oc.mes7_compra_adicional),
  (8,  oc.mes8_compra_adicional),
  (9,  oc.mes9_compra_adicional),
  (10, oc.mes10_compra_adicional),
  (11, oc.mes11_compra_adicional),
  (12, oc.mes12_compra_adicional)
  ) m(n, val)
  GROUP BY
  oc.id_tienda,
  oc.id_departamento,
  oc.id_subdepartamento,
  oc.id_clase,
  oc.id_subclase,
  oc.tipo_articulo
) otr
  ON  otr.id_tienda = c.tienda
  AND otr.id_departamento = me.departamento
  AND otr.id_subdepartamento = me.subdepartamento
  AND otr.id_clase = me.clase
  AND otr.id_subclase = me.subclase
  AND otr.tipo_articulo = me.tipo_articulo
WHERE 1=1  AND c.centro_comercial = 1 AND c.clima LIKE '%calor todo el tiempo%' AND c.tienda = 3064

AS supervisor, t.estado, 'RUTA' AS ruta, t.m2 AS tienda_m2, 'TAMAГ‘O' AS tamanio, rj.ranking AS rank_jerarquia_n4, t.ciudad, cam.matrices_min AS propuesta, otr.abierto_otr AS abierto_otr, c.* FROM clusters.tienda_atributos c CROSS JOIN me LEFT JOIN catalogos.tiendas t ON c.tienda = t.tienda LEFT JOIN catalogos.vw_supervisores vw_s ON c.tienda = vw_s.tienda LEFT JOIN catalogos.vw_regionales vw_r ON c.tienda = vw_r.tienda LEFT JOIN rank_general rg ON c.tienda = rg.id LEFT JOIN catalogos.ranking_tda_jerarquia rj ON rj.id_tienda = c.tienda AND rj.departamento = me.departamento AND rj.subdepartamento = me.subdepartamento AND rj.clase = me.clase AND rj.subclase = me.subclase LEFT JOIN catalogos.control_asignacion_matrices cam ON rj.ranking = cam.clasificacion OUTER APPLY (SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN m.n >= MONTH(GETDATE()) THEN ISNULL(m.val, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS abierto_otr FROM otr.otr_consulta oc CROSS APPLY (VALUES (1, oc.mes1_compra_adicional),(2, oc.mes2_compra_adicional),(3, oc.mes3_compra_adicional),(4, oc.mes4_compra_adicional),(5, oc.mes5_compra_adicional),(6, oc.mes6_compra_adicional),(7, oc.mes7_compra_adicional),(8, oc.mes8_compra_adicional),(9, oc.mes9_compra_adicional),(10, oc.mes10_compra_adicional),(11, oc.mes11_compra_adicional),(12, oc.mes12_compra_adicional)) m(n, val) WHERE oc.id_tienda = c.tienda AND oc.id_departamento = me.departamento AND oc.id_subdepartamento = me.subdepartamento AND oc.id_clase = me.clase AND oc.id_subclase = me.subclase AND oc.tipo_articulo = me.tipo_articulo) otr WHERE c.centro_comercial = 1 AND c.tienda = 3064 AND c.clima LIKE '%calor todo el tiempo%';

	EE.SOURCE_RES_NO AS SOURCE_RES_NO_TEXT,

	(SELECT EQP_MODEL FROM RES_SYS.PUB_RME_EQP_MODEL WHERE EQP_MODEL_ID=EE.DEV_MODEL_ID and delete_state='0') AS DEV_MODEL_ID_TEXT,
	(SELECT EQP_MODEL FROM RES_SYS.PUB_RME_EQP_MODEL WHERE EQP_MODEL_ID=EE.OLD_DEV_MODEL_ID and delete_state='0') AS OLD_DEV_MODEL_ID_TEXT,
	(SELECT MFR FROM RES_SYS.PUB_MFR WHERE MFR_ID=EE.MFR_ID and delete_state='0') AS MFR_ID_TEXT,

	(SELECT MFR FROM RES_SYS.PUB_MFR WHERE MFR_ID=EE.OLD_DW_MFR_ID and delete_state='0') AS OLD_DW_MFR_ID_TEXT,
	(SELECT MFR FROM RES_SYS.PUB_MFR WHERE MFR_ID=EE.MNT_MFR_ID and delete_state='0') AS MNT_MFR_ID_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_STAFF_NAME(EE.MODIFY_OP) AS MODIFY_OP_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_STAFF_NAME(EE.CREATE_OP) AS CREATE_OP_TEXT,
	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_STAFF_NAME(EE.CHECK_PERSON) AS CHECK_PERSON_TEXT,

	D.APP_REGION_ID,
	(SELECT REGION_NAME FROM res_entity.REG_MANAGE WHERE REGION_ID = D.APP_REGION_ID AND delete_state = '0') AS APP_REGION_ID_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DISTRICT_NAME(ST.DISTRICT_PROVINCE_ID) AS DISTRICT_PROVINCE_ID_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DISTRICT_NAME(ST.DISTRICT_REGION_ID) AS DISTRICT_REGION_ID_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DISTRICT_NAME(ST.DISTRICT_COUNTY_ID) AS DISTRICT_COUNTY_ID_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DISTRICT_NAME(ST.DISTRICT_PROVINCE_ID) || res_entity.SF_GET_DISTRICT_NAME(ST.DISTRICT_REGION_ID) || res_entity.SF_GET_DISTRICT_NAME(ST.DISTRICT_COUNTY_ID) AS REGION_ID_TEXT 
FROM RES_ENTITY.ENT_ENTITY EE 
LEFT JOIN RES_ENTITY.ENT_ROOM B ON B.ENTITY_ID = EE.ENTITY_ID
LEFT JOIN RES_ENTITY.STA_STATION ST ON ST.STATION_CODE = EE.STATION_CODE

	RES_ENTITY.SF_GET_STAFF_NAME(EE.CHECK_PERSON) AS CHECK_PERSON_TEXT,
	ST.DISTRICT_PROVINCE_ID,
	ST.DISTRICT_REGION_ID,
	ST.DISTRICT_COUNTY_ID,
	ST.STATION_NAME,
	ST.STATION_NAME AS STATION_ID_TEXT,
	D.APP_REGION_ID,
	(SELECT REGION_NAME FROM res_entity.REG_MANAGE WHERE REGION_ID = D.APP_REGION_ID AND delete_state = '0') AS APP_REGION_ID_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DISTRICT_NAME(ST.DISTRICT_PROVINCE_ID) AS DISTRICT_PROVINCE_ID_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DISTRICT_NAME(ST.DISTRICT_REGION_ID) AS DISTRICT_REGION_ID_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DISTRICT_NAME(ST.DISTRICT_COUNTY_ID) AS DISTRICT_COUNTY_ID_TEXT,
	res_entity.SF_GET_DISTRICT_NAME(ST.DISTRICT_PROVINCE_ID) || res_entity.SF_GET_DISTRICT_NAME(ST.DISTRICT_REGION_ID) || res_entity.SF_GET_DISTRICT_NAME(ST.DISTRICT_COUNTY_ID) AS REGION_ID_TEXT 
FROM RES_ENTITY.ENT_ENTITY EE 
LEFT JOIN RES_ENTITY.ENT_ROOM B ON B.ENTITY_ID = EE.ENTITY_ID
LEFT JOIN RES_ENTITY.STA_STATION ST ON ST.STATION_CODE = EE.STATION_CODE  
LEFT JOIN RES_ENTITY.STA_APP_INFO D ON ST.STATION_ID=D.STATION_ID
WHERE EE.DELETE_STATE = '0' AND EE.RES_TYPE_ID=205  
AND EE.STATION_CODE in  (select station_code  from res_entity.sta_biz_info  where  REGION_ID in (  select REGION_ID from res_entity.reg_manage  connect by prior REGION_ID = SUPER_REGION_ID and nvl(delete_state, '0') = '0' start with region_id in ('000102000000000000370100') ) ) 
)t where ROWNUM <= 10) where rn > 0;

{"case_id": "41", "db_type": "postgresql", "description": "иҜҘSQLж—ЁеңЁз»ҹи®ЎеӣӣдёӘдёҚеҗҢж—¶й—ҙзӘ—еҸЈеҶ…пјҲиҝҮеҺ»7гҖҒ13гҖҒ25гҖҒ2е°Ҹж—¶пјүпјҢеҗ„иЎҢж”ҝеҢәеҲ’зҡ„'zdjs'жҢҮж ҮжңҖеӨ§еҖјгҖӮеӯҳеңЁжҳҫи‘—зҡ„жҖ§иғҪй—®йўҳпјҡ1. **еҶ—дҪҷеҲ—жҠ•еҪұ**пјҡжңҖеҶ…еұӮжҹҘиҜўйҖүеҸ–дәҶ`zdbh`гҖҒ`zxjs`зӯүеҗҺз»ӯиҒҡеҗҲдёҚйңҖиҰҒзҡ„еӯ—ж®өпјҢеўһеҠ дәҶдёҚеҝ…иҰҒзҡ„I/Oе’ҢеҶ…еӯҳејҖй”ҖгҖӮ2. **ж— ж•ҲжҺ’еәҸ**пјҡеӣӣдёӘдҪңдёәJOINжәҗиЎЁзҡ„еӯҗжҹҘиҜўпјҲDerived TableпјүеҶ…йғЁеқҮеҢ…еҗ«`ORDER BY "zdjs" desc`дҪҶж— `LIMIT`пјҢиҝҷз§ҚжҺ’еәҸеңЁе…іиҒ”ж“ҚдҪңдёӯжҳҜж— ж„Ҹд№үзҡ„пјҢдё”еҸҜиғҪи§ҰеҸ‘йўқеӨ–зҡ„жҺ’еәҸж“ҚдҪңгҖӮ3. **еӨҡеұӮеөҢеҘ—**пјҡеӯҳеңЁеҶ—дҪҷзҡ„еӯҗжҹҘиҜўеұӮзә§пјҢеҜјиҮҙз”ҹжҲҗдёҚеҝ…иҰҒзҡ„дёҙж—¶з»“жһңйӣҶгҖӮдјҳеҢ–ж–№еҗ‘еҢ…жӢ¬з§»йҷӨж— ж•ҲжҺ’еәҸгҖҒиЈҒеүӘйқһеҝ…иҰҒеҲ—д»ҘеҸҠеӯҗжҹҘиҜўжүҒе№іеҢ–гҖӮ", "difficulty_level": "3", "create_table_statements": ["CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS WHYJ_SJZL;", "CREATE TABLE WHYJ_SJZL."ds_dm_tqyj_jssk" ("xzqhdm" VARCHAR(50), "zdbh" VARCHAR(50), "zdjs" NUMERIC, "zxjs" NUMERIC, "gxsj" TIMESTAMP);", "CREATE INDEX idx_ds_dm_tqyj_jssk_gxsj ON WHYJ_SJZL."ds_dm_tqyj_jssk"("gxsj");", "CREATE INDEX idx_ds_dm_tqyj_jssk_xzqhdm ON WHYJ_SJZL."ds_dm_tqyj_jssk"("xzqhdm");"], "sql": "select "a"."qh" as "qhmc","d"."zdjs" as "1xszdjs","a"."zdjs" as "6xszdjs","b"."zdjs" as "12xszdjs","c"."zdjs" as "24xszdjs" from
(select 
case substr("xzqhdm",1,6) 
	 when '420102' then 'жұҹеІёеҢә'
	 when '420103' then 'жұҹжұүеҢә'
	 when '420104' then 'зЎҡеҸЈеҢә'
	 when '420105' then 'жұүйҳіеҢә'
	 when '420106' then 'жӯҰжҳҢеҢә'
	 when '420107' then 'йқ’еұұеҢә'
	 when '420111' then 'жҙӘеұұеҢә'
	 when '420112' then 'дёңиҘҝж№–еҢә'
	 when '420113' then 'жұүеҚ—еҢә'
	 when '420114' then 'и”Ўз”ёеҢә'
	 when '420115' then 'жұҹеӨҸеҢә'
	 when '420116' then 'й»„йҷӮеҢә'
	 when '420117' then 'ж–°жҙІеҢә' end as "qh" ,max("zdjs") as "zdjs" from (
select "xzqhdm",sum("zdjs") as "zdjs" from (
select "xzqhdm","zdbh","zdjs","zxjs","gxsj" from WHYJ_SJZL."ds_dm_tqyj_jssk" where

model_answers.model_answer: WITH agg AS (SELECT CASE substr("xzqhdm",1,6) WHEN '420102' THEN 'жұҹеІёеҢә' WHEN '420103' THEN 'жұҹжұүеҢә' WHEN '420104' THEN 'зЎҡеҸЈеҢә' WHEN '420105' THEN 'жұүйҳіеҢә' WHEN '420106' THEN 'жӯҰжҳҢеҢә' WHEN '420107' THEN 'йқ’еұұеҢә' WHEN '420111' THEN 'жҙӘеұұеҢә' WHEN '420112' THEN 'дёңиҘҝж№–еҢә' WHEN '420113' THEN 'жұүеҚ—еҢә' WHEN '420114' THEN 'и”Ўз”ёеҢә' WHEN '420115' THEN 'жұҹеӨҸеҢә' WHEN '420116' THEN 'й»„йҷӮеҢә' WHEN '420117' THEN 'ж–°жҙІеҢә' END AS "qh", "xzqhdm", sum("zdjs") FILTER (WHERE "gxsj">=NOW()-INTERVAL '2' HOUR) AS s2, sum("zdjs") FILTER (WHERE "gxsj">=NOW()-INTERVAL '7' HOUR) AS s7, sum("zdjs") FILTER (WHERE "gxsj">=NOW()-INTERVAL '13' HOUR) AS s13, sum("zdjs") AS s25 FROM WHYJ_SJZL."ds_dm_tqyj_jssk" WHERE "gxsj">=NOW()-INTERVAL '25' HOUR GROUP BY 1,2), q AS (SELECT "qh", max(s2) AS d2, max(s7) AS d7, max(s13) AS d13, max(s25) AS d25 FROM agg GROUP BY "qh") SELECT "qh" AS "qhmc", d2 AS "1xszdjs", d7 AS "6xszdjs", d13 AS "12xszdjs", d25 AS "24xszdjs" FROM q ORDER BY "6xszdjs" DESC;
