## Original SQL:
WITH StudentStats AS (
  SELECT 
  s.s_id,
  s.s_name,
  s.s_sex,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sc.c_id) AS course_count,
  AVG(sc.s_score) AS avg_score,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sc.s_score > 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS excellent_course_count
  FROM Student s
  JOIN Score sc ON s.s_id = sc.s_id
  GROUP BY s.s_id, s.s_name, s.s_sex
  HAVING AVG(sc.s_score) > 80 AND SUM(CASE WHEN sc.s_score > 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 2
)
SELECT 
  ss.s_id,
  ss.s_name,
  ss.s_sex,
  ss.course_count,
  ss.avg_score,
  ss.excellent_course_count,
  RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY ss.s_sex ORDER BY ss.avg_score DESC) AS gender_rank
FROM StudentStats ss
ORDER BY ss.avg_score DESC;

## Optimized SQL:

model_answers.model_answer: WITH ScoreStats AS (SELECT sc.s_id, COUNT(DISTINCT sc.c_id) AS course_count, AVG(sc.s_score) AS avg_score, SUM(CASE WHEN sc.s_score > 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS excellent_course_count FROM Score sc GROUP BY sc.s_id HAVING AVG(sc.s_score) > 80 AND SUM(CASE WHEN sc.s_score > 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 2) SELECT s.s_id, s.s_name, s.s_sex, st.course_count, st.avg_score, st.excellent_course_count, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY s.s_sex ORDER BY st.avg_score DESC) AS gender_rank FROM ScoreStats st JOIN Student s ON s.s_id = st.s_id ORDER BY st.avg_score DESC;

SELECT u.user_id, u.username, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price * (1 - oi.discount / 100)) AS total_spent, AVG(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price * (1 - oi.discount / 100)) AS avg_order_value, MAX(o.order_date) AS last_order_date, tp.GROUP_CONCAT_ AS top_products FROM users AS u INNER JOIN orders AS o ON u.user_id = o.user_id AND o.order_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 3 YEAR) LEFT OUTER JOIN order_items AS oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT t.user_id, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT t.product_name ORDER BY t.product_name SEPARATOR ', ') AS GROUP_CONCAT_ FROM (SELECT o3.user_id, p.product_name, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o3.user_id ORDER BY SUM(oi2.quantity * oi2.unit_price * (1 - oi2.discount / 100)) DESC) AS rank_num FROM order_items AS oi2 INNER JOIN orders AS o3 ON o3.order_id = oi2.order_id INNER JOIN products AS p ON oi2.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY o3.user_id, p.product_name) AS t WHERE t.rank_num <= 3 GROUP BY t.user_id) AS tp ON tp.user_id = u.user_id WHERE u.status = 'active' GROUP BY u.user_id, u.username ORDER BY total_spent DESC;

select * from (select vehicle_type, booking_status, payment_method, ride_distance, rate, row_number() over (partition by vehicle_type order by abs(rate) desc) as rank_num from (select vehicle_type, booking_status, payment_method, ride_distance, coalesce(ride_distance, 0) - coalesce(avg(ride_distance) over (partition by vehicle_type, booking_status, payment_method), 0) as rate from ride_bookings) t where abs(rate) >= 1) fn where rank_num <= 5;

SELECT rb.customer_id, COUNT(DISTINCT rb.booking_id) AS total_bookings, SUM(rb.booking_value) AS total_revenue, agg.avg_driver_rating, agg.last_booking_date FROM ride_bookings rb JOIN (SELECT customer_id, AVG(driver_rating) AS avg_driver_rating, MAX(booking_date) AS last_booking_date FROM ride_bookings GROUP BY customer_id) agg ON agg.customer_id = rb.customer_id WHERE rb.booking_status IN ('Completed','Cancelled','No Show') AND rb.booking_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 180 DAY) GROUP BY rb.customer_id, agg.avg_driver_rating, agg.last_booking_date HAVING total_bookings > 10 ORDER BY total_revenue DESC, avg_driver_rating ASC;

model_answers.model_answer: SELECT count(1) stockNum, COUNT(c.FIRST_IN_HOSTSTOCK_DATE) hostStockNum FROM t_mdm_dlr_car_store c LEFT JOIN t_mdm_dlr_car CAR ON CAR.CAR_ID = c.CAR_ID LEFT JOIN t_ve_bu_sale_order_d SOD ON SOD.SALE_PLAN_CODE = c.SALES_PLAN_CODE LEFT JOIN t_ve_bu_sale_order SO ON SOD.SALE_ORDER_ID = SO.SALE_ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN t_mdm_ve_car_config con ON con.CAR_CONFIG_ID = CAR.CAR_CONFIG_ID LEFT JOIN t_ve_bu_inv_apply_d iad ON SO.SALE_ORDER_ID = iad.link_order_id AND iad.is_Enable='1' LEFT JOIN (SELECT m.CAR_ID FROM t_ve_bu_movestock_order m JOIN (SELECT MAX(MOVESTOCK_ORDER_CODE) mc FROM t_ve_bu_movestock_order GROUP BY VIN) g ON m.MOVESTOCK_ORDER_CODE = g.mc) mo ON mo.CAR_ID = c.CAR_ID LEFT JOIN t_ve_bu_month_plan_d mpd ON mpd.SALES_PLAN_CODE = c.SALES_PLAN_CODE LEFT JOIN t_usc_mdm_org_dlr tumod ON c.DLR_ID = tumod.DLR_ID LEFT JOIN T_USC_MDM_ORG_CITY CI ON CI.CITY_ID = tumod.CITY_ID LEFT JOIN t_ve_db_zb_stock tvdzs ON tvdzs.ZB_STOCK_ID = c.CAR_STOCK_HOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN t_ve_db_car_stock_house tvdcsh ON tvdcsh.CAR_STOCK_HOUSE_ID = c.CAR_STOCK_HOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN T_VE_DB_CAR_STOCK_HOUSE SHd ON SHd.CAR_STOCK_HOUSE_ID = c.CAR_SALE_HOUSE_ID LEFT JOIN t_mdm_ve_car_optionalpag optionl ON CAR.OPTIONAL_PAG_ID = optionl.OPTIONAL_PAG_ID LEFT JOIN t_mdm_car_color cols ON CAR.CAR_COLOR_ID = cols.CAR_COLOR_ID LEFT JOIN t_mdm_car_incolor incol ON CAR.CAR_INCOLOR_ID = incol.CAR_INCOLOR_ID LEFT JOIN t_ve_db_car_stock_house oge ON oge.CAR_HOUSE_CODE = SOD.DELIVERY_FAC_HW_CODE LEFT JOIN t_ve_finance_wholesale_purchase_order ord ON ord.SALES_PLAN_CODE = c.SALES_PLAN_CODE LEFT JOIN t_ve_bu_invoice_info_upload tvbiiu ON ord.WHOLESALE_PURCHASE_ORDER_CODE = tvbiiu.WHOLESALE_PURCHASE_ORDER_CODE AND tvbiiu.IS_ENABLE='1' LEFT JOIN t_prc_mds_lookup_value v5 ON v5.LOOKUP_VALUE_CODE = ord.ORDER_STATUS AND v5.LOOKUP_TYPE_CODE='VE1414' LEFT JOIN (SELECT MAX(PURCHASE_ORDER_CODE) PURCHASE_ORDER_CODE, SALE_PLAN_CODE FROM t_ve_bu_purchase_order GROUP BY SALE_PLAN_CODE) purchase ON purchase.SALE_PLAN_CODE = c.SALES_PLAN_CODE WHERE c.IS_ENABLE='1'

{"case_id": "50", "db_type": "sqlserver", "description": "иҜҘSQLжҹҘиҜўз”ЁдәҺзӯӣйҖүзү№е®ҡзҡ„зҙўиө”и®°еҪ•пјҲclaimпјүпјҢйҖ»иҫ‘дёҠеҢ…еҗ«еӨҚжқӮзҡ„`OR`жқЎд»¶е…іиҒ”жҹҘиҜўе’Ңз”ЁдәҺеҺ»йҮҚзҡ„е…іиҒ”еӯҗжҹҘиҜўгҖӮеӯҳеңЁзҡ„дё»иҰҒжҖ§иғҪз“¶йўҲпјҡ1. **ж— иҫ“еҮәзҡ„JOINж“ҚдҪң**пјҡжҹҘиҜўеҜ№`serie`иЎЁиҝӣиЎҢдәҶдёӨж¬ЎLEFT JOINпјҲеҲҶеҲ«дҪңдёә`serie`е’Ң`exchange_serie`пјүпјҢдҪҶеңЁSELECTеҲ—иЎЁдёӯе№¶жңӘиҜ·жұӮиҝҷдәӣиЎЁзҡ„д»»дҪ•еӯ—ж®өпјҢд»…з”ЁдәҺWHEREеӯҗеҸҘзҡ„иҝҮж»ӨгҖӮиҝҷз§ҚеҶҷжі•еўһеҠ дәҶдёҚеҝ…иҰҒзҡ„иҝһжҺҘејҖй”ҖгҖӮ2. **и°“иҜҚжңӘдёӢжҺЁ**пјҡWHEREеӯҗеҸҘдёӯеҢ…еҗ«и·ЁиЎЁзҡ„`OR`йҖ»иҫ‘ `(A AND B) OR (C AND D)`пјҢиҝҷйҖҡеёёйҳ»жӯўдјҳеҢ–еҷЁжңүж•Ҳең°еҲ©з”Ёзҙўеј•иҝӣиЎҢиҝҮж»ӨпјҢеҜјиҮҙдјҳеҢ–еҷЁеҸҜиғҪйҖүжӢ©жү«жҸҸж•ҙдёӘ`claim`иЎЁеҗҺеҶҚиҝӣиЎҢиҝҮж»ӨпјҢиҖҢдёҚжҳҜе…ҲйҖҡиҝҮзҙўеј•е®ҡдҪҚгҖӮ3. **жҳӮиҙөзҡ„е…іиҒ”еӯҗжҹҘиҜў**пјҡдёәдәҶдҝқз•ҷжҜҸдёӘ`claim_folder_id`дёӢзҡ„жңҖж–°и®°еҪ•пјҢдҪҝз”ЁдәҶе…іиҒ”еӯҗжҹҘиҜў `c.id = (SELECT MAX(...) ...)`пјҢиҝҷдјҡеҜјиҮҙеҜ№жҜҸдёҖиЎҢз»“жһңйғҪжү§иЎҢдёҖж¬ЎеӯҗжҹҘиҜўпјҲN+1й—®йўҳпјүпјҢеңЁж•°жҚ®йҮҸеӨ§ж—¶жҖ§иғҪжҖҘеү§дёӢйҷҚгҖӮ", "difficulty_level": "1", "create_table_statements": ["CREATE TABLE claim (id int PRIMARY KEY, sap_code nvarchar(4000), claim_folder_id int, repair_date datetime, claim_status_id int, is_e2e bit, serie_id int, exchange_serie_id int, serial_number nvarchar(4000), production_code nvarchar(4000), exchange_serial_number nvarchar(4000), exchange_production_code nvarchar(4000));", "CREATE TABLE serie (id int PRIMARY KEY, sap_code nvarchar(4000));", "CREATE INDEX idx_claim_folder ON claim(claim_folder_id);", "CREATE INDEX idx_claim_serial ON claim(serial_number);", "CREATE INDEX idx_serie_sap ON serie(sap_code);"], "sql": "SELECT c.id, 
 В  c.sap_code, 
 В  c.claim_folder_id, 
 В  DATEDIFF(day, c.repair_date, GETDATE()) AS DATE_REPAIR_DIFF, 
 В  c.claim_status_id AS status, 
 В  c.is_e2e AS e2e 
FROM claim c 
LEFT JOIN serie 
ON serie.id = c.serie_id 
LEFT JOIN serie exchange_serie 
ON exchange_serie.id = c.exchange_serie_id 
WHERE ( ((serie.sap_code = @P0 
OR serie.sap_code = CONCAT('4000', @P1)) 
AND c.serial_number = @P2 
AND c.production_code = @P3) 
OR ((exchange_serie.sap_code = @P4

AND (c.serial_number NOT IN (@P8)

AND c.id =

 В  WHERE c2.claim_folder_id = c.claim_folder_id 
 В  OR (c.claim_folder_id IS NULL 
 В AND c2.id = c.id)
 В  ) 
ORDER BY c.id DESC

*/
(@P0 nvarchar(4000),@P1 nvarchar(4000),@P2 nvarchar(4000),@P3 nvarchar(4000),@P4 nvarchar(4000),@P5

model_answers.model_answer: SELECT c.id, c.sap_code, c.claim_folder_id, DATEDIFF(day, c.repair_date, GETDATE()) AS DATE_REPAIR_DIFF, c.claim_status_id AS status, c.is_e2e AS e2e FROM claim c WHERE ((EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM serie s WHERE s.id = c.serie_id AND (s.sap_code = @P0 OR s.sap_code = CONCAT('4000', @P1))) AND c.serial_number = @P2 AND c.production_code = @P3) OR (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM serie es WHERE es.id = c.exchange_serie_id AND (es.sap_code = @P4 OR es.sap_code = CONCAT('4000', @P5))) AND c.exchange_serial_number = @P6 AND c.exchange_production_code = @P7)) AND c.serial_number <> @P8 AND c.production_code NOT IN (@P9, @P10, @P11) AND c.id = (SELECT MAX(c2.id) FROM claim c2 WHERE (c.claim_folder_id IS NOT NULL AND c2.claim_folder_id = c.claim_folder_id) OR (c.claim_folder_id IS NULL AND c2.id = c.id)) ORDER BY c.id DESC
